body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhjj3jrvlhfaurvi1ps34vvbqbd5kdhkv37036b8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhhibckhcj7j8lig13djashregild41pgd4t5fp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zobarm3dt2cq6ankrrcj5fbejst9fbft1phsk4ho_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs0hmt2f1h109o6dskrb4lic58abg6fe78s4lko0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5t1ui6i2td1515iv3odeghqg57t6n05f89rsrao_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfa2qo37a160oftpc8ro40hqos25ehp2a8n7h6r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z84gn8oq5sqpht01gh5n8sk9a3krmdt4e0tlvuio_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9boh8kktgs9bks0jsfo7mh4ea90fassrnaq2na8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

name: David Horowitz
subject: the enemy within
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze0s4pfi7bj5rn8120n4tstepnteoke9q28m07no_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zivecbovuf9ktocrkamik9l1qhcfh5e9qe2e0buo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8adb5olcodmhg589ig22f9lmgh52d01nqd7ghp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)**

clean_body: America is on the brink of destruction. | | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr7pbqgjab4tcd6onmob1pkebuo91tdam9u32ki0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn3rc94ksiqhpgr8lkf0lje9o95f2b2u79lbkef0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcvga6le4ru6kk6c3ucepufglsvkr0ddcq6bo68o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9a9pce4a3ter1olknf5c7l59rn281hnq73qrlu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu60m0tgqaok1aqusvrmnvj1jvlbetf8jjrvtprg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztujfq6v4enm2fci24plel4eatos727ujvarhgi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuf1bl9dr60civgodun3o0pq8qu67sgc5j952ju0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze0avf8e9o6196b90iqtulr3fm1k8a2g9rgfmhog_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk4877t1he7bj3d5q082pbtl925agqkc0isc0n9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjv18op671mp7d6o77l9kh0ath3vvh8mh9vm9d1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1svrme61nf4foje9scdhuibhbrtoe7o4tamf5u0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2l8si1p6aa8njtl5s6tq3j4le1hu60ok5hgne5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkhpbeupb0ckim8h8n89hgoe5423c41nlk277590_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z96vg6o4inpjpgc179n89k2r9fqaunbgetlg7af0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs)
---
---
2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748
---
|

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
This is not ordinary food.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4etkcnpdpjdjbvplvraqnt2sn5acaghj6pmt5to_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gmeoj6clh2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: the enemy within
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zupoppvus1jabvligoeojpqs5b7ao5vtgp01ioog_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gm9o34c5h2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv9vmaglki8ik232jd1b2i7j44ftuhl64dr7h1r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gm9o34c5h2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo09eraipl43uihr3j91rbev556e5k12cbi2fvk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3gm9o34c5h2bs)**

What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. subject: Democrat Fundraising Edge Could End
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
The path to real change in Washington goes through the U.S. Senate.

| | |
---
|
---
The path to real change in Washington goes through the U.S. Senate. President Trump's executive orders are only temporary and cannot be enshrined into law without Senate approval. And good judges who don't engage in lawfare cannot be seated without Senate confirmation. **Conservatives are making steady gains in the Senate, but the biggest obstacle is the Democrats' massive cash advantage.** In the past four election cycles, Democrat Senate candidates have massively out-raised their Republican opponents. The numbers are staggering. Just look at the chart below.
---
---
In 2018, Democrats beat Republicans by $220 million. In 2020, they bested our candidates by $376 million. In 2022, their advantage was $212 million, and in 2024 it was a whopping $402 million.[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2anure7bgkadpsh0776vl5dbrucc5usua00uvio_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74c5h2bs) **Freedom loving Americans must reverse this trend or we will never see the changes we need to create a lasting legacy of freedom.** With Democrats in disarray, we believe Senate conservatives can close the cash gap, but only if we start working now. **[**Please take action by contributing to our supported candidates.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk21q5apd1o01la90mctu3t1hqoh177uuvpo0ao8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74c5h2bs)** These candidates are proven conservatives that we can count on to fight for our principles and values. ▶︎ Sen. name: NRSC Election Strategy Team
subject: If you don’t act right now, Republicans lose.It’s that simple.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The GOP is getting CRUSHED by the Democrats right now

Friend,

The radical left is mobilizing their base, using every tool at their disposal to outspend and outmaneuver Trump Republicans. _**[This is a dire situation.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhv4s05p7j5opt23rsqvo02kolbpmkgfihjjfc08_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74clh2bs)**_

Next year's midterm elections will be here before you know it. In the months ahead, it's imperative that **[EVERY grassroots conservative](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk4ttdpfadhdsj3nce6jqdjmkp35hgkqhjk47ia0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74clh2bs) **steps up and does their part in the fight for America's future.

In order to win big in 2026, our team at the NRSC has created the first-ever **[Strategic Voter Engagement Survey,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlrdk2h3ftc5rtq9k76368burt2gdsmq06i3g91g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74clh2bs)** a high-priority initiative to boost conservative enthusiasm and redirect our Party's priorities.

**[✅ Where we allocate resources

✅ How we mobilize Republican voters in key swing states

✅ What issues we emphasize to defeat the Radical Left](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp57g3mvu9i08e8almrhcd67cmssfbmno9v8sj1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74clh2bs)**

We cannot afford to get this wrong. Your participation is what separates victory from defeat, and we're counting on you to lead the GOP to success.

**[Fill out the Strategic Voter Engagement Survey NOW. The deadline to respond is midnight tonight.>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj48292m5b2ebuhp8e3dbg2m4kdm0a2e23s4he8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74clh2bs)**

The Democrats are ALREADY organizing against us, pouring millions into their get-out-the-vote machine. Just look at the results of recent special elections across the country, or their victory in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race. _**[We NEVER would have suffered those losses if we had had you guiding our strategy.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ssece5c0vp9rhue72n740pajg79akt1d48mdr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74clh2bs)**_

Patriots like YOU are the backbone of this movement. But we need your input before it's too late to stop Democrats from wrestling back control of our country.

**[Fill out the Strategic Voter Engagement Survey before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. Don't wait any longer to take action, Friend.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3dt88efnus28ma8vv07rqvasr26ktpj18i2hqjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74clh2bs)**

Thank you,

NRSC Election Strategy Team

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: A thank you from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjalkkmmc1dvqtae3ag264f95i1i6vrqpp3mhjlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74c5h2bs)
---
**[**FROM THE DESK OF WINSOME EARLE-SEARS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9eit96fdcckm30pf6k6d4rbq1bie5ssquq2rtjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74c5h2bs)**
---
Friend,

I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever. Since announcing my run for Governor of Virginia, the outpouring of support has been nothing short of incredible.

I've received thousands of messages from folks all across the Commonwealth - It's humbling to have the prayers and support of so many patriots.

As a Marine and a proud conservative, I know that I have the experience and the conviction to lead our great Commonwealth forward. I'm committed to protecting the promise of Virginia, where every child can get a world-class education, every business can thrive, and every family can live in safety and prosperity.

But I didn't expect the rush of enthusiasm that's swept across our campaign. _**From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being part of this movement.**_ Your encouragement, your volunteer hours, and your generous financial support are the fuel that will propel us ever forward.

Now, I need to ask for your help again. We have a long and challenging road ahead, and it's going to take every ounce of our energy and resources to win. _**[_**Can you make a donation today to help us keep the momentum going? Every gift, no matter how small, brings us one step closer to victory.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrqi4mukep415r397tp5dos06btp2foo3re893cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o74c5h2bs)**_

---

Sincerely,
Winsome Earle-Sears

body:
The Left is SUING Trump to let non-citizens vote. We must act NOW.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z623f7317aff01iars73itm5l5d8t1qi2pbfd4i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o70c3h2bs)

**🚨 OPEN AND READ ASAP🚨**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z96nipb1kadan9kkecm6bggetf1qjujctu11db5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o70c3h2bs)

Patriot, **

**
Let me explain.

President Trump just signed an **executive order to BLOCK non-citizens** from voting in federal elections.

That's common sense, right?

**Not to the Radical Left.

**
The DNC, Chuck Schumer, and Hakeem Jeffries are FURIOUS -- **[and now they've filed a lawsuit to overturn the order and FORCE our elections wide open.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpt1pdldevjg4j39li91mgv007181fo97g4l1ng8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o70c3h2bs)**

They want **illegals voting.

****
**They want**open borders AND open ballots.

****
**And they will do**anything** to **DESTROY election integrity.

**
We MUST fight back -- **and fast.

**
That's why I'm calling on **every single patriot** to help me demand Congress PASS the **SAVE Act** -- a bill that will:

✅ **BAN** non-citizens from voting in federal elections

✅ **DEFEND** voter ID laws

✅ **CLOSE** the loopholes Democrats use to STEAL elections

We CANNOT allow foreign nationals to walk into our polling place.

No ID. No citizenship.

Just a ballot. And a smile.

**And you 're paying for it.

**
That's what the Left is fighting for -- and they're SUING President Trump to make it happen.

**Patriot, time is running out.

****
**If we don 't act **NOW** , they'll rig **ANY ELECTION** before it even begins.

I'm calling on **10,000 America First patriots** to add their name to demand Congress PASS the SAVE Act.

Let's make our voices heard --[**and let 's send the Left a message they'll NEVER forget.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za863e8v1fd8oactu0hktlp05o45ue0klv8ddico_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o70c3h2bs)

[👉 SIGN NOW: DEFEND TRUMP. DEFEND OUR VOTES. 👈](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkq9cg8smqr0ot9u8qt8npmppcq89jrk1cmsmq40_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im0o70c3h2bs)

For America,

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: A thank you from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuveoatrtnp7n4iaolnvh56m4g36195f8pu2j86g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im8pr6cth2bs)
---
**[**FROM THE DESK OF WINSOME EARLE-SEARS**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgtt66f18hpugl3npjg8djka0iaqrn69o252942g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im8pr6cth2bs)**
---
Friend,

I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever. Since announcing my run for Governor of Virginia, the outpouring of support has been nothing short of incredible.

I've received thousands of messages from folks all across the Commonwealth - It's humbling to have the prayers and support of so many patriots.

As a Marine and a proud conservative, I know that I have the experience and the conviction to lead our great Commonwealth forward. I'm committed to protecting the promise of Virginia, where every child can get a world-class education, every business can thrive, and every family can live in safety and prosperity.

But I didn't expect the rush of enthusiasm that's swept across our campaign. _**From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being part of this movement.**_ Your encouragement, your volunteer hours, and your generous financial support are the fuel that will propel us ever forward.

Now, I need to ask for your help again. We have a long and challenging road ahead, and it's going to take every ounce of our energy and resources to win. _**[_**Can you make a donation today to help us keep the momentum going? Every gift, no matter how small, brings us one step closer to victory.**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zee9rvainsig416qvb89eogta0ecrpg5ljf2c5h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im8pr6cth2bs)**_
---

---
Together, we can do this. Together, we will make Virginia the land of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity that we know it can be.

Sincerely,
Winsome Earle-Sears

_**" Shoot at ICE Agents on sight."**_

That's the message from one Liberal activist, this is what we are up against.

As President Trump works with us to deport illegal immigrant gang members, murderers, and rapists, some Liberals are actually calling for our brave ICE and Border Patrol agents to be shot!

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: A thank you from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zct8tg9rgp26rkkd1jhgua6sgd8vssqug2l9efkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im4or6c1h2bs)
---
**[**FROM THE DESK OF WINSOME EARLE-SEARS**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg0sqkq0tsmslr313n166k6jgp22l2q7389hkcg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im4or6c1h2bs)**
---
Friend,

I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever. Since announcing my run for Governor of Virginia, the outpouring of support has been nothing short of incredible.

I've received thousands of messages from folks all across the Commonwealth - It's humbling to have the prayers and support of so many patriots.

As a Marine and a proud conservative, I know that I have the experience and the conviction to lead our great Commonwealth forward. I'm committed to protecting the promise of Virginia, where every child can get a world-class education, every business can thrive, and every family can live in safety and prosperity.

But I didn't expect the rush of enthusiasm that's swept across our campaign. _**From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being part of this movement.**_ Your encouragement, your volunteer hours, and your generous financial support are the fuel that will propel us ever forward.

Now, I need to ask for your help again. We have a long and challenging road ahead, and it's going to take every ounce of our energy and resources to win. _**[_**Can you make a donation today to help us keep the momentum going? Every gift, no matter how small, brings us one step closer to victory.**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z53u2sqfqem59mtp0mfsh9gl7pip7ggkg3dg2d90_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im4or6c1h2bs)**_
---
| | _**[_**Donate HERE**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc50l993a3eu3gtp2pkcrifrm10j1jblufske6k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im4or6c1h2bs)**_
---
Together, we can do this. Together, we will make Virginia the land of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity that we know it can be.

Sincerely,
Winsome Earle-Sears
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z18hi3i1clk2bel8uhnlmu4vs8t0k1t4uk9uda3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im4or6c1h2bs)

| | |
---
| |
# _Weekly Update_
Several committees wrapped up this week as there are only three more days of committee for the 2025 Legislative Session.

I was proud to present [HB 1521](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d47f59e3e65923bcd589dff84ddc7aa0ee093b5db0498615103e7fb91a7b8a9d795696e7dd9d9846f761d3c499b6fd27eb "HB 1521"), the sister bill of my [SB 33](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d4949a6e1b97c911084fac2f44e7e11ffe565d870a2282c46ab97a53f0ce17b4a744807e2feba9374ad6922801d1988437 "SB 33"), in Commerce and Technology this week. This bill will protect the DNA data privacy of Hoosiers and regulate how this data is stored, secured and shared.

I was also so glad to welcome folks from all over the state who advocate for Hoosiers impacted by breast cancer. It is important that the General Assembly continues funding research and support. **Committees I Served on This Week: ** **[Tax and Fiscal Policy](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d442f5b9273208c8252a9d22a9fa5eeaa2a7da35fcf92f9a945a82de1c6490ffc551a784e96da20a82fa8c496c882a8b64 "Tax and Fiscal Policy")
[Education and Career Development](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d43ddcdca27b515a0c300c4451add1af5ef593dc4bc24df9633eae9da3c99b4f226befd5a907ad33dd59e7320d0497b9ea "Education and Career Development")**
**[Commerce and Technology](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d40c337e6cc29aea582d23e2a734c7b792feeffbe9e2f7b17f95543f98865d4512912da69fbca26520fd35e719fcbb71f0)** **As we work through the last week of committee, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream committees and more on[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d4f5fbfda8e8d6fb1afa7b2d791115f9eaf80946aa45809b6339ce38a1c2c202c6d0e10e0eebe1eec2786fb9bb7b4828f6). ** **Make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. **
---
#
* * *
---
# Join Me for An Upcoming Town Hall
---
|
---

I cannot wait to see you at my upcoming town hall, this Thursday from 6 - 8 PM.

I will be giving an update about the 2025 legislative session, where we stand now and what to look out for over the next few weeks.

Additionally, I am thrilled to be joined by IPS Commissioner Allissa Impink!

We will be available to answer your questions about session, our shared communities and what we can do going forward.
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | [SB 287](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d41241ddbcdf157b348ef2cfa9fdf62afc535a31a3a7e44f8253467f7192a0a8990aaa85d6fc73af176d247303365af5d1 "SB 287") is a bill that I know many of you have questions and concerns about.

While I joined many of you in hoping it would not make it out of the House, after [it's narrow passage in the Senate](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d44cb1664a7e0ecdaa008543c2f2d85496e4c3ffd59251975732ee9b119953a2b362c9aee35565f34f4a1bda3a44a7ad23 "it's narrow passage in the Senate"), it passed this week with some key changes.

SB 287 is a bill that would make our school board races partisan and inject politics directly into the classroom.

By requiring folks who want to run for school board to affiliate themselves with party politics, we are putting up barriers and creating hoops for people who simply want to help their school district.

Furthermore, this bill would preclude certain government employees, which could include military members or postal workers, from running at all.

**In short, it's a bad bill. **

This bill [saw some changes in the House.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d4ea8a66f91c3e14c49d7f326039eb7eb4fea7652c560f8550ed38c0ca100d6842640049f03b6866178d15814cd8cf8c04 "saw some changes in the House.")

One of the biggest changes, and a good one at that, is that school board candidates no longer will be required to go through a primary process.

Additionally, there will now be a "non-partisan" option when declaring a party amongst some other changes.

**So, what happens now?**

When a bill gets sent back to its original chamber with changes, there are two options:

1\. The author can concur, or agree, with the changes and then entire Senate will then vote one last time on the amended bill. If it passes this vote, it goes to the governor's desk to be signed into law. If it does not pass, the bill dies.

2\. The author can dissent, or disagree, with the changes which sends the bill to **conference committee**.

**Okay, so what's conference committee?**

When the chambers disagree on what a bill should say, it goes to a conference committee where they hash out their differences. When they get to a resolution, they sign off on a **conference report** that is then voted on one last time by both the House and the Senate. This version of the bill, if passed, is then sent to the Governor's desk. These conference committees will likely be starting next week, and though we are nearing the end of session,_a lot_ can happen throughout the course of the next few weeks.

Stay up to date with legislation on [iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d425dcc8586f2b16bdab24ebecb8d1590ae19511171ff2c5ae2c999ee9dc60c610ce192be23d2f3abea784921bf6b29e72 "iga.in.gov") and [by following my social media pages](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=e6f0ce22b5a726d44677e36e5ba020b45201a607d8c93352af8cd11fdf0e532563d0a8bb0290f0e918e52fd0085c21d49079d53304474bd1 "by following my social media pages") for daily updates.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | | | | Weekly Update Several committees wrapped up this week as there are only three more days of committee for the 2025 Legislative Session. I was proud to present "HB 1521", the sister bill of my "SB 33", in Commerce and Technology this week. This bill will protect the DNA data privacy of Hoosiers and regulate how this data is stored, secured and shared. I was also so glad to welcome folks from all over the state who advocate for Hoosiers impacted by breast cancer. It is important that the General Assembly continues funding research and support. Committees I Served on This Week: "Tax and Fiscal Policy" "Education and Career Development" As we work through the last week of committee, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream committees and more on. Make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. Join Me for An Upcoming Town Hall | I cannot wait to see you at my upcoming town hall, this Thursday from 6 - 8 PM. I will be giving an update about the 2025 legislative session, where we stand now and what to look out for over the next few weeks. Additionally, I am thrilled to be joined by IPS Commissioner Allissa Impink! We will be available to answer your questions about session, our shared communities and what we can do going forward. | | | | | | "SB 287" is a bill that I know many of you have questions and concerns about. While I joined many of you in hoping it would not make it out of the House, after "it's narrow passage in the Senate", it passed this week with some key changes. SB 287 is a bill that would make our school board races partisan and inject politics directly into the classroom. By requiring folks who want to run for school board to affiliate themselves with party politics, we are putting up barriers and creating hoops for people who simply want to help their school district. Furthermore, this bill would preclude certain government employees, which could include military members or postal workers, from running at all. In short, it's a bad bill. This bill "saw some changes in the House." One of the biggest changes, and a good one at that, is that school board candidates no longer will be required to go through a primary process. Additionally, there will now be a "non-partisan" option when declaring a party amongst some other changes. So, what happens now? When a bill gets sent back to its original chamber with changes, there are two options: 1\. The author can concur, or agree, with the changes and then entire Senate will then vote one last time on the amended bill. If it passes this vote, it goes to the governor's desk to be signed into law. If it does not pass, the bill dies. 2\. The author can dissent, or disagree, with the changes which sends the bill to conference committee. Okay, so what's conference committee? When the chambers disagree on what a bill should say, it goes to a conference committee where they hash out their differences. When they get to a resolution, they sign off on a conference report that is then voted on one last time by both the House and the Senate. This version of the bill, if passed, is then sent to the Governor's desk. These conference committees will likely be starting next week, and though we are nearing the end of session,a lot can happen throughout the course of the next few weeks. name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: A thank you from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlj7bh46eprr9bn35jlmta2sn7uviv8g13lv4r50_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob5c5h2bs)
---
**[**FROM THE DESK OF WINSOME EARLE-SEARS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd4gdikjoqr7oq8fd1gpl0kdda1nhjd9fmfr11u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob5c5h2bs)**
---
Friend,

I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever. Since announcing my run for Governor of Virginia, the outpouring of support has been nothing short of incredible.

I've received thousands of messages from folks all across the Commonwealth - It's humbling to have the prayers and support of so many patriots.

As a Marine and a proud conservative, I know that I have the experience and the conviction to lead our great Commonwealth forward. I'm committed to protecting the promise of Virginia, where every child can get a world-class education, every business can thrive, and every family can live in safety and prosperity.

But I didn't expect the rush of enthusiasm that's swept across our campaign. _**From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being part of this movement.**_ Your encouragement, your volunteer hours, and your generous financial support are the fuel that will propel us ever forward.

Now, I need to ask for your help again. We have a long and challenging road ahead, and it's going to take every ounce of our energy and resources to win. _**[_**Can you make a donation today to help us keep the momentum going? Every gift, no matter how small, brings us one step closer to victory.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1fdtv4nkh4d7agoobvjqmuhmaagdbtnqbg9k4eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob5c5h2bs)**_
---
| | _**[_**Donate HERE**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfom8klsfegcv1m86kdtmjmcboaap35rr9d1u4bg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob5c5h2bs)**_
---
Together, we can do this. Together, we will make Virginia the land of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity that we know it can be.

Sincerely,
Winsome Earle-Sears
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zghsneisti6vufpk6eg2hk3uunrehc5dp6tgnmu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob5c5h2bs)

---
I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet!

It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. _**[_**So please, chip in if you can today!**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr56is5l8a0ervro9kn2pa3mtjgtk08nk2cmilog_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob5c5h2bs)**_

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: What’s your favorite Trump accomplishment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
But I want to hear from YOU!

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7n21dn7cpc5nnbulj3k10d349kbtf3kigm1s88o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)
Friend,

President Trump hit the ground running in his first 100 days — and the impact has been HUGE.

We’re witnessing the Trump Effect: From securing our borders to standing up for American patriots, he wasted no time fighting for America First.

But I want to hear from YOU!

**What’s your favorite Trump accomplishment from his first 100 days? Select your answer:**
[Securing the Border](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr40rs76pf61hn3iih67e35cbhccso5knrbd5gvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)

[Empowering DOGE to Cut Spending & Waste](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2jqk0b6r6060ff5mbpld1gol2scgrce9oorko4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)

[Eliminating DEI Policies & Offices](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvdnavsdo4dqs6ekav3sv2sb9dv9oc3n3hfge060_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)

[Protecting Women's and Girls’ Sports](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3vqv96fgf4ulens3l1pcjujgu74u4bsvduna76o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)

[Ending Government Censorship](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgde5pfa40cvg6sc8c3fj6cg7k97pv4vq1ak7778_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)
President Trump has wasted no time delivering on the promises he made to the American people.

Within the first 100 days of his second administration, President Trump has taken action to secure the border, deport criminal illegal immigrants, unleash American prosperity, lower costs, increase government transparency, and reinstitute merit-based hiring in the federal government.

**Which of these achievements stands out most to you? Let me know by clicking below!**
[Securing the Border](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsthv4chb6krvfjvacj4nq0p0a3vpsncn0kfc2m8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)

[Empowering DOGE to Cut Spending & Waste](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs0p3p8c4ggmjl3ue2rr1vl3c17ncfefc7dcumoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)

[Eliminating DEI Policies & Offices](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6888fjrpsnvhrreoltvfiqtjt7sakp6i75e4l40_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)

[Protecting Women's and Girls’ Sports](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkbr69lnl5aongp9m8gdv6vimmp37qqvphcd0020_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)

[Ending Government Censorship](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvmihpnviorr584j837sno4vba4qiaj19kn2qfog_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im2ob6cph2bs)
For America First,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Within the first 100 days of his second administration, President Trump has taken action to secure the border, deport criminal illegal immigrants, unleash American prosperity, lower costs, increase government transparency, and reinstitute merit-based hiring in the federal government. Which of these achievements stands out most to you? Let me know by clicking below! For America First, Charlie Kirk Turning Point PAC Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Democrat Fundraising Edge Could End
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
The path to real change in Washington goes through the U.S. Senate.

| | |
---
|
---
The path to real change in Washington goes through the U.S. Senate. President Trump's executive orders are only temporary and cannot be enshrined into law without Senate approval. And good judges who don't engage in lawfare cannot be seated without Senate confirmation. **Conservatives are making steady gains in the Senate, but the biggest obstacle is the Democrats' massive cash advantage.** In the past four election cycles, Democrat Senate candidates have massively out-raised their Republican opponents. The numbers are staggering. Just look at the chart below.
---
---
In 2018, Democrats beat Republicans by $220 million. In 2020, they bested our candidates by $376 million. In 2022, their advantage was $212 million, and in 2024 it was a whopping $402 million.[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmsogkhk7bdn4uq9ggvmf5prgsn3j4j201a8t6d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im1o36c5h2bs) **Freedom loving Americans must reverse this trend or we will never see the changes we need to create a lasting legacy of freedom.** With Democrats in disarray, we believe Senate conservatives can close the cash gap, but only if we start working now. **[**Please take action by contributing to our supported candidates.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsvr0s1l71ih7cno7108hf6f60t0u2ujtrkhdh90_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im1o36c5h2bs)** These candidates are proven conservatives that we can count on to fight for our principles and values. ▶︎ Sen. Mike Lee (R-UT) ▶︎ Sen. Bernie Moreno (R-OH) ▶︎ Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) ▶︎ Sen. Eric Schmitt (R-MO) ▶︎ Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) You can contribute directly to multiple campaigns with a single online contribution, and SCF will pay all processing fees so the candidates receive 100% of your contributions. **[**So, please help us wipe out the Democrats' cash advantage by contributing today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgvh7o4dumb9amtk62k0k3bshs01ti678jc0nrt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c3im1o36c5h2bs)** Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

_April 5th, 2025_
---
| | |

| | Celebrate Victory with the 47th President Donald Trump in 2025!

The BIG Trump Knife is [laser-etched on a stainless steel blade with a waving American Flag and a stainless steel half-guard keeps your fingers from slipping.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20951/6374453/35a10e4d0b64d790c3aec128de2d34ffaa915f8d/29b1e39b3c3e28dbd743513bf4580a8812c1bfcb)

---
The patriotic handle scales are crafted of a **[blue pakkawood panel that has“Donald Trump” in white, surrounded by white stars, and a red andwhite-striped acrylic panel.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20951/6374453/35a10e4d0b64d790c3aec128de2d34ffaa915f8d/29b1e39b3c3e28dbd743513bf4580a8812c1bfcb)**

The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry.
**Get Your Trump Knife Today &
Let Folks Know Where You Stand** The Limited Edition Trump Knife is not just a rare collectible, but a symbol of your support for President Trump, who always stood for "True American" freedom.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Your insights and opinions keep our work with DOGE going so we're reaching out to you with one VERY IMPORTANT request...

| |
---
| | | Friend -

Our House Majority is working around the clock with President Trump, Elon Musk, and DOGE to investigate, audit, and eliminate waste everywhere we possibly can.

But the work isn't EVEN CLOSE to being done.

If we are to continue on this crusade we need the backing and advising of Patriots like you. _Your insights and opinions keep our work with DOGE going so we're reaching out to you with one VERY IMPORTANT request..._

_**[Please take some time to fill out our Official April 2025 DOGE Survey:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4fb905b85a134ce588e630ea90212f21&_e=txBP2tidhAEOqpLhHKuk8y7N7ZicLaXTY7Pi1CyZK-eGpJz7pwXlgQuuYRGC9brN1e7uibmcrAv9F7AS2Ew77M-kBPWF6WCNqMkq2P0u_V4QKC1RVvKkvj6137fG7z7abD45nMR63ckPPjUYNb3y2ESDZ2tDBRB2yWsrN6m7aipSy9RGuhmRZFidhki7JRf1Zpg11cOiFa2UMDWARvjSpFPn05EC7lBp4SLR-hjpO5m00c02-TVPQhcYs-JTeckcAaBIWm8ZLQ3GPDDVY8ZccEl3pysliZrqDvx-9c5jAg9MeltT6W8dlzNb-FVDTn8QLhRo-QnA8G7cceF2SZgCbVD_ka7jiCKqmSef_tmhlZa0DJ0AGab7EXjnwqM_HbgPkDvZiuBYCduRMdgPDKdVtUorIn3GbzvpTqMg8flHAUdAxuu-tFxBOOcU6ousoIPrs4MjeSiZuLXe4dZiBXclRQ%3D%3D "Please take some time to fill out our Official April 2025 DOGE Survey:")**_

---
**OFFICIAL APRIL 2025 DOGE SURVEY**

name: The Flyover
subject: Markets Fall, UConn vs. South Carolina, and a Martian Dust Devil
body:
The stock market fell again on Friday, with the Dow closing the [day down 2,200 points](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvwyAQBeBfgzes8wEhDAxdvKVrR-sCR0yDQ2TTWPn3lbt3ecuTvqf3dZkulEt-3D5pYd9SnRDQSNASzBQpl_eku-gTM7Lq2A9Wq7O26E7d7K0dILIl49DRkExyeIIzOkNEHJzrsj800GAGgEGZ3pqgrqQxaTSkXBIaOOZW1_675kebOZV3ffHah7p0xc-tPTehPgSOAsd93_vwuIajFDgetMAR9BFK4Li1Gu5yofXOTbYa6S1LfrH8eUZqvPVzW0q3-vjccyl5O1mh4bZQLn9r7b_3L4-_AQAA___RDFp3) and the S&P 500 dropping 10% in the past two days as new U.S. tariff policies continued to rattle investors.

# Saturday, April 5, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1792, George Washington exercised the [first presidential veto](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L9utDAQBPCnMZ3R4j_4c-Hia-gubUq0OdbHRj6MbOsIbx8RpU3904xG836bb8iJt8cbPim0mGcFykowEuy8IKdzNt0SIpEi3VEYnNH_jFN-7NagvbMYwXsE5zHGwQyjARqVB-MGch2Hqw0M2AFg0LZ39q4_0KholEXtozBAC7dc-s_MW1sppjO_qPT3_OxSWFvbq9D_hZqEmo7j6FeuLZfzcqGmtnKVC56SN_krQk24F07SXgmsK2-PljdJX1TuXKnKyKU2uReqvNDWGJN8UctdCct-cEpcRycMPJ7I6WdH--uXV1DfAQAA___EIGa2) by refusing to sign a bill that called for an increase in the number of House seats allocated for northern states, stating that the measure was unconstitutional. ## Stocks Plummet as China Retaliates
The stock market fell again on Friday, with the Dow closing the [day down 2,200 points](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvwyAQBeBfgzes8wEhDAxdvKVrR-sCR0yDQ2TTWPn3lbt3ecuTvqf3dZkulEt-3D5pYd9SnRDQSNASzBQpl_eku-gTM7Lq2A9Wq7O26E7d7K0dILIl49DRkExyeIIzOkNEHJzrsj800GAGgEGZ3pqgrqQxaTSkXBIaOOZW1_675kebOZV3ffHah7p0xc-tPTehPgSOAsd93_vwuIajFDgetMAR9BFK4Li1Gu5yofXOTbYa6S1LfrH8eUZqvPVzW0q3-vjccyl5O1mh4bZQLn9r7b_3L4-_AQAA___RDFp3) and the S&P 500 dropping 10% in the past two days as new U.S. tariff policies continued to rattle investors. China added to Friday’s poor economic outlook by [imposing 34% tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8Gb1hwgJ0MDF28pWtHi5yP-CpsIiBx8_dVund_ek_v6zJfAifeb59hI99inkGBk8pK5eYlcHrNtlt8JAIyHXk9WnOyI5yHbvUOndMadBiMw5MGwgGvg7V4VogYqGP_timrnFZKG9ePDs01WIgWXDDnKKyihVsu_Xfmva0U0ys_qfSYty75tbV7FeZDwCRgOo6jj_nn-qi8U61vRsBEmPe8vQRMuPIeZKEWEodGVRorWygcY5WPKnm759JqV_xyPzglrsMorLptgdNfr_33__TwGwAA___2uF5g) on U.S. goods starting April 10, matching tariffs announced by the White House earlier this week. March’s jobs report did bring [good economic news](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OgzAQhJ_GdEbGXgdSuLiGLtdeifyzGxwZjIwviLc_kf66kUaa0ff9PKaHjSmuz2-7oKmUJymk5gK40FOwMZ0TNMEQokTVoOl6UAP08n5rZkOOAgkAqYmUGzSowSF46zqvB0-iieZaEyB0J0SndNtrr5wFSSC1VXdiIDDEmkv7ynGtM1I68xtL6_PSJDPXuu1MfTE5Mjkex9F6t6947FfP5HhFJsdXdjsvuOVSec3Bnnyxxc_8g4I-r3k5ebUlEu28lt9l4yE_kcmxKSZsR0wp7reegXguNqbPef1PxtvIvwAAAP__QCxipA) Friday, as the U.S. added 228,000 jobs, beating expectations and highlighting a resilient labor market. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell [remained cautious](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1utDAQAJ_GdEZmveancPF9iugubUpk8PrYxGCEfXe5t48ufeqRRqP5uEwXx5H367vbyJaQJlBgpEKpzOQdx-eElbeBCEhXZJsOdY8dDG21WsDWBAPdTL1bWoXYz4MCP6vOOwCNFduXTaEyjVKNNnVnFj07hIBgnB6CQEWeSzrrz8R7WSnEZ7rTWS9pq6JdSzmy0P8EjAJGNy87PXJ9TS8sYPx_y7xTzgLGQF4uq-NTHulBMUr6PmgpWZbzth1ZFndyCFmu_EWS9xBd4bQLGHNJ51Pokb3Qbw0o7Ie2heq0_nhwjJzbTqC6bo7jb1T5a9Ldwk8AAAD__9VqaSE) Friday, noting that key indicators "still show a solid economy" despite mixed economic signals.
## Deadly Storms Continue in South
Powerful spring [storms are expected to continue](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UktzqjwA_TW4iwN5IC5Y8FWtz1pt56t1wwSSkGhIbBKw9Nffscs7c7fntTjnfOzKHVVameaFtjwPwpYwhgTEGMSkZFTpocQjlgvOIUcjnicTjDI8gdN0JPNpCmtBkgkhCRQJzdKYVRQJjGBSJaLCI5U_0mIckySOE0TGE1KjimIoMCQUTUWEY85UsG58scoEyYUebM_duLbtSOcyhJuPUBHBRQQX9_t9PFBp7YON4MLwu4_ggnHK9ACCdYYyyz1w6gZo7az3oOYmOKpB5wH1wJqaA2UABQ033NGgrAE-WNeCyinTeCA57Qfg6ENkGBCaegmEtpaBIB2nAQQLWqW1ssaDBGNCMjJNxzK0OkKLpqtr25nAXYRmSQTTpqt56bjgzv1idHmM6-Uu3Q7T7nxiP9uW9RVk_vxGLhWM-78tpVdNhGbFoSiKJcM7b_fF06tbJ-pUbqXM1p89Oq4PZ7ORX3N3Gb4r8f_-up4Xs25fVqw9iaG8ZW8ffrdMsnY-rJ6TA3svnvV98xq_S7Y66jJ-r06DwJrS_6pNeoXX88rM1q_dZeiy09NTMpd8n73snwW5zk_n74_LudjIL7zE2_lqd5ih2dfLXDU_ypW9B8fPZfeJRi5nt_ujJp9OIhw3LVX6d9Pwr4_1OfwTAAD__3Ki1-8) in the lower Ohio Valley and mid-South, with officials warning of up to 15 inches of heavy rainfall and life-threatening flash flooding. Kentucky, Missouri, Tennessee, and Arkansas are among the states at high risk for excessive rainfall due to the slow-moving, “once in a generation” storm system. Large hail, tornadoes, and damaging winds [also pose a threat](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd0TH_NhxQXEbd7ntlhaGQ3w2GCIgifL2K-9K2203n0YazczHZblYipSu_-2OpoW8CBCag-KgF28pvhfVeRMQBcoOTT8qeVajmIZuM2OYnNL96uA8DON69mC1FAH8qpUbYOrIHGmgQPcAvdSnUTu5WiWCEtrKKTAF6KnlcvrMlNqGIb7zE8vJ5b2LZmvtXpn8x8TMxPxC27Yfj4m5tlz2egh8YkEm5oSvg38HSB5izp7SlYdc0NnauC03m6qtfKda86MQb5gS1orIb5jaw93enGKklKl2xfj766A6jEzBdbcUv6u1v656GvEVAAD__3rgbMA) this weekend, heightening the risk of weather-related damage—especially downed trees from heavily saturated soil. The storm system has [already spawned tornadoes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOrDAQRL8GMiPjB4bAwU0mm5tuiBrcHnpl7JHtAfH3KzbfrFRHKpXO13N-AgWKr_-wo60-zYILzbhiXM8OKFyzap31iAJli7Y3So7KiGloN6tQcMX9MvnRgB-1capHiX6Qpufj4Fuy9xpXXPec91J3Rq9yASW8Ehrk5BvF0VFNuftOFOuGPlzpwNytaW-D3Wp9l0b-a8SjEY_zPLu4rBHPcvO7Qagb5kY8Sk15L3dIn7qxndyJpbIlw4psoxvTyjJQZAUPzMh8SMlRfDGH4MLF9k-oxBxcrNTE8hqhn6ZhGNts3fukEKgMplH8tQOF33_1L1-HFT8BAAD__4_9b1k) in Tennessee, Arkansas, and Missouri, caused floods, killed at least eight, injured dozens, and left over 116,000 customers without power nationwide.
## South Carolina to Face UConn for Women's Title
The March Madness [women’s championship game is set](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLvO4yAUhJ8Gd1iYm01BEa3kLttuaZ3AcWCFwWtIrLz9yun_bqQZjWa-P_flDjHF_PwNG9q2loUzriiTlKnFQ0yfRXberogcRYd2GKWY5MiN7oL1zjMY2AQGzUM_kE2TnpzWk1EehNFdtFcbk0wNjA1C9aNy4gGSr5IrEGYlkqGPrRz93xJzC7imT3nj0buydcmG1vZKxI3wmfD5PM9-q_nyCJ8x01clfK57OdolSgt4XLGAmcZKW0D6PXOWDXOl2QFQF2DbY8k1xJ1i3TOtLqB_JSR8hoPebsMvE97_usP6_YwpxapHItlzg5i-q9pPlN6W_w8AAP__YEBpzw): No. 2 UConn will face off against No. 1 South Carolina at 3 p.m. ET Sunday in Tampa.

South Carolina is defending its title, and UConn is looking for its first championship since 2016.

UConn won its Final Four match Friday night with [an 85-51 thumping of UCLA](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1u7CAUhJ8Gd8fC_Jh1QbG6kru9bUoL48MuCQYL8Dqbp4-cIl260Yw0M_rebtPN-ODj_b9ZUVeXJkaZBCqAymkxPrwm0SzaITLkDepOCX4Rig1989A9RS5nexmYc8b2Mwo-q0H11qJU0l0ar882KqjsKO24bJW0fDaCOcGk4YMjguLia8rte_KxPtCFV3pibm1am6AftW6F8CthI2HjcRztWuKZETZihL0QNpYt5XoKm0LAO8KvsdsUI5Sa1q3AboMBH8H5aAK4tGfIaFNegAvYznF4eltTfhE2mgzXa_fv4-tzaLJetsOH4EuviKD31fjwc6_-heup2XcAAAD__x5Ibl4), the biggest margin of victory in NCAA Final Four history. Star player Paige Bueckers, a senior, is looking for her first national title. South Carolina beat Texas 74-57 in its Final Four match, starting off slowly but taking over [with a 20-9 scoring advantage](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OnDAUhZ_GdHdk_AOzhQsUiW7TpkQXuAYnxp7Yd4adt49Iv92RztHRp-_X5_SJIYa0_cSDHPs8KaksSAPSTiuG-J5MszpPpEg35Nre6Lvp1UfX7M6bxeM6472fZ-W1WQyhXs3iF9v57q6b4K43aaRtpWy1vfV20TMa5Y2yqD-8MJLWwLncfueQeCcf3_lF5bbko4luZ35UoQehRqHG8zxvR01XJ9RICZ5VqLE-cuErZN6pCDXOuMLfJxamAnNgqsD0hRViTtueS6qAG4YENT95hwVLjiEhHPl1TTMk5JATRuDAkWDDg6A3YHuhRiwwDO2PP8MXN8WtjzPEGGrXCyO3A0P8z83feXw59S8AAP__eMx34w) in the third quarter and never leading by less than 10 after that.
