body:
The Texas Longhorns [lost 74-57](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1yhCAUhZ8Gu-tcEX-2oEhjt2lTOiCoJFcxwMpunj6zO5My9XfOmTPfx3W8KkduX97VZmW6z37kyBtAAdiMRjl6jKIwUqO5VIWVVSfqvsEL8mKVqm-F1V3XYNtobvTF6LnSU9WiMf0z7-RzDAU2FTY9dqXRusW-nmYhepxtzQRa45IPZVptsncVZ3r404Zy8ltBck3piKx-Y3xgfMg5l9E9EePD5InsYhkfXj3Gh83uEEGr-GWTVkR_CMjvy-rDHuGMEP0trTCp4MntCma3K4LZ3wIcwZ7OZlh9huQhqzStgNVnwOP43tPPWQRpjuyIXGw7JnDZlKPX0_SvulPy3wAAAP__Z9R0tw) to South Carolina in the women's Final Four matchup Friday night, ending the team's long March Madness run. They're the first Longhorns team to make the Final Four since 2003.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQANCvsbeg83EGM3jowpauHZHxmXCNgQgsmvTrq3bvDzzpfVyHa5As6-09LMmX57QNCGgvQBewAwfJr4E0-xG4Mzp501LtLHSAevYELiARdTw1kcbYNmwjdyMjGDZYa_G_GBBYA9ZBW_E4NuDqOBE5mFKtCBJL2faqzKmkZzim_NrOtFdxW3T2cymPQ9VvCnuF_T3kY5ZqW1OW9V4tSWFv9s4o7KOL35_pvOnd8-NLcpajaRXBbQmS_7Dy7-70-BMAAP__1pFQ7g) | |
# Saturday, April 5, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1896, lawman George Scarborough shot and killed celebrated gunman John Selman in El Paso, marking the third notorious outlaw Scarborough killed in his career. ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7tugzAUgOGnMRvo4EuAwUMXtnTtiIx9fFEdTmQ7IXn7qt37Av-v7-u6XU3K6Qif5oa6vTxtHLjqQfagNmdSfm-yc3oHt4wd6nGSYlawAO-ino31i0Ux2cmpBaQYdzkK76eLg8UJ1SX9GwMJagQ1wzS4fb_ALKyXcgaPgklAlxqVoUVs-DLV5zc9sQyWbl3WsbV7ZeKD8ZXx9TzPodVo6MjpwIFKYHyN5nA70TfjKx6tJKyMr9WaslOhR4h9QCoBe-Mo3-OjdkW7-5lyTvUyMQnhZlL-27V__U_NfwIAAP__d81fJA)) We're excited to announce that beginning tomorrow, we're adding a Sunday edition and expanding _The Texas Flyover_ to seven days a week. Look for us in your morning email tomorrow, and let us know what you think! Today's sponsor is [Kalshi](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQANCvsbeg83EGM3jowpauHZHxmXCNgQgsmvTrq3bvDzzpfVyHa5As6-09LMmX57QNCGgvQBewAwfJr4E0-xG4Mzp501LtLHSAevYELiARdTw1kcbYNmwjdyMjGDZYa_G_GBBYA9ZBW_E4NuDqOBE5mFKtCBJL2faqzKmkZzim_NrOtFdxW3T2cymPQ9VvCnuF_T3kY5ZqW1OW9V4tSWFv9s4o7KOL35_pvOnd8-NLcpajaRXBbQmS_7Dy7-70-BMAAP__1pFQ7g), now offering a legal way to trade on sports, politics, and entertainment. ## Longhorns Lose, Houston Gets Ready
Texas [lost 74-57](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAUhH-N2R56GIPJ4CGqxNR07YiMbcCq8YtsJyT_vkqGbt1Od9Kn0_d9mS7aBx_XL707VR4LTRx5BygAu8lqH56TqKya0Z6ayqlGinbo8IS82lQvsWmlbEUv3dAaMxvUs7VdP_dc6l5XXr1gKLBrsBtQ1naeexxaswgx4OJaJtBZXyjVZXPFPXRewpPuLtWG9iqorZRrZu2Z8ZHx8TiOes_xtTE-ugi3zPiYr5TKKxgKwa0O_oo3EALFdaMUM2SnM0Vw0WbwERYfdYCFbgkOXzYIlDMUgky3soHRiYKPmvFRJzifm48f-hyqpOz18CH43EsmcN21D--z5V97d8V_AwAA__82QXSA) to South Carolina in its women's Final Four matchup Friday night, ending the team's long March Madness run. They're the first Longhorns team to make the Final Four since 2003. The men’s Final Four tips off tonight in San Antonio and includes [Houston taking on Duke](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHPpCAYhH8NdphXBMWC4hq779orDcLLShbBAK67__7i9l81xWQmM8-_n-VH--Dj46_eUdW3SwsDJihwCmKx2ofPwhurVrBT16DqRt5LAROwZlNTN0nhgEthBdODNs6ZYdQwDnbojVwbr-4y4CA6EBLG1q7rALI3jnMJDnvCAa2vKbd1w4pvXVz4pBfm1qS9CWqr9Sik_0PYTNh8XVeL5Yi3Sdi8YyzUpBDwgXTV5Yl11SEQNpea8oeweSFs9pawmXM-cTmIO6Wz2eiubcRS6Pes81EH6tKZ6ZHx5fG61XpTfYqF6nM9c6QupOytpvZ8It3SWWqKTVb2uHwIvgwj4fDYtQ_f7fVXmC_F_gcAAP__Pgp4jw) in the late game, with the winner facing either Florida or Auburn in Monday night’s national championship. Duke is [5.5-point favorite](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGTpCAUhH8NZs96Io4SEFxitpdeaIE8RmoRLEDd-fdXM_nmXd39ff--li_tg4_Pv3onVX9cWjjyAVAADovVPrwW0Vhl0MquIdWNop8GlMibTZnBcewG6rmUkneSDMqHlDTiZIR1vPHqXYYChw6HCcfWGvPAqV-dEBM66plAsr6m3NaNKv3o4sIrXZTbNe1NUFutR2H9H8Znxuf7vtvVlHKkXMs7wfj8pEhZB8bnSHdhfLbnN8FVYEtnqSlCsrbAkcn6tfoUoVSdK1S_E3xI46o11HTmqHeKFZyPOoBLZ4bDr98FzAuOnC6KsCdL76UmK3vcPgRfHiMT-Ny1D5_H9VeFl-L_AwAA__9RjnZy) currently, as Houston enters its seventh Final Four with a 17-game winning streak on the line and seeking its first national title.
## School Choice Voucher Passes to House Floor
A Texas House committee has advanced the [private school voucher](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCngQ5rjZfgFBR_4y5_e6W1GAhIJESG2M7bn5z-uilG30jzc5tvlHJ63v_Tw5t2hDJLkEoAClCzo5Q_M3JnLLhrz73pNQ6jgitIHg1BQKeU1qScs5ZGsmDdlSj0ukcMPJkTAwTVgxpBd87aC4zDEhBHCH5gCN6lVtauRd_8QTXkT9n82i3lwbOJrb0qG_4xOTE57fvehXLg0-_1LDA5nZHJqS6xlCy28l6iX4VNOQtyGz0XX8XXFbG8qxchl7Ly1bjXnnJO9aIZwv1BKX8X258XbEb-BgAA__8-xGDt) bill to the House floor. If passed, it would head to Gov. Greg Abbott for his signature. The 9-6 committee vote was along party lines and now includes a [$1 billion cap](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOozAQBOCnMd2izdoEU7i4hi7XXom89hIsORBhJyRvf0r--q9n9Gk0_y7Txaec1utffxNXX_M2EVIHaAC7KfqU35NpomOMw6kRd-qNth0OSM3iiDCycGRCEwNzRCbdo0VrdTBdaJL7YGiwO2FnsW8j8xmtDrMxFmfRyqDEVLe9rYtUefky5_f2lL0N263Jbqn1XpT-o2hUNB7H0R6z959Q0ej3mkIWReMqR1E0SnwEX9O2Khq_GDy3R1hkB045Q8ji9wJz2kuFKqVCWuGnt2yP8oHI9oCsOXJnIdBswVhEYCsI1gwhGOlpEN3sLt6PlHMq514ZvN58yt_N9dcTn47-BwAA__-O73M3) for the first two years of the program, most of which would go to students with disabilities and from lower income households. The House committee [received backlash](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OgzAQBOCnMZ3RYkwwhYtr6HLtlcg_S2zF4AhvIHn7E5GuvGaLHenTaH6u09XEFNfbt1lQ02vOkwDRcZAcusmbmN6TrLy24IemQt30slUdDCCqoAeU1lnvLgbADApVq3rV977xg7LSiCrqEwMJXQOdgr721l5AtW6WUsGMLZOAPlLeagpI-DJlTu-841a7vFRJB6JHYe0XEyMT43Ec9T3RfoZMjKfNxAjy73wAHvKzIHd5WSIRIt_QYdyxcGvcPZkS-JqJp_NFG5olrjdeXMg58T0_XcCt8D0TMjFWm_aPI6YUy6VnEm6LielTjf7datfiNwAA__947W1I) from the bill’s opponents for not livestreaming Thursday’s vote.

| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQANCvsbeg83EGM3jowpauHZHxmXCNgQgsmvTrq3bvDzzpfVyHa5As6-09LMmX57QNCGgvQBewAwfJr4E0-xG4Mzp501LtLHSAevYELiARdTw1kcbYNmwjdyMjGDZYa_G_GBBYA9ZBW_E4NuDqOBE5mFKtCBJL2faqzKmkZzim_NrOtFdxW3T2cymPQ9VvCnuF_T3kY5ZqW1OW9V4tSWFv9s4o7KOL35_pvOnd8-NLcpajaRXBbQmS_7Dy7-70-BMAAP__1pFQ7g) For the first time in American history, trading on the outcome of March Madness games is legal in Texas thanks to [Kalshi](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQANCvsbeg83EGM3jowpauHZHxmXCNgQgsmvTrq3bvDzzpfVyHa5As6-09LMmX57QNCGgvQBewAwfJr4E0-xG4Mzp501LtLHSAevYELiARdTw1kcbYNmwjdyMjGDZYa_G_GBBYA9ZBW_E4NuDqOBE5mFKtCBJL2faqzKmkZzim_NrOtFdxW3T2cymPQ9VvCnuF_T3kY5ZqW1OW9V4tSWFv9s4o7KOL35_pvOnd8-NLcpajaRXBbQmS_7Dy7-70-BMAAP__1pFQ7g). This is possible because Kalshi operates like the stock market, where users trade against other users, instead of a traditional sportsbook, where everyone bets against the house. Rather than using complicated odds, Kalshi markets show a simple percentage. For example, [Duke has a 50% chance](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQANCvsbeg83EGM3jowpauHZHxmXCNgQgsmvTrq3bvDzzpfVyHa5As6-09LMmX57QNCGgvQBewAwfJr4E0-xG4Mzp501LtLHSAevYELiARdTw1kcbYNmwjdyMjGDZYa_G_GBBYA9ZBW_E4NuDqOBE5mFKtCBJL2faqzKmkZzim_NrOtFdxW3T2cymPQ9VvCnuF_T3kY5ZqW1OW9V4tSWFv9s4o7KOL35_pvOnd8-NLcpajaRXBbQmS_7Dy7-70-BMAAP__1pFQ7g) of winning the title, which means a $100 trade would pay out $200 if it happens. Alongside simpler odds, there are other unique benefits to Kalshi, such as better pricing and the ability to cash out any time at fair market value. They're the first Longhorns team to make the Final Four since 2003. | | | | | | Saturday, April 5, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! They're the first Longhorns team to make the Final Four since 2003. The men’s Final Four tips off tonight in San Antonio and includes in the late game, with the winner facing either Florida or Auburn in Monday night’s national championship. Duke is currently, as Houston enters its seventh Final Four with a 17-game winning streak on the line and seeking its first national title. School Choice Voucher Passes to House Floor A Texas House committee has advanced the bill to the House floor. If passed, it would head to Gov. Greg Abbott for his signature. The 9-6 committee vote was along party lines and now includes a for the first two years of the program, most of which would go to students with disabilities and from lower income households. The House committee from the bill’s opponents for not livestreaming Thursday’s vote. Texas Health Resources in Arlington and Ryan, LLC, in Dallas made the top 40, with Virginia-based Hilton taking the top spot overall. You can see the . **Not to the Radical Left.

They want **illegals voting.

**They want**open borders AND open ballots.

****
**And they will do**anything** to **DESTROY election integrity.

**
We MUST fight back -- **and fast.

**
That's why I'm calling on **every single patriot** to help me demand Congress PASS the **SAVE Act** -- a bill that will:

✅ **BAN** non-citizens from voting in federal elections

✅ **DEFEND** voter ID laws

✅ **CLOSE** the loopholes Democrats use to STEAL elections

We CANNOT allow foreign nationals to walk into our polling place.

No ID. No citizenship.

Just a ballot. And a smile.

That's what the Left is fighting for -- and they're SUING President Trump to make it happen.

****

I'm calling on **10,000 America First patriots** to add their name to demand Congress PASS the SAVE Act.

__

Thanks to President Trump, the Deep State is being exposed. Guilty
actors are being held to account. And justice is being served.

_BUT WE’RE NOT SAFE JUST YET!_

As I’m sure you’ve seen on the news, _judges_ have now gone rogue
and are REVOLTING. They’re trying to handcuff President Trump to
stop him from demolishing the Deep State.

And they’d love nothing more than to see his former lawyer – yours
truly – behind bars.

IN FACT, MY OWN FATE NOW RESTS IN THE HANDS OF A JUDGE WHO WILL DECIDE
WHETHER I LIVE IN A PRISON CELL UNTIL I AM 100 YEARS OLD.

And this is an important note: _President Trump CANNOT issue a pardon
to save me, because I’m being tried in state court._

But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “DEAD MAN
WALKING,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and
forced me into BANKRUPTCY, the _TRUTH_ remains...

_...NO ONE CAN EVER TELL ME I’M NOT A FIGHTER._

Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m _still_ FIGHTING BACK.

When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot
under BOOKING # 2313757...

And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like YOU are
also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an
INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m
humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal
Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom
and justice.

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY

AND ULTIMATE VINDICATION AS THE DEMOCRATS TRY TO JAIL ME FOR THE REST

name: History Facts
subject: America's tree stump houses of the 1800s
body:
Before the logging industry wiped out millions of wooded acres across the United States, the trees in old-growth forests were hundreds of feet tall, with gnarled bases and trunks that could measure more than 20 feet across.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68ep7m8hsrgw7pfadbxswyt7pkv8u1c2ba3odfj0509zvjwz0tq0xnsqytkqltcmtvszlhw2gqt7d7qeihv6ywbeyybqu4asgzb6321atuk5c70l3yd3lo7lfp1873v3qzajln6tqt6p87lts&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su8sc2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [In the 1800s, some Americans lived inside massive tree stumps.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su8sc2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su8sc2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su8sc2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| B efore the logging industry wiped out millions of wooded acres across the United States, the trees in old-growth forests were hundreds of feet tall, with gnarled bases and trunks that could measure more than 20 feet across. To fell the trees, loggers would build platforms 10 to 12 feet off the ground where the tree’s shape was smoother. So when settlers moved into the cleared forestland, they had a lot of giant stumps to contend with. Some stumps were removed, sometimes using perilous methods such as fire or dynamite. But others, particularly the larger ones, were repurposed.
---
The bases of these massive trees had soft wood interiors and sometimes even hollow areas, so it was relatively easy to carve out the center of a stump and turn it into a building, such as a barn, post office, or even the occasional home. The most famous of these stump houses was the [Lennstrom Stump House](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su8sc2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in Edgecomb, Washington, crafted from a cedar stump 22 feet in diameter. Three adults and three children lived in the stump until they could build a larger house on their property. Unfortunately, the Lennstrom home was severely damaged in 1946. But in Arlington, Washington, just a few miles from Edgecomb, an extant 18-foot stump house is [on display](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su8sc2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) outside the Stillaguamish Valley Pioneer Museum.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su8sc2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su8sc2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

---

## A 17th-century treehouse is still standing in England.
The centerpiece of the Pitchford Estate, a historic thousand-acre farm in rural Shropshire county, England, is an Elizabethan mansion decked out in ornate half-timbering. But there’s a much smaller house that’s equally of note: a treehouse, complete with matching half-timbering, that dates back to [at least](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su8sc2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) 1692\. The timbering is a later edition — the treehouse was originally built to look like a stone building. When it was first built, the cottage was entirely supported by the lime tree beneath it, but some adjustments have been necessary as both have aged. Now, the structure is held aloft by metal struts, but it’s stable enough that visitors can explore it on tours.
---

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/2ZhICfZvp4YXWAbyHcScJXA5xlemArYTkofjaUCzIZyfh54ahsw4sY2blY4t89OCmKRR0w6y10bKTtkFfsqQLV7w6uj_l1DtGXV-4-F5iNvDINkyFYenb-lH--0bAP84tP9AFP6u7hbfzTVr6lYoKCJvhR_RzNFFPAkfyka28z6oT6N_5Fzap9txO_Vj5PEP5aJGt8roPP7jVNKohiR6tPAtaurB1LErWCGhV0O4ymin0ji111ix0Vq2cVYjQmOkx0vA5lBE0TAJIE8naWy4-7GcBAVs2nDY6qtJKDUMomV2oKMMDis55FAo16K2rbpWsBFqfNJwiyAALTPcQ1Py3feytDmPg23mB2atg6uRaAnSXIubxQn6epDYvffBTOuCtxbcc6w6iOWn8mOFxs4lk9gxb59P86EK8tCS5UiEYkusO_JpT9VFXgeB0nkyMTUfFfSyObgekEa_-Np1aj9-kL5OG4aWW1MBXya5osTuG4o/bqdr3Y0f98oyI-ZlTFGqpwgpQrLKA-qZ/7)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/TzKjxNAeVhF1KC3An4jc1T4y6QRT5-7TqHtOho3didDCt2ODhzXcg48zIXCOXiZRjKPbqaoA5tiQKNdzzbhEgi2cyvxYgxTv8kqnd0hFsxZNHeP9IynY6aw8GDbEbE3o_HYpb3_BzNXyQxWJucPZMFSnWUewLL3kDWlbkLZty1-31zC9VP8ckvHgurunbnDGetyTpInnpdszGxqvX-CA05hvJl5KspmFW0yaP7HSIjmLepgum6G3cHvQQDB0N-RugAsfQEf5FRZ_YT6IZKmOelKuhk2FLC14noas7TyHh3Y-4rl_tlSVEpoZqcwmcpNy4eCsVFKRrHl_5mAjVyRdyNBdsI6kbgKsoujBMNcBc3u9vxvJxcoph6KkWLHWqG1MMuuxMXaSzG586awUSdI_Wz8dVA2mspleGJxHQ3LP0aKq1zh_HpzGQTk_QTXUV1sPzJjFP_elVKKKQtaKl-e1sbN5mF4Zt6xPkbX5nrWjIuE/01FgubmOAXQNZDaEavIaMFEJIyMa5kii/7)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. clean_body: America is on the brink of destruction. | | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. clean_body: America is on the brink of destruction. | | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. That 's why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/oWsXKkepxUKy4EkjVcouGKSvfl6J9Kbs9dcq97QO2H2zSjibItC749gF1hn3blbju1Zpc8KU2GY4zgPNQV8nvWaZeKIfxMpsBBrbnnsurVC_sRp2B0D1jHjPl2iSnRH6jcmQLc4WBhxBrt3TymGJ3RDmGyKwvT984Bfxqj1HYM2lxzojBp20ofkJLmXpvXoTcYjbZ7MaXSpqvEpEMuX0xp3edHAEzLZcKzj0w8d8wbYE3fDZmZQT64gKp9sAVTpXsIp2kEAqNp58QawDURIuOXY71jAC-Y78uoRi3QFnfy1d4PoKzgYM890zP5Y2755tC3jPhPwzxsNfhNijWh8CmgD-ffqMYfc55n55INCXwnLx_X_tq0UFIbG81DJAlNQ-gUWF6wMGmgi8rO6EcHkq1Z9nzrVkql89zLDKYA/Z7836AmDXQ5TtnEX_skZi7Eg0x5bM4u2/7) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/Yx4ppEVF23y40S_ZbFBfst2WHX4AVi55lkd4F9RJdfHs5675Un6M6bCda2newzy8WYdyAd-MRUwGWtRcazT8tnNOYemL4aRTikXIUFrfpWmn5tjeeAR8K_Wv5Pgf6y9rxoRjjcBIBn9TaLDfrylaCcyIugAwb_rincut8EsguP5QkKKgfEy_Tstc1AGMqLCR211OGJmrb00Uh8ROzgyC9J7cKJUu-2nPmU-2EI9TwW9_QqnuRu6vAlOpUR2mu7Gye9KFyWq8DgGGvibnQl5K6-yoGxNiHI3U-Hu9a-Kg4e3nwVW09xl_4j7FFji3u6ei1mTQJEuYkj6DXFFN9tJOI5BRQIUpwoT-ffnwLFwrGcijHFDhTYIcccwD_8fp96G83_-djBwGhiBSZbgAQVN2VNkPw66l-hP0GEob9g/xS5maED2HUbpoLAyEp5St7r5TGkLOhL-/7) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/5RQsm6_dZs8BOfKrEBnjuNLzin4HxW3BE4mIzSezdoHWmdQH1MM2gnV4AF1Lgqhx3g2wAff6CfPgcOK3XVQjFC9bUOtTVKubgiGEEzFQXUyJikG7lhzjofv41acdxnoZdI6SkDaYmzy34JfmX16vNoVC7b5AUiEob3ZucbYM12639mfnTP67dNPbzk-GuGNChzr7zPvAi0_Uze6_gLsDudt5GMAVpVPAue4GDjpVk7VdchT-EbN6l42iyCGzVR7RwUKriC-Ay7i9jg9jfJNiOmFPb3GI01s4YJSmZiG6QNJm-BRk4uAhQVQpt0yknCVed3ND8s-Iif_MxSyvWzJ1-XL7L6UlPyQ3qRxtrBxx-Z69_fVNuwAl2501L7D7wUGP_YvJ3lXxiYkMo5Vrzohhkx-fGOcDmUO_JxuCDA/W7MvDs9Ta9zofwR-iDzQbNKCBdIgIQnG/7) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. clean_body: You’re one of America’s most informed seniors | | | | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat. | | | | STOP SOROS Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love. > We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys. This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system......to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us?? My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals! There are no two ways about it. George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law. We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.And we only have 20 months to do it. On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side. AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. Thank you for joining us in this fight for America. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, . body:
The GOP is getting CRUSHED by the Democrats right now

Friend,

The radical left is mobilizing their base, using every tool at their disposal to outspend and outmaneuver Trump Republicans. _**[This is a dire situation.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Xa8iU1tSIb8OPZnTc9UyFljTiv0AlK_DaWzqzZS2MGWoHw0G0Acgpa35kf97OM6c2xNQ0rBJBAB8sYbDRDPNvBX1g5Zj4YfBLjaIjxvYpd4ZQftT6pgGTRptTRLOduGGHsqaNQ2h1afUXzPYSZE1-FuaM3VooALecQ0nozSZEJNIYXLQQiO6xXvaL3jry8a6z3jlAnwdxxmtx_JJKDrcEkspDO7ZTq2OYzJszA3hd3p35TXYF3SP3qVUbXuJwiqZgAVHDEKYmnDspEg_5tkAi3Os0WUzAY65_rZI2YIMYcCiowq7qq6pzF6zFhKwyZmdSedJze1QNBkYyk7kN4uTjbxtyc6ohgyW_naxzKO2tsxqQ15cllnn9_OPp_wSMXjDFlbyiXMpLFib7CR30cp0qekBwVPx6vxF8fykwdKpxzhLWXsQvowyj23UK1fvQRmzGSDXO7tUXiJ87RAZLAvQHQjMFBEATPKS3Ys67ui_nZ1ebRgo3h20l5QpVijiJpgRU-YkrxSzFrutX2S1-jCLCKT4XSGKdxshkdUVXdG3V2F-oMSSfCMRVOLgLg/LgaoMoEsaoPd4A95I6oYgix4sOeIm0HU/7)**_

In order to win big in 2026, our team at the NRSC has created the first-ever **[Strategic Voter Engagement Survey,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/1KB1d3LFF_Lw9zapNqlGbyNGKJGSv7et25qQldOr3SYgXt_vU7eiJdyuqkjPUa4uzKuqQMqhMzgtYoSrF44mVODeGi6KmEq5f7ouHBxUXorW9II1-qbbPoguByDaXWrw-KT7Owiy9LGLfZPoHZetHjRiU7e5ukZvBd1e8zPfkVQmM1w62b4EnUxQVZNvsmg3X4dQQsPHi_FgV-0XWfi-Nv9DPgoowqDY6eqRh10cHEuYPMEDKHLCiXjQC_8W4LYyiUMuZiSQqQupIWkbZtkzxuvoW74tEsICTpMr9123xGGgdS8qczvccdm2qRSh-5JJs3Hyyod4LdQHPL57ZP1Si71dZHg33KSwcxTsN7gv4_fg_5wyLvBx_a3wI_5njRdW3Nq2E-fYiTLBKYldsn_XLlQblU5hg29EQdPznH-0L10MdT1zDOcgIqmRaN5sRiVlN43VMTNJuOjmrWc64l30WAYgt3duZSdod4eEDA6wsLPVcY-Rp9NRStzC0xR-sWqKae2sadxCeGfi4K_V5-bo6GcHMHPlPx2rEMYaKJEWl2zIjM9Wl-N67mKEGw/V-3T3JyiLljIsOfcBeelOn5lU8i6Gc6h/7)** a high-priority initiative to boost conservative enthusiasm and redirect our Party's priorities.

**[✅ Where we allocate resources

✅ How we mobilize Republican voters in key swing states

✅ What issues we emphasize to defeat the Radical Left](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/3btXQdfByuO7W-VypsyPBklJvwU3dXSJBjHKPpyS_CzvCpxCQaLyIQ3x5e8mv6MKcY3CsoN7u9urA0kFRGot7LhX_LKBDoa5hvk-4FQCsBo3YLr51_VPc_S7d_f629NKPUzxSoouDmOXO_OULY0MjcWR8BQd2MbPZeSO-AVOm55BJ_58bu5hpJ7sAJE7Thnc8nbiGbvw_4CCwwN31V4DebgTuuqEq1SWzx2zSQ2U_q8juv8N2ZZQLci1vT1kvKMz9SbPQ62sUIjsw2tiTxBn9kIerh0T8r9Cqr1rz6T3rhS0GcOs68cjzCju1pG5Vvp83BmfvoeeT5GsbSTFHUeQqFQfilruXZcQHM9cnpwIysd_ol6vf_cNc1zZo3kh-ofC--mTtq9esJCwqBYx5Wj3WVi_VHTMtJe-2alMHajHx5E0Y8PhhpG08fpoHJpdMbcC4Cw1Acuk5XN2UJvVcMgmtEoydF1TiYiTFPofYVcrWzIHThcRM8uNmzAx7lmTp2XrjcN3HS42bR_Ea-C5YAfucQalcqlHI7SkP96kBjiNbF66g36pTRrW2AW5Rw/Z-H1T4grVVF0Af-7fNv9l0601mGuYMGz/7)**

We cannot afford to get this wrong. Your participation is what separates victory from defeat, and we're counting on you to lead the GOP to success.

**[Fill out the Strategic Voter Engagement Survey NOW. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi on the Move!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/bigwinforfreedom-12848608?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, Mississippi was the second fastest growing state in the last quarter of 2024, according to new data from the US Bureau of Economic Analysis. **Output per person in the Magnolia state increased faster than any state besides Arkansas.**

One set of data might be a fluke, but then the previous quarterly data told a similar growth story. **We are starting to see a trend as Mississippi takes off economically.**
---
|
---
_Mississippi – the second fastest growing state in America._
| Mississippi’s been stuck at 50th out of 50 for so long, some struggle to believe we could be anywhere else. But here’s the kicker: our per capita GDP zipped past Britain’s in 2023 and is set to overtake Germany’s this year. **If the explosive growth from late 2024 keeps up, we’ll leapfrog several U.S. states in the next decade.** That “last place” label? It’s starting to peel off.
---
|
---
_Mississippi is now richer than most European countries, and is about to overtake Germany._
| **What’s behind this turnaround? Free market reforms—plain and simple.** Mississippi was held back by high taxes, stifling regulations, and cartels—especially the one under the Capitol dome in Jackson—calling the shots.

**A generation ago, Mississippi’s economic development strategy was to send long serving politicians to Washington DC to hustle for handouts.** If federal subsidies made a state rich, ours would have been the wealthiest state in the Union.

But today, we’re growing because bold leaders—backed by your support—are pushing pro-growth policies:

1. **Tax Cuts** : Since we started trimming the income tax to a flat 4% in 2022, the Mississippi Development Agency estimates there’s been a whopping $19 billion inward investment. Businesses are flocking here, confident that their payroll taxes will tumble.
2. **Flexible Labor Market** : Already an “at-will” employment state, Mississippi passed a little noticed law in 2021 to ease occupational licensing. Local boards are increasingly under pressure to reduce onerous red tape.
3. **Business-Friendly Planning** : While other states drown companies in approval processes, Mississippi rolls out the welcome mat.
4. **Cheap Energy** : Two new data centers are coming, and they’ll need oodles of electricity. Good thing Mississippi’s natural gas and nuclear keep our electricity cheap—around 13.43 cents per kWh versus California’s wallet-busting 34.26 cents. Affordable energy is turbocharging our growth.

---
|
---
_Reeves & White: Inward investment from pro-growth policies._
| **_Mississippi has only adopted pro-growth policies because a handful of bold conservative leaders have been prepared to fight for them._** Just three weeks ago, our Senate’s current leadership was maneuvering against income tax elimination.

**Imagine what we could achieve if the Senate was on board with free market reform? **We’re surrounded by states with school choice, but our Senate blocked even a modest public-to-public option. Healthcare’s tangled in “certificate of need” nonsense, and Senate leaders killed that fix too.

**Mississippi is on the rise, but we need to double down on pro-growth reforms, especially school choice.** Thank you for standing with us—together, we’re making Mississippi boom!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=19b0c433ca&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=f9f2679c35) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=f9f2679c35).

_Copyright © 2025 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1a898462f6614b869caa172adcec77d2&_e=VcqXD3afYn-Xy8csjUrT66mp1HW9EGPSDDK_bd04Ey3FvLNDxZas3z2VNOOy113bdd9Xz5sEwDyl7eueoQZZWsDz4kEOzp7eAeUhdNcf19GFeB1Wvpe3JKvn6y3kzocyacSDjb7Ra6MskzHebhjtk_ePQvjY-v-JUgA1hjxUdjVFwIfWsXy48drRn0lqwYoIshvyhOT87QlrGe-Ac9NCmGoIGxiDrnkKeHBtB4Pm1gozqd0X3iQpy_WUazEePd6FqWahPKfOBJjrYYEa7zLrW5RWuct-k65HCco8pRBBqso54KYyiNeIcXnHH-wvACMCVnmtfkLSYgZBn_WPRqUcVMzsnv_ctv8xZgm_fxCQ0IUmhXdREUn4gah9YvV7UqgptNWJY8AEBptaP11EWfuLxA%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1a898462f6614b869caa172adcec77d2&_e=VcqXD3afYn-Xy8csjUrT66mp1HW9EGPSDDK_bd04Ey3FvLNDxZas3z2VNOOy113bdd9Xz5sEwDyl7eueoQZZWsDz4kEOzp7eAeUhdNcf19GFeB1Wvpe3JKvn6y3kzocyacSDjb7Ra6MskzHebhjtk_ePQvjY-v-JUgA1hjxUdjVFwIfWsXy48drRn0lqwYoIshvyhOT87QlrGe-Ac9NCmGoIGxiDrnkKeHBtB4Pm1gozqd0X3iQpy_WUazEePd6FcOqIFsn2njvW_79tvkXLZL5HldSyaxXHQAlB8o9K_mCCVKt2101QZ7-21qj9m83Cs1LbZIjCSYQbPVXabwqvDioSU-sAOguj5FiwsKtJwhevmus9e6EOwBHo6K3FjHRq2CQQKpMsf-Djq1ZF3-J68w%3D%3D)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. subject: He sewed $100 into his underwear and made the leap.

body:
Have you ever wondered what it was like to grow up in a Communist, revolutionary hellhole? I don’t have to wonder.| | | Patriot, this is Senator Ted Cruz. This is a longer email – _**[but I can’t emphasize enough how important it is to read every word.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a55dbf24fe454ccf8f4fd329c5f31d4d&_e=HWKwXpzef4ipjxLQ1qm58hckDBZJqkDZXY2B2x41csU9D2TYJWrqyMNJtDO9rgjAuow-vnFjPRXZ---ir0dEg7Sx81zn1ciE3-tdzH2ZVF_NwxS92xyDoEs_0xnhkEDKy5dpCQswV6tgpF0Xv6RKwxhJgAv6ib91mpLPUGp2SyWkKa8Ox5PiijJKo_lP_971Vd3zpVAdRnvvUrc2rIkukrwC64KLKQvCMavlYWofe1GZqQuZzpHxD9Ds7tU02qdITCpw9dlRtay4t0Le8Whxa0dRcEgjrvytxjLULlrwRafiwtTGB31Uuvopdydb4SNUd8VIRNlmvOHP1EN_e0CG6Q%3D%3D)**_ Have you ever wondered what it was like to grow up in a Communist, revolutionary hellhole? Have you ever wondered what it’s like to be beaten and thrown in jail for disagreeing with your country’s leader? Have you ever wondered what it’s like to watch, helplessly as the country where your parents raised you is ripped apart at the seams by Communist insanity? **_I don’t have to wonder._** **_My dad, Rafael, lived it..._** And as I was growing up he explained every excruciating detail of what it was like when he was growing up in Cuba. Friend, we’re watching the same radical revolutionary playbook in America RIGHT now – **[and we’re running out of time to course-correct.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a55dbf24fe454ccf8f4fd329c5f31d4d&_e=HWKwXpzef4ipjxLQ1qm58hckDBZJqkDZXY2B2x41csU9D2TYJWrqyMNJtDO9rgjAuow-vnFjPRXZ---ir0dEg7Sx81zn1ciE3-tdzH2ZVF_NwxS92xyDoEs_0xnhkEDKy5dpCQswV6tgpF0Xv6RKwxhJgAv6ib91mpLPUGp2SyWkKa8Ox5PiijJKo_lP_971T0SjGHb9pAyZVcACpAhVPFJE_Lf89RBKGmL-D07UiR7sH_Qe4RGSs1vU3XOtM03dsO_RvZr1m92CzQgn-geUUPvDYt8rkr0oi_6wcF_Fj4DRniOf47s3WZj6SMQ81kruaK2KVlrr_YVK9JEeoZcU3g%3D%3D)** Rafael Cruz was beaten and thrown in prison. He was so desperate to escape he sowed $100 into his underwear and fled. **_THIS is how the Communist revolution happened in Cuba._** First, radical revolutionaries take TOTAL control over the classroom. They write the textbooks. They craft the lessons. They silence diversity of opinions. And they teach children that the country their parents inherited is EVIL, unjust, and must be destroyed. Then, they separate children from their parents. They attack parental rights. They tell children to REPORT their parents for beliefs that go against the regime. They demand that children abandon the beliefs and traditions of their parents. **_They know that the only way they can push their insane ideology is to isolate and target the most impressionable and vulnerable minds._** And finally, when they’ve run their propaganda campaign across an entire generation of students – they flip the switch and bring down the hammer. All hope is lost. Does that sound frighteningly familiar? It should. It’s happening right under our noses, in plain sight for the world to see. [No one has stood up to STOP IT. **_**_Until now._**_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a55dbf24fe454ccf8f4fd329c5f31d4d&_e=HWKwXpzef4ipjxLQ1qm58hckDBZJqkDZXY2B2x41csU9D2TYJWrqyMNJtDO9rgjAuow-vnFjPRXZ---ir0dEg7Sx81zn1ciE3-tdzH2ZVF_NwxS92xyDoEs_0xnhkEDKy5dpCQswV6tgpF0Xv6RKwxhJgAv6ib91mpLPUGp2SyWkKa8Ox5PiijJKo_lP_971qehI5AyqEUFFsf3e-R0Xe0r1i5GTw1V2wtdSqPaOa9BkkQe8r9k1fQmYRfDTfg-12WI0ENb-qkAZhVF0aVR1WJXT6lmXC6r36Ey473ixPHh7mSdxuDflXeC04sEC5FJRYZPfcKgCv9gpuW_UKhjJ7g%3D%3D) **_THIS is how the radical leftist revolution is happening in America today._** Radical leftists have bankrolled the total infiltration and takeover of our schools. They’re separating children from their parents – schools are even required to lie to parents when it comes to things like Transgender operations and sexuality. Some schools have even instructed children to REPORT their parents if they aren’t supportive of their “gender identity.” They’re FORCING children to believe in extreme anti-America ideologies – teaching that America is unjust, evil, racist, and must be destroyed. And they’re on the verge of raising up the most RADICALLY left wing generation in American history. To prevent the TOTAL annihilation of our country – we MUST fight AND WIN in the battle for control over our schools. And, Friend, it all starts with our nation’s school boards. The radical left has spent decades and countless millions to infiltrate school boards and plant radical left wing curriculum in classrooms in blue, purple, and red states alike. **_[That’s why I am proud to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC – America’s MOST EFFECTIVE school board campaign organization.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a55dbf24fe454ccf8f4fd329c5f31d4d&_e=HWKwXpzef4ipjxLQ1qm58hckDBZJqkDZXY2B2x41csU9D2TYJWrqyMNJtDO9rgjAuow-vnFjPRXZ---ir0dEg7Sx81zn1ciE3-tdzH2ZVF_NwxS92xyDoEs_0xnhkEDKy5dpCQswV6tgpF0Xv6RKwxhJgAv6ib91mpLPUGp2SyWkKa8Ox5PiijJKo_lP_971sSF2gKNZHz0S_iSVTjbfdExF1Sf99yhb61ODKcRXjtMNEBJFLLEGHzM-ELtPxOVHS1BS7LehY_fyceEe5qKuctvj6em5_2sZ1ygx-s55gI0GA_y5bG05v47QibYs8EtjY35Bs19CwRdWL_6_uO2g6A%3D%3D)_** They were designed from the ground up to counter the left’s megadonors and REPLACE leftist activists on school boards across the country! _**And they’re doing an incredible job! The numbers speak for themselves.**_ 1776’s work has resulted in _**4.5 MILLION students saved from radical leftist leadership in their schools.**_ _**They’ve FIRED 250 leftist school board members and replaced them with brave Conservatives.**_ _**And this year, they’re going bigger than EVER before by endorsing, supporting, and campaigning for hundreds of Conservative school board candidates nationwide!**_ But 2025 is an odd year – literally and figuratively – Planned Parenthood is crawling out of the woodwork to use taxpayer dollars to fund leftist school board candidates... ... And while the radical left is losing in major elections they’re desperate to score wins at the local level where fewer people are paying attention. That is why the 1776 Project PAC’s work is so critical – the GOP has desperately needed an organization focused on the forgotten and overlooked races that make a MASSIVE impact on the lives of parents and students everywhere. **[So my one request for you today is this: Will you please send in a donation of ANY amount to the 1776 Project PAC?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a55dbf24fe454ccf8f4fd329c5f31d4d&_e=HWKwXpzef4ipjxLQ1qm58hckDBZJqkDZXY2B2x41csU9D2TYJWrqyMNJtDO9rgjAuow-vnFjPRXZ---ir0dEg7Sx81zn1ciE3-tdzH2ZVF_NwxS92xyDoEs_0xnhkEDKy5dpCQswV6tgpF0Xv6RKwxhJgAv6ib91mpLPUGp2SyWkKa8Ox5PiijJKo_lP_9713PamjTlyfuo16Ij10zn3yt4PdkI5jvmT71gwqN_M5o8hk62OwWSt1aHSb-WwZFH1XGrin8yMPM0C1fFqNzdjGy49hd10kechZDbtD_Xt9yjr8AMpZ_B3a719QH94HyTQcaFDmt-m9-oLtuTYRQiBAQ%3D%3D)** Thank you in advance for your consideration and for sending in support to 1776 Project PAC – _**one of the most critical organizations in America right now.**_ God bless you, Sen. Have you ever wondered what it’s like to be beaten and thrown in jail for disagreeing with your country’s leader? My dad, Rafael, lived it... And as I was growing up he explained every excruciating detail of what it was like when he was growing up in Cuba. Friend, we’re watching the same radical revolutionary playbook in America RIGHT now – Rafael Cruz was beaten and thrown in prison. They write the textbooks. They craft the lessons. They silence diversity of opinions. And they teach children that the country their parents inherited is EVIL, unjust, and must be destroyed. Then, they separate children from their parents. They attack parental rights. They tell children to REPORT their parents for beliefs that go against the regime. They demand that children abandon the beliefs and traditions of their parents. They know that the only way they can push their insane ideology is to isolate and target the most impressionable and vulnerable minds. And finally, when they’ve run their propaganda campaign across an entire generation of students – they flip the switch and bring down the hammer. All hope is lost. Does that sound frighteningly familiar? It should. It’s happening right under our noses, in plain sight for the world to see. THIS is how the radical leftist revolution is happening in America today. Radical leftists have bankrolled the total infiltration and takeover of our schools. They’re separating children from their parents – schools are even required to lie to parents when it comes to things like Transgender operations and sexuality. Some schools have even instructed children to REPORT their parents if they aren’t supportive of their “gender identity.” They’re FORCING children to believe in extreme anti-America ideologies – teaching that America is unjust, evil, racist, and must be destroyed. name: Leader Scalise
subject: We need to talk about Tuesday’s election…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we’ve worked so hard for. | |
---
| | | We need to**** talk about Tuesday's election...

First off, I want to personally welcome MAGA warriors Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine to our House Republican ranks. They will play an essential role in passing President Trump's agenda. _**[Now I need to level with you for a moment. That's why I'm coming to you with three pressing updates:](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bc7f1aaf953f4c17b0ff47732f5dd138&_e=yLOj80OepUqDy_gwnEDz1UHWZI8P_kVi99y2br2Y39x1O7R7SwJlo5wnj0NZ1uz_aGIdMUPSwF02XDjD8hh17R8P3aKaMx0EURF2eJKFDipktpb6rEhL9mpavSZ9PZdn9Y5TnXOQPNEA8mR1yiyi0ki8k62qvidzi6qF_nKQtfpUfHSEwbkZ8i-GO__qc9KyFD-zfInGXbzKOz6iW2LR70MDgS54fbSUJznI2jq3R-Z9jS_NdHHZ-9g29eucYeKdY0bn-NGyPmjawr_x3qgNZuldxSJ6pcCOAaCF-4Jla3JT00gQPNlFA6BhNDQK3tVcW7OD5EDYr-IQyQ77w75toushEsPXd-L0lxjEn3ER0K1wSj77xkE-Vyq2FkHNPuW9nqu6ss3RXqhhyAmBPAAHuA%3D%3D "Now I need to level with you for a moment. That’s why I’m coming to you with three pressing updates:")**_
1. We got shellacked in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - the Liberal outspent the Conservative candidate by DOUBLE
2. Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy - our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already
3. The Florida Special Elections were sobering - the Democrat in FL-06 outraised us TEN-TO-ONE

I'm not making a mountain out of a molehill here.

_President Trump 's entire legislative agenda comes to a SCREECHING HALT if this keeps happening._ We have the better ideas, we have the better candidates... but none of that matters if our message is drowned out by a wall of false and misleading Democrat attack ads.

We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we've worked so hard for.

So that's why I'm doing something I've never done before.

I'm setting up an emergency one-million-dollar fundraising blitz between now and the end of the week. I'll need your help to get there. It's an ambitious goal but I have faith in this team. **This will help send badly needed reinforcements to the key races in Wisconsin AND fortify our defenses in other must-win races too.**

**[All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of Tuesday's elections pitches in SOMETHING!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bc7f1aaf953f4c17b0ff47732f5dd138&_e=yLOj80OepUqDy_gwnEDz1UHWZI8P_kVi99y2br2Y39x1O7R7SwJlo5wnj0NZ1uz_aGIdMUPSwF02XDjD8hh17R8P3aKaMx0EURF2eJKFDipktpb6rEhL9mpavSZ9PZdn9Y5TnXOQPNEA8mR1yiyi0ki8k62qvidzi6qF_nKQtfpUfHSEwbkZ8i-GO__qc9KyFD-zfInGXbzKOz6iW2LR70MDgS54fbSUJznI2jq3R-Z9jS_NdHHZ-9g29eucYeKd6xdge9U4tzvj6wPrtM2CS-Rib8JdCMfiIjeSMaPrbfU20_XH8RonPM0xyKVpc7ZvKzWLVToUt7vO7qFROQtYMfUWeV2CWnQaBOQRrO0imUsxlira_HaW4ztumrclO8d0uJ2u5Bfz_jDFWVz7yNZfAg%3D%3D "All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of Tuesday’s elections pitches in SOMETHING!")**

---
Look:

If we let the Democrat Fundraising Machine keep outraising and outspending us, we're finished. It's over for our House Majority.

President Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda hangs in the balance so I'm not holding anything back._That 's why I'm personally asking for your support today._

Unfortunately, this can't wait until next year - it can't even wait until next week.

**[Tuesday was a wake-up call for our Conservative movement so we need to move right here and right now. Can you please save the day?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bc7f1aaf953f4c17b0ff47732f5dd138&_e=yLOj80OepUqDy_gwnEDz1UHWZI8P_kVi99y2br2Y39x1O7R7SwJlo5wnj0NZ1uz_aGIdMUPSwF02XDjD8hh17R8P3aKaMx0EURF2eJKFDipktpb6rEhL9mpavSZ9PZdn9Y5TnXOQPNEA8mR1yiyi0ki8k62qvidzi6qF_nKQtfpUfHSEwbkZ8i-GO__qc9KyFD-zfInGXbzKOz6iW2LR70MDgS54fbSUJznI2jq3R-Z9jS_NdHHZ-9g29eucYeKdQhpW9d8dSiZVjyy2R44Fw48kjd5ngGWmAz3GC9Wh7Q_8-2g6XMo6MGlYRtlXsfnJvL6f8Q61WiLp66tRNG6wSsWje86rwbzZDvXo11ntKrRxmpD4L3zu_dD4rigWPUEwX30QNxvLQuaQEk_0S-C9LQ%3D%3D "Tuesday was a wake-up call for our Conservative movement so we need to move right here and right now. Can you please save the day? ")**

I sincerely hope so.

Thanks for all you do,
- _Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

clean_body: We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we’ve worked so hard for. | | | | | We need to** talk about Tuesday's election... First off, I want to personally welcome MAGA warriors Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine to our House Republican ranks. They will play an essential role in passing President Trump's agenda. "Now I need to level with you for a moment. That’s why I’m coming to you with three pressing updates:" 1. We got shellacked in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - the Liberal outspent the Conservative candidate by DOUBLE 2. Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy - our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already 3. The Florida Special Elections were sobering - the Democrat in FL-06 outraised us TEN-TO-ONE I'm not making a mountain out of a molehill here. President Trump 's entire legislative agenda comes to a SCREECHING HALT if this keeps happening. We have the better ideas, we have the better candidates... but none of that matters if our message is drowned out by a wall of false and misleading Democrat attack ads. We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we've worked so hard for. So that's why I'm doing something I've never done before. I'm setting up an emergency one-million-dollar fundraising blitz between now and the end of the week. I'll need your help to get there. It's an ambitious goal but I have faith in this team. This will help send badly needed reinforcements to the key races in Wisconsin AND fortify our defenses in other must-win races too. "All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of Tuesday’s elections pitches in SOMETHING!" | | | "PITCH IN " | | | "PITCH IN " | | | "PITCH IN " | | | "PITCH IN " Look: If we let the Democrat Fundraising Machine keep outraising and outspending us, we're finished. It's over for our House Majority. President Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda hangs in the balance so I'm not holding anything back.That 's why I'm personally asking for your support today. Unfortunately, this can't wait until next year - it can't even wait until next week. "Tuesday was a wake-up call for our Conservative movement so we need to move right here and right now. Can you please save the day? " I sincerely hope so. Thanks for all you do, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey" so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003

## While Nazi Profiteers Get a Free Pass, the Left Burns Teslas
Civil disobedience practiced by the likes of Henry David Thoreau and Martin Luther King Jr. is one thing. Crimes against people or property for political ends are quite another. The latter risks return to the law of the jungle, a cure worse than the disease. name: Max, Fair Fight
subject: We can’t let this get buried in all the appalling Trump news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Trump has revealed his plan to try to end democracy. We’re fighting back. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105209920/537737456/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250405_f_TrumpEO_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGIxNGMyNy0yNDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ueHrdQukXTo8R4l9NIATxPT6E41opykCr8gAAYzmcU=&emci=4938e4fb-8d11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=78b14c27-2412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277)

| | Quick: name the worst things that Donald Trump did in the past month. It’s a hard question to answer, right? He’s doing so much, so fast to try to hurt working people, reward the rich, and tear down our democracy that it’s hard to keep track of it all. I’m constantly following the news cycle as Communications Director for Fair Fight, and I see how Trump and his MAGA allies flood the zone with attack after attack. It’s part of an intentional strategy to make us feel too overwhelmed to fight back. So we have to be intentional in our response. Here’s an idea: in this email, let’s drill down on one specific, deeply harmful thing he’s tried to do recently. Then let’s make sure more people are aware of it — maybe they missed it in all the deluge of destruction! And this is a big one, because our very democracy is at stake. **Last week, Trump signed an executive order that reads like a MAGA fever dream. It’s a lawless power grab to try to seize control of our elections and silence voters. It:**
* Requires Americans to show documents like passports or Real IDs that indicate citizenship status to use the federal voter registration form, even though many people don’t have or can’t access those documents — impacting at least 21 million Americans’ voter registrations, with Black, Latino, rural, low-income, and naturalized voters most impacted.
* Potentially could result in tossing out overseas and military ballots that were mailed on time and arrive after Election Day.
* Gives Elon Musk and his so-called Department of Government Efficiency the power to comb through state voter rolls. That’s right: an unelected oligarch with roots in apartheid South Africa would help decide who’s American enough to vote.
* And more.

We need to make sure more people know that free and fair elections are on the line with this executive order — we can’t let it get buried. And while Trump tries to distract us with chaos and disinformation, one of the best ways for us as individuals to push back is to share credible info online and in real life. Here are three stories for you to check out and share — on social media, in an email to a family member, on a local organizing listserv, wherever you can reach people! **Democracy Docket wrote about how voting rights leaders and experts like Fair Fight CEO Lauren Groh-Wargo are responding to this new piece of the MAGA anti-democracy agenda:[“Trump Anti-Voting Order Draws Furious Pushback.”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105209921/537737457/-408807117?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250405_f_TrumpEO_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGIxNGMyNy0yNDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ueHrdQukXTo8R4l9NIATxPT6E41opykCr8gAAYzmcU=&emci=4938e4fb-8d11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=78b14c27-2412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277) She issues a rallying cry that’s going to stick with me.** **I broke down Trump’s executive order in an op-ed for Zeteo.[Read it here: “The MAGA and Musk Fever Dream to End Democracy.”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105209923/537737458/1767357122?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250405_f_TrumpEO_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGIxNGMyNy0yNDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ueHrdQukXTo8R4l9NIATxPT6E41opykCr8gAAYzmcU=&emci=4938e4fb-8d11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=78b14c27-2412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277) I promise: it’s not doom-and-gloom, and it lays out how we can each fight back.** **You should also check out what Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock had to say about Trump’s attempted federal takeover of elections:** “When we were trying to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, we still left voting to the states...Republicans kept saying, ‘It’s a state issue.’ Now you’ve got the president reaching down from on high, clearly trying to set the table for whatever outcomes he wants.” **[Read more from Senator Warnock’s interview with Courier.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105209924/537737460/-931067975?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250405_f_TrumpEO_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGIxNGMyNy0yNDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ueHrdQukXTo8R4l9NIATxPT6E41opykCr8gAAYzmcU=&emci=4938e4fb-8d11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=78b14c27-2412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277) If you’ve got a conservative cousin who supports Trump but thinks states should make the rules on things like elections, they should see Senator Warnock’s argument! (By the way: every day, I’m proud that Fair Fight helped send this morally clear-eyed champion to the Senate.)** Share one, two, or all three of these pieces to help draw more attention to this threat. Thank you for helping to raise the alarm. And thank you for everything you do as a Fair Fight supporter to power this work. We’ll continue to expose the MAGA anti-democracy agenda, organize locally to defend the freedom to vote, and help elect voting rights champions up and down the ballot. As I wrote in my op-ed, autocracy thrives on isolation, so we all have to fight back, together. I’m really glad to have you by my side. It’s our democracy, and we’re gonna fight like hell to save it. Thank you, Max Communications Director
Fair Fight | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105209925/537737461/91564639?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250405_f_TrumpEO_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGIxNGMyNy0yNDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ueHrdQukXTo8R4l9NIATxPT6E41opykCr8gAAYzmcU=)

Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all.
