You should also check out what Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock had to say about Trump’s attempted federal takeover of elections: “When we were trying to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, we still left voting to the states...Republicans kept saying, ‘It’s a state issue.’ Now you’ve got the president reaching down from on high, clearly trying to set the table for whatever outcomes he wants.” If you’ve got a conservative cousin who supports Trump but thinks states should make the rules on things like elections, they should see Senator Warnock’s argument! (By the way: every day, I’m proud that Fair Fight helped send this morally clear-eyed champion to the Senate.) Share one, two, or all three of these pieces to help draw more attention to this threat. Thank you for helping to raise the alarm. And thank you for everything you do as a Fair Fight supporter to power this work. We’ll continue to expose the MAGA anti-democracy agenda, organize locally to defend the freedom to vote, and help elect voting rights champions up and down the ballot. As I wrote in my op-ed, autocracy thrives on isolation, so we all have to fight back, together. I’m really glad to have you by my side. It’s our democracy, and we’re gonna fight like hell to save it. Thank you, Max Communications Director Fair Fight | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please click . If you would like to no longer receive emails, please . | | Paid for by Fair Fight. Fairfight.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Update: Massive Action Today: HANDS OFF! Plus, Musk’s Defeat in WI, Tesla Takedown, New Endorsements, and MORE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Fight Trump & The Oligarchs | Grassroots Defeat Musk in
Wisconsin | Nationwide Action Today: Hands Off! | Tesla Takedown | Save
the Postal Service | New Endorsements! | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

Momentum is building. Hundreds of thousands of us are taking to the
streets and making ourselves heard.

We will NOT accept Authoritarian Capitalism and allow Trump and the
Oligarchs to privatize our government and plunder our tax dollars.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1011&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Get the sticker above and fund the fight to Stop Trump & the Oligarchs!

★ ★ ★

The Trump Regime is unleashing vicious attacks on crucial social programs,
vulnerable communities, our democracy, and the planet. It can feel
overwhelming, but we are not powerless — and we are not alone.

Our 2025 Plan is to mobilize a Citizen Army of grassroots activists to
fight back against Trump and the Oligarchs, seize the reins of the
Democratic Party from the corporate elite, and elect the next generation
of leaders in key down-ballot races across the country. Read about how
we’re carrying out our work below!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24421?t=1012&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]JOIN THE CITIZEN ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

BIG WIN IN WISCONSIN!

All eyes were on Wisconsin this week, where the grassroots rose up to
defeat Elon Musk, who thought he could buy the crucial State Supreme Court
seat.

Bernie rallied in the state, and Our Revolution made 180,000 calls and
texts to turn out the progressive vote and help elect Judge Susan
Crawford.

“Despite pouring over $20 million into this race, the world’s wealthiest
man failed to secure a conservative majority on the court,” Our Revolution
leader Joseph Geevarghese told [ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24691?t=1013&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]WisPolitics.com.

“This is a victory for abortion access and worker rights, and it’s a
critical referendum on Trump and Musk’s lawless agenda.”

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

ACTION TODAY — HANDS OFF!

Trump and Musk’s power grab must be stopped. That’s why Our Revolution is
joining hundreds of thousands of people across the country TODAY to tell
the Oligarchs, “Hands Off!”

We demand an end to the billionaire takeover and rampant corruption of the
Trump regime, and an end to slashing Medicaid, Social Security, and other
programs we rely on.

With more than 1000 actions nationwide, this will be the largest mass
protest since Jan. 20, and we will speak with one voice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24696?t=1014&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]FIND A HANDS-OFF EVENT NEAR YOU

★ ★ ★

The massive protests and rallies aren’t just about venting frustrations.
We’re mobilizing behind Bernie, AOC, and other leaders - not just to push
back - but to set out a powerful vision of what we’re fighting FOR.

Higher wages, worker rights, equal justice, good jobs, anti-corruption,
real democracy, healthcare, education, housing and more. This is what the
people support, and we’re building up leadership who will fight to
deliver.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24424?t=1015&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]GET THE GRASSROOTS ARMY STICKER

★ ★ ★

TESLA TAKEDOWN!

Last weekend, Our Revolution activists showed up in massive numbers for
Tesla Takedown actions nationwide.

We are keeping up the pressure on Elon Musk — and it’s working. Tesla’s
brand is becoming toxic as sales and stock prices take a huge hit.

Musk says he’ll be stepping away from government in the coming weeks.
Good!! But we know DOGE’s destruction and the corruption of the Oligarchs
isn’t going away.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24421?t=1016&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Connect with our Citizen Action Team to plug in with upcoming actions
and events to keep the pressure on Musk!

★ ★ ★

DEFENDING THE U.S. POSTAL SERVICE

Our Revolution recently joined with the American Postal Workers Union to
organize a powerful grassroots Day of Action against privatization
threats and attacks on collective bargaining.

From big cities like New York to small-towns in Iowa, thousands chanted
“The U.S. Mail Is Not for Sale” and vowed to oppose plans by the Trump
regime to dismantle the USPS.

As Mark Dimondstein, President of the APWU, told Our Revolution members at
a recent virtual town hall, “Privatization is a mathematical
equation—shifting public money to Wall Street investors for maximum
profit, not service,” Dimondstein said.

“The administration’s corporate coup is hollowing out essential services,
paving the way for billionaires to cash in while degrading workers'
rights.”

★ ★ ★

STOP TRUMP’S WAR ON WORKERS

While Donald Trump campaigned as a “worker champion,” he’s stripping union
rights away from federal workers, rolling back organizing reforms passed
by the National Labor Relations Board and gutting the US Department of
Labor.

Former Labor Secretary Julie Su, following up on her remarks at [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24425?t=1017&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Our
Revolution’s War on Workers Town Hall last month, authored a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24426?t=1018&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]new
Century Foundation report that describes how Trump’s draconian budget cuts
will give corporate bosses a greenlight to steal worker wages, violate
health and safety standards, and engage in unlawful discrimination.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22532?t=1019&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]TELL CONGRESS: FIGHT FOR WORKERS

★ ★ ★

DEFENDING TRANS CIVIL RIGHTS

On Monday — Transgender Day of Visibility — Our Revolution joined Public
Citizen, Indivisible and other allies to stand in solidarity with the
trans community as MAGA ramps up its attacks.

Our Revolution leader Joseph Geevarghese addressed the crowd on the
National Mall — alongside Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Summer
Lee, Lateefah Simon, Maxwell Frost and others — to demand the protection
of the civil rights of ALL people.

“The Republican strategy is to divide and distract Americans — to blame
our LGBT+, immigrants and other vulnerable groups for the challenges our
country faces while they pull the rug out from under working families,”
Joseph said.

★ ★ ★

PROTECTING PUBLIC MEDIA

Donald Trump just unleashed a chilling all-caps Twitter rant demanding
that NPR and PBS be eliminated because they’re "radical left monsters."

Trump’s tweet closely followed a new push by MAGA extremist Marjorie
Taylor Greene to use the imminent reconciliation bill to defund PBS and
NPR.

It’s hard to overstate the significance of this. The chief executive of
PBS recently said, “The future of a number of our stations across the
country will be in jeopardy if this funding is not continued.”

Why target them now? Because Trump and Greene know exactly what's at
stake: unbiased reporting and factual accountability are a massive threat
to the misinformation environment he thrives on.

This is about safeguarding the very foundations of an informed, educated,
and empowered public.

That’s why Our Revolution has been working tirelessly with our partners
Free Press, ACLU, and NABET-CWA to run attention-grabbing demonstrations,
channel enormous pressure onto Congress, and activate our Citizen Action
Team across the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24427?t=1020&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Add your name today: Tell Speaker Johnson and Congress that we won't
let Trump silence NPR and PBS.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

POWER-BUILDING IN ST. LOUIS!

Election Day is THIS Tuesday in St. Louis, Missouri — and we’re getting
out the vote to build on the progressive governing majority our movement
has helped elect in the city cycle after cycle!

All four of our endorsed candidates for the St. Louis Board of Alders will
be champions for higher wages, better housing, clean water, and more.

We’re excited to endorse Anne Schweitzer in Ward 1. Since her election in
2021, Anne has been a champion for raising wages, clean water, better
housing, safety and more.

In Ward 11, we’re backing Rebecca McCloud. With her focus on economic
development, mental health, and better food systems, Rebecca will be a
fighter for the people of St. Louis.

In Ward 7, Our Revolution supports Alisha Sonnier, who is dedicated to
youth and family empowerment, equitable development, and housing as a
human right.

And, in Ward 3, Shane Cohn has been a tireless advocate for our
neighborhoods, youth, and public safety for over 15 years. >From safer
streets to jobs to defending public resources, Shane gets results.

Our progressive bloc in St. Louis - led by Board of Alders President and
Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green - have already successfully pushed
initiatives for labor, wages, direct democracy, universal basic income and
more. Let’s keep it going!

★ ★ ★

BARBARA LEE FOR OAKLAND MAYOR!

Our Revolution is proud to be in Barbara Lee’s corner! Barbara is a close
ally and a lifelong leader in progressive politics — and now she’s running
for Mayor of Oakland, CA!

Barbara was the first black woman in Northern California elected to
Congress, where she has put it all on the line to push for peace, stand up
for poor and working people, and advocate for reproductive rights and so
much more.

Barbara Lee is fearless, and we want to see her bring her strength and
experience to the mayor’s seat!

★ ★ ★

TEXAS ENDORSEMENTS

After packing arenas across the Midwest, Colorado, and Texas — Bernie
called on our movement to turn that energy into electing the next
generation up and down the ballot.

That’s precisely what Bernie founded Our Revolution to do, and 2025 is a
big year for state and local elections to make our communities more
resilient under the Trump regime.

Here’s some of our latest endorsements — in Texas!

First up — our proud endorsement of Laura Cadena in the City Council race
in Dallas.

Laura served in City Hall for eight years and has a deep understanding of
how local government can work hand-in-hand with the community.

From cost of living and affordable housing to climate action and
sustainability, Laura is a champion on the issues that matter most. Now,
she’s running a people-powered campaign to make sure public money serves
the people of Dallas.

Also in Dallas, we’re happy to support Adam Bazaldua for re-election in
District 7.

Adam chaired the Dallas Green Alliance before being elected to the city
council in 2019, where he has served on committees for the environment,
workforce education and equity, economic development, and more.

Adam has brought bold leadership and a vision for progress to City Hall,
and now as Deputy Mayor Pro Tem. We know he will continue to fight
tirelessly for the people of Dallas.

★ ★ ★

In Fort Worth, we’re putting our support behind Chris Nettles in his run
for re-election to City Council in District 8.

Chris understands that local government must meet the needs of Fort
Worth’s growing population — working to expand public transportation,
increase affordable housing, and grow the number of good-paying jobs.

He’s also developed a 3-step plan to help the houseless population,
providing direct resources for health, skills training, and support for
long-term stability.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22535?t=1021&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]DONATE TO FUND OUR ELECTION WORK

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

The Democratic base is ANGRY. People want to see party leaders take action
and use their power to fight the Trump regime.

Instead, we’re seeing many Democrats at the highest levels CAVE to Trump —
many voting in Congress to confirm his cabinet members and pass the GOP
spending bill.

“Democratic incumbents should absolutely be worried about holding onto
power, because there’s a real energy right now against them,” Paco Fabián,
deputy director of Our Revolution, told the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24428?t=1022&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Associated Press. “And as
soon as somebody figures out how to harness it, they’re going to be in
deep trouble.”

After Schumer and 9 Senate Dems gave Trump the votes he needed for the GOP
spending bill, we asked 9,000 Our Revolution supporters what you thought:

• 99% want Dems to fight Trump & Musk more.

•88% think Schumer should step aside or be ousted as Senate Minority
Leader, AND 86% would support a primary challenger against him

•83% would support primaries against all 10 senators who voted for the GOP
spending bill.

Thousands commented, expressing “anger, betrayal, disgust, embarrassment.”
We heard from people of all ages and backgrounds saying they felt “wildly
frustrated and defeated” or stating that “the direction of the Democratic
Party has been a disaster.”

One man told us: "I'm in shock” and asked, “Why do they do this to us?”
One woman described the party as "weak, unorganized, lost.” Another just
wrote a single word: “Cowardice.”

Our Revolution is working from the inside and outside to Transform the
Party. We’ve been getting strong progressives into top party positions —
and we’re organizing NOW to elect the next generation into office now
through the midterms. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22535?t=1023&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Chip in to help power this effort!

★ ★ ★

As the new president of the Association of State Democratic Committees,
Our Revolution board member Jane Kleeb is shaking up Democratic Party
strategy with a bold rural-first reform agenda.

“We’re listening to our members,” Jane said in an interview with [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24429?t=1024&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Barn
Raiser, emphasizing direct communication with state parties and grassroots
voices long sidelined.

Her approach centers on voter engagement and local empowerment—hallmarks
of her success as Nebraska Party Chair, where she doubled the number of
elected Democrats through innovative programs like the Block Captain
model.

“Democrats don’t have local elected official lists in many states. That is
a priority for me,” she declares, underscoring her mission to rebuild the
party from the county up, not the Beltway down. Her goal: a party rooted
in community, ready to organize and win in every zip code.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution Massachusetts is working with the AFL-CIO to elect
delegates committed to a working-class agenda and win much-needed party
reforms.

Every major analysis of the November 2024 election agrees that the
defection of working-class voters from the Democratic Party explains the
disappointing results. This was true in Massachusetts as well.

The Mass AFL-CIO recently asked union members to attend their local
Democratic caucus meetings and run for delegates to the Mass Dems
convention in September.

Mass AFL-CIO hopes a strong turnout of union members and supporters at the
convention will win support for its 2025 Legislative Priorities and a new
RaiseUp initiative to combat offshore tax dodging and make billionaire
global corporations pay their fair share!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24690?t=1025&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Let us know if you plan to attend your Democratic caucus and if you
are interested in running for delegate.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is 57,000 activists strong and
growing! We’re taking action in the streets and in the halls of power to
stop the worst of the Trump regime and fight for our values.

Our grassroots army is mobilizing and mounting pressure campaigns to
protect Medicaid, Social Security, the Postal Service, public media, the
EPA, worker rights, and so much more.

There’s something everyone can do to help, big or small. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20584?t=1026&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Sign up to be
part of the Citizen Action Team, and we’ll loop you in on our next
meeting!

★ ★ ★

Hundreds of thousands of us are taking to the streets to tell Trump and
Musk: “Hands Off!” With more than 1,000 actions nationwide, we hope you’ll
join us. Most actions kick off at noon local time!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24696?t=1027&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]FIND A HANDS-OFF EVENT NEAR YOU

★ ★ ★

As Bernie and AOC draw massive crowds in his Fight Oligarchy Tour coast to
coast, our Citizen Action Team is organizing thousands of activists in
D.C. and across the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19903?t=1028&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]When you pick up this new sticker and other great merch in the Our
Revolution store, you’re helping to power our actions and pressure
campaigns to block the worst of the Trump agenda. Thank you.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17429?t=1029&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=revreport._Ro8z9&t=1007&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport.T4WXik&t=1008&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport.Wps0N4&t=1009&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=revreport.HCFlph&t=1010&akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=8063%2E5885482%2ESQJxXp

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

Barbara is a close ally and a lifelong leader in progressive politics — and now she’s running for Mayor of Oakland, CA! Barbara was the first black woman in Northern California elected to Congress, where she has put it all on the line to push for peace, stand up for poor and working people, and advocate for reproductive rights and so much more. Barbara Lee is fearless, and we want to see her bring her strength and experience to the mayor’s seat! ★ ★ ★ TEXAS ENDORSEMENTS After packing arenas across the Midwest, Colorado, and Texas — Bernie called on our movement to turn that energy into electing the next generation up and down the ballot. That’s precisely what Bernie founded Our Revolution to do, and 2025 is a big year for state and local elections to make our communities more resilient under the Trump regime. Here’s some of our latest endorsements — in Texas! First up — our proud endorsement of Laura Cadena in the City Council race in Dallas. Laura served in City Hall for eight years and has a deep understanding of how local government can work hand-in-hand with the community. From cost of living and affordable housing to climate action and sustainability, Laura is a champion on the issues that matter most. Now, she’s running a people-powered campaign to make sure public money serves the people of Dallas. Also in Dallas, we’re happy to support Adam Bazaldua for re-election in District 7. Adam chaired the Dallas Green Alliance before being elected to the city council in 2019, where he has served on committees for the environment, workforce education and equity, economic development, and more. Adam has brought bold leadership and a vision for progress to City Hall, and now as Deputy Mayor Pro Tem. We know he will continue to fight tirelessly for the people of Dallas. ★ ★ ★ In Fort Worth, we’re putting our support behind Chris Nettles in his run for re-election to City Council in District 8. Chris understands that local government must meet the needs of Fort Worth’s growing population — working to expand public transportation, increase affordable housing, and grow the number of good-paying jobs. He’s also developed a 3-step plan to help the houseless population, providing direct resources for health, skills training, and support for long-term stability. [ ]DONATE TO FUND OUR ELECTION WORK ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ The Democratic base is ANGRY. People want to see party leaders take action and use their power to fight the Trump regime. Instead, we’re seeing many Democrats at the highest levels CAVE to Trump — many voting in Congress to confirm his cabinet members and pass the GOP spending bill. “Democratic incumbents should absolutely be worried about holding onto power, because there’s a real energy right now against them,” Paco Fabián, deputy director of Our Revolution, told the [ ]Associated Press. “And as soon as somebody figures out how to harness it, they’re going to be in deep trouble.” After Schumer and 9 Senate Dems gave Trump the votes he needed for the GOP spending bill, we asked 9,000 Our Revolution supporters what you thought: • 99% want Dems to fight Trump & Musk more. •88% think Schumer should step aside or be ousted as Senate Minority Leader, AND 86% would support a primary challenger against him •83% would support primaries against all 10 senators who voted for the GOP spending bill. Thousands commented, expressing “anger, betrayal, disgust, embarrassment.” We heard from people of all ages and backgrounds saying they felt “wildly frustrated and defeated” or stating that “the direction of the Democratic Party has been a disaster.” One man told us: "I'm in shock” and asked, “Why do they do this to us?” One woman described the party as "weak, unorganized, lost.” Another just wrote a single word: “Cowardice.” Our Revolution is working from the inside and outside to Transform the Party. We’ve been getting strong progressives into top party positions — and we’re organizing NOW to elect the next generation into office now through the midterms. [ ]Chip in to help power this effort! ★ ★ ★ As the new president of the Association of State Democratic Committees, Our Revolution board member Jane Kleeb is shaking up Democratic Party strategy with a bold rural-first reform agenda. “We’re listening to our members,” Jane said in an interview with [ ]Barn Raiser, emphasizing direct communication with state parties and grassroots voices long sidelined. Her approach centers on voter engagement and local empowerment—hallmarks of her success as Nebraska Party Chair, where she doubled the number of elected Democrats through innovative programs like the Block Captain model. “Democrats don’t have local elected official lists in many states. That is a priority for me,” she declares, underscoring her mission to rebuild the party from the county up, not the Beltway down. Her goal: a party rooted in community, ready to organize and win in every zip code. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution Massachusetts is working with the AFL-CIO to elect delegates committed to a working-class agenda and win much-needed party reforms. Every major analysis of the November 2024 election agrees that the defection of working-class voters from the Democratic Party explains the disappointing results. This was true in Massachusetts as well. The Mass AFL-CIO recently asked union members to attend their local Democratic caucus meetings and run for delegates to the Mass Dems convention in September. Mass AFL-CIO hopes a strong turnout of union members and supporters at the convention will win support for its 2025 Legislative Priorities and a new RaiseUp initiative to combat offshore tax dodging and make billionaire global corporations pay their fair share! [ ]Let us know if you plan to attend your Democratic caucus and if you are interested in running for delegate. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is 57,000 activists strong and growing! We’re taking action in the streets and in the halls of power to stop the worst of the Trump regime and fight for our values. Our grassroots army is mobilizing and mounting pressure campaigns to protect Medicaid, Social Security, the Postal Service, public media, the EPA, worker rights, and so much more. There’s something everyone can do to help, big or small. [ ]Sign up to be part of the Citizen Action Team, and we’ll loop you in on our next meeting! ★ ★ ★ Hundreds of thousands of us are taking to the streets to tell Trump and Musk: “Hands Off!” With more than 1,000 actions nationwide, we hope you’ll join us. Most actions kick off at noon local time! [ ]FIND A HANDS-OFF EVENT NEAR YOU ★ ★ ★ As Bernie and AOC draw massive crowds in his Fight Oligarchy Tour coast to coast, our Citizen Action Team is organizing thousands of activists in D.C. and across the country. [ ]When you pick up this new sticker and other great merch in the Our Revolution store, you’re helping to power our actions and pressure campaigns to block the worst of the Trump agenda. Thank you. ★ ★ ★ [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

subject: Real momentum

body:

#

This week brought some much-needed good news for Democrats, team. Let’s recap:
* **Democrat Susan Crawford won her race in Wisconsin on Tuesday.** Despite the $25 million dark money donors spent against her, democracy won. _Thanks in part to the efforts of this grassroots team_ , Wisconsin voters made a decisive choice and proved to the world they can’t be bought.
* **Senator Cory Booker stood strong in support of our rights in freedoms in a record-breaking speech.** He spoke for more than 25 hours straight on the Senate floor, sharing stories of constituents and even Michiganders impacted by deep cuts to government programs and protesting the Trump administration’s shameful treatment of immigrants.
* **Democrats made strong inroads in two deep-red districts in Tuesday’s special elections in Florida.** The results of the election showed big Democratic turnout, _cutting the Republican advantage in those districts in half._ Voters are rejecting the GOP’s extremist agenda.

Democrats are gaining real momentum, and that has Republicans worried. We can’t slow down now. We’ve got to keep organizing, keep building, and keep moving forward — because our communities deserve better. And we’re going to keep fighting like hell for them. Donald Trump wants to divide us. He wants to overwhelm us and make us feel powerless.**But this week proved that when we come together, we can win. ** [_**We’re working around the clock to elect Democrats who will fight like hell for working families and our fundamental freedoms, and we’re funded by donations from people just like you. name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=49a37692b720430e9fb6299d3f41ce88&_e=O5Un7ykFYeeT048QEIA__5wi6iPA_wJqV_5XgyajEMDD02FnN_r7nAzhmBF9VZmUF3uz3U8NETvahuMeODR3qKRFIHXGblLEexvqIBWGUB-7qZSsaW6SMiha9YR_9NKu9DXCJiIvn8qqBtuc_XcBLb7czbN8hiAEpl3vtqKF0FO0O1lRnSt-Evky3tVnb6zho50fJ5wgJ8ICVxtdQo7aBh9nkqps0tG53Fb_oOIDc5EmHRX3JTH-B9nT0P52FAZ1LXeUtm1CVVB_pTwY5io_Z7Glxy-o5_4Vljxz6QDA9irgQF_QW2ix4d_Gc6dQpZoLFsw0L04xFdGTWLd4xtFLK-EbubWoQ0GMVH0v6cjHtBm7aoXQmW7K7M9rM5e4I46RPjNZQWQua656oLwrB-z5PmZ2hQNhsZUyuxz2mlySwF0dYZ67h6zjxHR6NsS6eQog)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=49a37692b720430e9fb6299d3f41ce88&_e=O5Un7ykFYeeT048QEIA__5wi6iPA_wJqV_5XgyajEMDD02FnN_r7nAzhmBF9VZmUF3uz3U8NETvahuMeODR3qKRFIHXGblLEexvqIBWGUB-7qZSsaW6SMiha9YR_9NKu9DXCJiIvn8qqBtuc_XcBLb7czbN8hiAEpl3vtqKF0FO0O1lRnSt-Evky3tVnb6zho50fJ5wgJ8ICVxtdQo7aBh9nkqps0tG53Fb_oOIDc5EmHRX3JTH-B9nT0P52FAZ1LXeUtm1CVVB_pTwY5io_Zz7l7hH4K0SeZaZNh1Ta3g6IZ0U1ILdAZq9_buuEmcSUjCPZKNUlmk73rLRxnHopvT1tv-OYZgj00W4odd0zb6DOJc7FitomIQgUZcWOiMAUTE44Tn4OM2QQXoZWc1c9o0qiJ9QXPo0Elc3SnSq5DbhFAL_5dH2pjQHFJayekpdj)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=49a37692b720430e9fb6299d3f41ce88&_e=O5Un7ykFYeeT048QEIA__5wi6iPA_wJqV_5XgyajEMDD02FnN_r7nAzhmBF9VZmUF3uz3U8NETvahuMeODR3qKRFIHXGblLEexvqIBWGUB-7qZSsaW6SMiha9YR_9NKu9DXCJiIvn8qqBtuc_XcBLb7czbN8hiAEpl3vtqKF0FO0O1lRnSt-Evky3tVnb6zho50fJ5wgJ8ICVxtdQo7aBh9nkqps0tG53Fb_oOIDc5EmHRX3JTH-B9nT0P52FAZ1LXeUtm1CVVB_pTwY5io_Z1AVf1B5hpC7P1syF4LcXtRf-X3qIZbrQeD258Zsf_gz3p3eimqp62Np9l8xjQ_1CeAJ9ONJEVxY5oezVmPMN36bNAarHREvczeda5EvR1hkCMSOSJChN7zVxpWrftvjs0DiLsKq4yjcvmn6JEXb_U9wwSuH0bdoZd3JPcpmM2mL)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=49a37692b720430e9fb6299d3f41ce88&_e=O5Un7ykFYeeT048QEIA__5wi6iPA_wJqV_5XgyajEMDD02FnN_r7nAzhmBF9VZmUF3uz3U8NETvahuMeODR3qKRFIHXGblLEexvqIBWGUB-7qZSsaW6SMiha9YR_9NKu9DXCJiIvn8qqBtuc_XcBLb7czbN8hiAEpl3vtqKF0FO0O1lRnSt-Evky3tVnb6zho50fJ5wgJ8ICVxtdQo7aBh9nkqps0tG53Fb_oOIDc5EmHRX3JTH-B9nT0P52FAZ1LXeUtm1CVVB_pTwY5io_Z7yGk_gNLfzI0As8VWZdsPInje4Xjf-4maMfqHpqNcPRDZb0r0JsGJfT097slC2ERaj2yFN-9aF7NMQ1fwPY3l_bfdwQPYPILWJNFk-THrNCOPNugeb2K_Aelck6dGT6_iNOLTKyBjw_6J6-mGU9n581yoRwmYSHRSQoMtWuof8G).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=49a37692b720430e9fb6299d3f41ce88&_t=BuytlnxA77OfkhbiFxv0WyDFGsa2cDCMGvYMzbTTNuf-T4dUAAg-Wbdf5_Q6GeJ1ksTUW-r90rxuAHTGljN-Ct1hkZ1rxbXgpUGuTn5RTG-jShjd1EmwF81PaJD7kpRp)

name: Navigating Uncertainty (by Vikram Mansharamani)
subject: College Selection Anxiety?
body:
Don't Stress. It probably doesn't matter.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..Vzc7ljeEae2TJllHK31wG0r2nZFSYTkNc7pHwx2lCNQ?) for more

# [College Selection Anxiety?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=160600020&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNjAwMDIwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM4NjE5MTgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjQ1MzkxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7yLNyFD5NpMLkzKeGAGuHGiBI3QW81lsCODVCZAxNsM)
### Don't Stress. It probably doesn't matter.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Apr 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=160600020&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNjAwMDIwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0Mzg2MTkxOCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2NDUzOTE4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uaz70uWLlHSOiIQCaRtJCkO5OcvfGNL936I0WUVIXW4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/28916df9-2c3f-4686-b611-330347441d09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As the weather changes, there is a palpable anticipation in the air. No, I am not talking about spring break or Easter, but rather the time of year when high school seniors--and their parents--torment themselves with a decision that some believe will set the trajectory of their lives._It 's time to decide on which college to attend. _Some students are lucky enough to have been accepted by their top choice while others are deciding among several options. Others are balancing affordability and geography, obtaining vocational or technical training, or forgoing further education to start working.
I recall struggling with this decision myself, back in a time before email or cell phones, social media or even the internet--a time today's generation may equate with the Dark Ages. The anxiety and pressure were immense: at the age of 18, I was being asked to make a decision that would impact the rest of my life, or so I was led to believe. It would determine my life experiences, my life-long friends, my spouse, my career path, how much money I would make, the opportunities I would encounter, and even the life trajectory and opportunity set that my children might one day have.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gn_tmeBqLX4Qyq6Sxxi5ANIgro9wQn8DsS0QulLE6Pw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160600020)
It's been more than three decades since I decided to attend Yale. Over that time, I've gotten to know admissions officers at leading colleges, taught hundreds of undergraduate students, spent almost twenty years as an alumni interviewer, and visited dozens of campuses. And here's what I now know about the decision: _it probably didn 't matter_. Sure, it gave me experiences that impacted other experiences and introduced me to people who introduced me to others. So, it clearly influenced my life. But if I hadn't gone to Yale, I suspect I'd still have friends, I'd still have a career, and I'd still have a rich set of life experiences. Yes, they'd be different, but it's impossible to know if they would have been better or worse.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9c0d55a-c97a-4e9b-a1a0-53cf43bf173b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Nathan Dumlao](https://substack.com/redirect/95ae8635-892e-480e-b041-17ef18f94565?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/313a3234-6b98-4d8f-8e4f-db05ecfbf049?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Further, it's unclear that a college choice has any direct impact on "success" (however you define it). You see, I've had the opportunity to travel the world and meet some of the most successful people from all walks of life: doctors in South America, entrepreneurs in Asia, academics in Africa, politicians in the Middle East, and military professionals in Europe, among others. Even in America I've met billionaire ranchers, Nobel Prize-winning economists, successful entrepreneurs, decorated military leaders, and life-saving doctors. Surely such a breadth of exposure would point to some consistent characteristic necessary for success.
**What matters more than where you go is what you do once there.**
It doesn't. Sure, career counselors, business book writers, and motivational speakers may come up with a bucket of common traits and a pithy name for it, but my experience suggests otherwise. The most accomplished people I know include high school dropouts, community college graduates, college dropouts, college graduates, and those with piles of degrees. I've seen Harvard graduates struggle and community college graduates succeed. It seems to me that **what matters more than where you go is what you do once there**. That has always been - and still is - the story of America.
So, here's my advice to those struggling with a college decision: write the names of the schools you're considering on different notecards. Put them into a hat. Pull one out and send in your enrollment forms. Stop stressing about doors you may be closing and start thinking about what you might do when you go through the door you opened. Forget about where you'll be and focus on what you'll do. Because ultimately, life, like college, is about opportunities and what we make of them.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gn_tmeBqLX4Qyq6Sxxi5ANIgro9wQn8DsS0QulLE6Pw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160600020)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=160600020&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNjAwMDIwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM4NjE5MTgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjQ1MzkxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7yLNyFD5NpMLkzKeGAGuHGiBI3QW81lsCODVCZAxNsM)
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=160600020&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNjAwMDIwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM4NjE5MTgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjQ1MzkxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7yLNyFD5NpMLkzKeGAGuHGiBI3QW81lsCODVCZAxNsM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)

---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/ab7afb01-6e4c-4f18-a2aa-dd0bb46571e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/ee703481-3b6e-4b9b-903f-9f51ef55eae7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/a2394272-6ab8-4f48-82dc-59223df8f71c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/3d68ff30-1350-415d-88ef-83f6a3696bc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). name: Marina Jenkins, All On The Line
subject: What I heard at the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Thank you for following along with this series of updates and fighting for a truly representative democracy.
|
---

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105214377/537752822/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OTDLA6_email_20250405-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA6-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250405-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA6-MJ_&utm_campaign=OTDLA6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2YjIzZDQzLTI2MTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xKCYLeXdWMd9c5hgYJribMy288ELSiBCdPOKY30WTeM=)
---
Peter,
First of all, thank you for everything you do to fight for fair representation in our democracy. And thank you for following along with our updates on a critical redistricting case in front of the Supreme Court right now:_Louisiana v. Callais_.
In case you need a reminder of what’s at stake: anti-democracy extremists are attempting to undo Louisiana’s new, fair congressional map. If the map is overturned, it would once again diminish the rightful voting power of Black Louisianans. And the outcome of this case could undermine the Voting Rights Act (VRA), which would have broad implications for maps across the country.
**I attended the oral argument at the Supreme Court, and I know that the fair maps movement has made a rock-solid case for upholding Louisiana’s two Black opportunity districts.**
As Justice Elena Kagan noted during the argument, _three_ different courts — comprised of _seven_ federal judges — have all agreed that Louisiana should have two Black opportunity districts in accordance with the VRA. Peter, it’s clear: Louisiana’s VRA-compliant map — which Louisianans have fought so hard for — must stand. The Supreme Court must follow its own recent precedent on this issue, as it upheld the VRA less than two years ago. And extremists cannot be allowed to gerrymander at the expense of the people.
**Over the next few months, while we wait for the Supreme Court’s ruling, the All On the Line campaign will continue mobilizing grassroots supporters to protect fair maps, voting rights, and fair representation across the country.**
**We must do everything we can to defend our democracy as extremists try to undo our progress through court cases like these.**
People like you are at the heart of our movement for a truly representative democracy. We’ll keep you posted on the outcome of this case and what comes next.
Thank you,
Marina
Marina Jenkins
Executive Director, All On The Line

This week I finally received a copy of LD 1432, An Act to Remove Consideration of Gender Identity from the Maine Human Rights Act. As written, the Maine Human Rights Act infringes on well over 99% of Maine's population, forcing us to kneel at the alter of a made-up, woke fantasy.
I'm reaching out to trusted, grassroots supporters who are willing to stand up for girls in sports across our state. I've met many of you this session, and will be working hard each and every day to bring your voices to the State House.
Please take a few seconds to sign on to my bill (link below) as a citizen co-sponsor today, and I would be grateful if you could forward it along to your friends. We're in this fight together, and I'm so proud to have your support.
Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73

# USDA announces pause on federal funding for Maine educational programs

AUGUSTA, Maine (WABI) - The U.S. Department of Agriculture announced on Wednesday that federal funding for certain Maine educational programs has been paused.
In a statement, the USDA says a letter has been sent to Governor Mills announcing the pause and that federal funding received from the department will continue to be reviewed.
The USDA says the pause on funding is due to the state's violation of Title IX. [Read More >>](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yI55B2ga09T3Myf4tHsqBrc6INUAEMuDDiNetwa9Yuwy46h0KbSWDw9PVKycBVvuQt-McixgRxwjgzGJXt0qr4oUwcz-k-fh9ZatEcbqA2Q9J_bv0g72v9e6r63Jo6dOwJfTOgFeFLM838wWHrad-xIXHn0mWCjO4UB3Ui4lKtPBVbztDhsNyO7Ho5XO_YYr4Lw7Uz27o-l7pE1hlQ4rcWluVoIrSELBfCJh-VVHiLrReK2YvwCIjL9ZSB4lSHP7yBF-cz1n0CLUdZVGxt-8o0x_v6o5n8NLd2V-d9wbhITUkZb7fdzS6Pm9GPsx3OPz7ld6nhL9Zn1pUNu0DgeR7Q==&c=S6OOdcIJJczu98VTaWID49QaoJDwDaJSBk3ItqbknmrM8cPccqkPag==&ch=ILUQwJckxifx74nAXmCiBda61hbYcl6UNOyv1yiFb8XopKMEuFY1Lg==)

# CNN Poll: Democratic Party's favorability drops to a record low

The Democratic Party's favorability rating among Americans stands at a record low, according to a new CNN poll [conducted](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yI55B2ga09T3Myf4tHsqBrc6INUAEMuDDiNetwa9Yuwy46h0KbSWDw9PVKycBVvuSgNsren3UTFfqqbCEIxXtHrCyxLGvI-Ju9JZSbXX5dcKHUQYzIvO7BSzCduzyWRjMBAmvYWGINYq2szGRwUZ9QJOfo9FUC38rDwC7uRz9jIHNkOBkJCkVxvvvn_rq29BQiClbx6VxOPJQl7WmX7uM9laNXEZHZxFpy9u7HW6DsI=&c=S6OOdcIJJczu98VTaWID49QaoJDwDaJSBk3ItqbknmrM8cPccqkPag==&ch=ILUQwJckxifx74nAXmCiBda61hbYcl6UNOyv1yiFb8XopKMEuFY1Lg==) by SSRS, fueled in part by dimming views from its own frustrated supporters.
With many in the party saying publicly that their leaders should do more to stand up to President Donald Trump, Democrats and Democratic-aligned independents say, 57% to 42%, that Democrats should mainly work to stop the Republican agenda, rather than working with the GOP majority to get some Democratic ideas into legislation. [Read More >>](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yI55B2ga09T3Myf4tHsqBrc6INUAEMuDDiNetwa9Yuwy46h0KbSWDw9PVKycBVvuAVVzJ7KX3-zNrJciQ0EXULe8InBhMIpoyFBQAPzZN-I8segLQx0ue044spvQC5xmBnW7nqNqvkwqGK4IRM_TWJKlY2UODHqEpSGeE6nhkuP0E_BTHECXr0lOeaEuNQMcjBTnNBjhFVwXz8u-6hnQFeUvutIlSkFn&c=S6OOdcIJJczu98VTaWID49QaoJDwDaJSBk3ItqbknmrM8cPccqkPag==&ch=ILUQwJckxifx74nAXmCiBda61hbYcl6UNOyv1yiFb8XopKMEuFY1Lg==)

| |

# Gov. Mills side steps trans athletes question, says Trump is not the rule of law

AUGUSTA, Maine (WGME) -- Maine Governor Janet Mills was less than keen to share her thoughts on whether transgender athletes should be allowed to play in girls' sports.
"I'm not going to talk about the transgender thing if that's what you're asking about. This isn't about that. This is about the rule of law pure and simple. When any president or chief executive stands there and says to you, 'I am the law.' Well, you and I know that is not so. You can't issue by whole cloth by issuing an executive order by issuing a tweet or press release, that is not what our Constitution says," Mills said.
In addition to the sports issues, the Trump administration is now investigating Maine schools for allegedly withholding students' gender preferences from parents, which they claim violates federal law.

clean_body: Looking for Citizen Co-Sponsors! | | | | | == | | This week I finally received a copy of LD 1432, An Act to Remove Consideration of Gender Identity from the Maine Human Rights Act. As written, the Maine Human Rights Act infringes on well over 99% of Maine's population, forcing us to kneel at the alter of a made-up, woke fantasy. I'm reaching out to trusted, grassroots supporters who are willing to stand up for girls in sports across our state. I've met many of you this session, and will be working hard each and every day to bring your voices to the State House. Please take a few seconds to sign on to my bill (link below) as a citizen co-sponsor today, and I would be grateful if you could forward it along to your friends. We're in this fight together, and I'm so proud to have your support. Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73 | | == | WVOM This Week I had a chance to join WVOM at the beginning of the week to discuss LD 1432 and the impact which inaction could have on our state. It's time to circle the wagons and to act on this critically important bill. >> == << | USDA announces pause on federal funding for Maine educational programs AUGUSTA, Maine (WABI) - The U.S. Department of Agriculture announced on Wednesday that federal funding for certain Maine educational programs has been paused. In a statement, the USDA says a letter has been sent to Governor Mills announcing the pause and that federal funding received from the department will continue to be reviewed. The USDA says the pause on funding is due to the state's violation of Title IX. == | CNN Poll: Democratic Party's favorability drops to a record low The Democratic Party's favorability rating among Americans stands at a record low, according to a new CNN poll == by SSRS, fueled in part by dimming views from its own frustrated supporters. With many in the party saying publicly that their leaders should do more to stand up to President Donald Trump, Democrats and Democratic-aligned independents say, 57% to 42%, that Democrats should mainly work to stop the Republican agenda, rather than working with the GOP majority to get some Democratic ideas into legislation. == | | | Gov. Mills side steps trans athletes question, says Trump is not the rule of law AUGUSTA, Maine (WGME) -- Maine Governor Janet Mills was less than keen to share her thoughts on whether transgender athletes should be allowed to play in girls' sports. "I'm not going to talk about the transgender thing if that's what you're asking about. This isn't about that. This is about the rule of law pure and simple. In addition to the sports issues, the Trump administration is now investigating Maine schools for allegedly withholding students' gender preferences from parents, which they claim violates federal law. == | | | | == | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | | | | | | | Maine Issues & Action PAC | PO Box 603, Augusta, ME 04332 | | Sent by mailto:mike@mikesoboleskiforcongress.ccsend.com powered by

body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1576%2E791427%2EaeE1g6)

Friend — We were so proud to reelect Ilhan in November with the tireless help of supporters like you.
But politics moves fast, which means we have to start rebuilding this campaign and this movement to be ready for what’s ahead.
Not only are we now more than two months into a chaotic second Trump term, but we are already seeing the far-right’s strategy for 2026 come into shape.
So, with many important fights ahead, [**we’re asking you to take 60 seconds and personally endorse Ilhan Omar today.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-april25-personal-endorse/?source=em250405-1-150&akid=1576%2E791427%2EaeE1g6)
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-april25-personal-endorse/?source=em250405-1-150&akid=1576%2E791427%2EaeE1g6)**
Ilhan has been a consistent fighter on the issues we care about, from tackling the climate crisis, to restoring the right to abortion across the country, to pushing for a ceasefire in Gaza and a more just US foreign policy.
She has been a leader in taking the fight to Trump and Elon Musk, because she understands that now is the time for Democrats to do everything we can to push back — not lay down and let Trump tear up the Constitution and steal from the working class.
But when it comes to these big challenges, no one person or leader can make change alone. It’s always taken a grassroots movement of regular folks like you pitching in and making their voices heard. That’s how we’ve made change in the past, and it’s how we’ll make change for our future.
**[So please: Add your name today and personally endorse Ilhan Omar as she fights for us in Congress. Help us show the size and strength of this incredible movement.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-april25-personal-endorse/?source=em250405-1-150&akid=1576%2E791427%2EaeE1g6)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-april25-personal-endorse/?source=em250405-1-150&akid=1576%2E791427%2EaeE1g6)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Musk and Trump are cutting Social Security benefits while pushing tax cuts for billionaires.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2516%2E4032634%2EqwCxmT)
---
Let’s say a 66-year-old man qualifies for Social Security. He’s worked his whole life and contributed his hard-earned money, believing in America’s promise that if you pay into the system, you can count on these benefits when you retire. Say he calls the Social Security helpline to apply, but he’s told about a new DOGE rule, so he has to go online or in person. He can’t drive. He has trouble with the website, so he waits until his niece can get a day off to take him to the local office, but DOGE closed that office, so they have to drive two hours to get to the next closest office. When they get there, there are only two people staffing a 50-person line, so he doesn’t even make it to the front of the line before the office closes, and he has to come back. Let’s assume it takes him three months to straighten this out, and he misses a total of $5,000 in benefit checks. Clearly, it would be illegal for Elon Musk or Donald Trump to cut someone’s Social Security benefits like this without a new law from Congress. They know they don’t have the votes in Congress to cut Social Security — so this is a backdoor method they’re using instead. **I’m fighting back by launching the Social Security War Room along with my colleagues Sen. Wyden, Sen. Kelly, and Sen. Warnock to dedicate resources towards exposing this scheme and stopping these attacks. I’m standing with my colleagues to say: Trump and Elon, get your hands off our Social Security.**

Let’s be clear here: Social Security is not charity, it’s not some giveaway. It’s something that people earned by paying into it for all of their working years. It’s a sacred promise that if you work hard and pay into the system, you are legally entitled to Social Security benefits when you retire. Trump and Musk are breaking that promise. DOGE is firing Social Security workers, seizing control of our payment system, closing offices, and pulling the plug on phone services. Americans are being falsely marked as dead in the Social Security system. People who are very much alive and have bills to pay are forced to go through a months-long, headache-inducing process to get things sorted out. Musk himself recently called Social Security a “Ponzi Scheme.” Mind you, this is coming from a man who rakes in $8 million a day from the federal government, while the average American on Social Security receives $65 a day. Now, why might they be looking for indirect ways to cut Social Security benefits and make it harder for Americans to receive their checks? It’s so — you guessed it — they can use the money you paid into Social Security to fund tax cuts for billionaires and billionaire corporations. These attacks on Social Security are hurting people. And I’m not having this. I’ll continue to closely monitor what’s happening with the Social Security Administration. I’ll continue to sound the alarm on what Trump and Musk are hoping we don’t notice about their backdoor scheme. And our War Room will monitor wait times at Social Security Administration offices, and visit offices to report on the impacts of these cuts. **The most important way you can help fight back is by sharing your story about how Social Security has impacted you and your family. Are you experiencing any issues with your benefits right now? Has access to Social Security benefits made a tangible impact in your life? My team wants to hear from you.** [**Please click here and share your story about Social Security. While Trump and Musk keep telling lies about this critical program, we’re going to fight back with the truth.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/share-your-socsec-story/?source=EMZ25H_ENG_E_20250404_V1S1&t=8&akid=2516%2E4032634%2EqwCxmT) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[took CNN by storm with one message](https://substack.com/redirect/78071ee4-fae2-4de1-bb2d-35adc733aea1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ;** stop fear mongering about President Trump's tariff plan for America.
This got intense, watch it right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/78071ee4-fae2-4de1-bb2d-35adc733aea1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/78071ee4-fae2-4de1-bb2d-35adc733aea1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The President has acknowledged that Americans could feel some pain with these tariffs," the CNN reporter reminded Leavitt. "How much pain is the President comfortable with Americans feeling even on a temporary basis?"
Karoline began to answer but was quickly interrupted by the reporter.
"Are you going to do anything to ease the pain?" she interjected.
"Absolutely," Leavitt fired back. "We are working on that every single day. The American people and the naysayers need to look a the whole of government/economic approach that this administration is taking. "The President has launched a massive deregulatory agenda which we know has saved the taxpayer millions of dollars. He is also unleashing the might of our American energy industry, which we know is the greatest driver of inflation, it's one of the many reasons we had an inflation crisis in the previous administration!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/78071ee4-fae2-4de1-bb2d-35adc733aea1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Leavitt continued, "It is the goal of this president to have higher wages, less inflation and tax cuts! That's the second step of the Trump economic agenda!"
The CNN reporter returned fire by quoting JP Morgan's statement responding to the tariffs, claiming that they will be the "largest tax hike on Americans since 1968."
"What is everyone missing," the reporter asked Leavitt.
"They are missing the massive revenue these tariffs will bring into the U.S.!" she answered, before pointing out that the Biden administration chose to keep Trump's first-term tariffs in place because of their positive effect.
Her answer apparently wasn't good enough for CNN, watch the clash unravel here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/78071ee4-fae2-4de1-bb2d-35adc733aea1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Nobel Prize discovery TERRIFIES oncologists
Everything in this video, while extremely controversial, is completely true.

A Nobel Prize-winning discovery has led to a treatment with zero side effects, NO CHEMO needed, and success stories with complete reversals.

**[WATCH THIS VIDEO before oncologists demand its removal.](https://substack.com/redirect/9896f010-7352-4875-b509-037c52ab318d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
# **Karoline Leavitt TORCHES smug reporter for defending gang members and terrorists**
White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[fired back at a legacy media reporter for challenging the Trump administration's](https://substack.com/redirect/91b861d2-45dc-489b-88df-f683784fb0ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** right the remove violent illegal immigrant gang members from the U.S.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/91b861d2-45dc-489b-88df-f683784fb0ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/91b861d2-45dc-489b-88df-f683784fb0ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Are you saying that it is okay to ignore a judge's ruling if you don't like it?" the reporter asked Leavitt.
"Who does that judge work for?" Leavitt pushed back. "It was an immigration judge who works for the Department of Justice at the direction of the Attorney General of the U.S. who's name is Pam Bondi who has comitted to eradicating MS-13 from our nation!"
"May I remind each and every one of you," Leavitt continued. "MS-13 is a brutal vicious gang! They raped and strangled a 20-year-old autistic woman to death in Maryland. They hacked 4 people to death with machetes in apark on Long Island. They have kidnapped, sexually tortured and shot a teenage girl in Texas after she 'insulted them' allegedly..."
Leavitt went on and on listing the horrific actions of these gang members, who certain federal judges and Democrats are fighting to keep in this country.
**[Watch the tense White House moment here:](https://substack.com/redirect/91b861d2-45dc-489b-88df-f683784fb0ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: VoteVets.org
subject: “These cuts are killing Veterans. Veterans will die.” -MG Paul Eaton, USA (Ret.)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
11 Democratic Senators held a shadow hearing on Thursday to discuss the impacts of the Trump Administration and DOGE’s indiscriminate and dangerous mass firings and cuts at the VA.
#
Peter,
11 Democratic Senators held a shadow hearing on Thursday to discuss the impacts of the Trump Administration and DOGE’s indiscriminate and dangerous mass firings and cuts at the VA.
Maj. Gen. Paul Eaton, US Army (Ret.), one of VoteVets own, joined them. In the clearest possible language, he told them: “These cuts are killing Veterans. Veterans will die.”
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250405-1-90&t=1&akid=34317%2E3013755%2ElLwMzW)
Not a single Republican chose to take part. Not a single Trump Administration official came to answer for their actions. And it’s clear why.
These firings, these cuts, are indefensible. They represent an effort not to increase efficiency, to improve care provided, or shorten waitlists. They have one goal: To kill the VA as we know it. To sever the bonds between our nation and our Veterans. For Elon Musk, for Donald Trump, for their billionaire friends, the goal is to extract as much value as possible and leave Veterans high and dry.
This is slash and burn.
We have to be clear about this. We have to be direct. We have to show what Donald Trump and Elon Musk are doing, and what Republicans in Congress are enabling. We have to do this because if we don’t we will not be able to rally the support we need to stop them — and more Veterans will die.
With that in mind, we’ve got a request today.
VoteVets is putting together a **SAVE THE VA Fund** — we’ll be using it to defend the VA, to demand accountability from the Trump Administration, and to take the fight to every member of the GOP who sits by as our Veterans suffer.
[**While times are tough, it would mean a lot if you could become a founding donor to the SAVE THE VA Fund. Only what you can afford, because when thousands chip in alongside you these donations add up fast.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250405-1-90&t=2&akid=34317%2E3013755%2ElLwMzW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: The Democratic Party
subject: 2 things →
body:
---
Derek — This moment demands a Democratic Party that can do two things:
1. Mobilize and organize against Trump, Elon Musk, and their allies in Congress’ harmful policies.
2. Build the infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at all levels of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states.

With your help, that’s exactly what we’re doing. We’re holding People’s Town Halls across the country, showing up in districts where Republican representatives won’t. We’re giving everyone an opportunity — regardless of how they voted — to show up and make their voice heard. At the same time, we’re investing in state parties and in building a robust on-the-ground organizing operation. We’re already seeing it pay off: Democrats have massively overperformed in nearly every special election this year.
* In Wisconsin, voters rejected a MAGA candidate backed by Elon Musk, who had poured tens of millions of dollars into the race.
* In Pennsylvania, we recently flipped a district that went to Trump by 15 points in 2024.
* In Florida, Democrats massively overperformed our 2024 performance — a huge warning sign for Republicans.

The work we are doing right now is not easy. But it’s absolutely essential. There has never been a more important time to join the fight, and it’s going to take all of us stepping up to check Trump and his administration at every turn while working to elect Democrats who will do the same. [That’s why we’re coming to you today, Derek. Can we count on you to pitch in a $3 donation today to the DNC to keep up this momentum?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250405_3142_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3142_22930333_4pG22O&akid=3142%2E22930333%2E4pG22O) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250405_3142_fr&refcode2=3142_22930333_4pG22O&akid=3142%2E22930333%2E4pG22O)**

Build the infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at all levels of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. With your help, that’s exactly what we’re doing. We’re holding People’s Town Halls across the country, showing up in districts where Republican representatives won’t. We’re giving everyone an opportunity — regardless of how they voted — to show up and make their voice heard. At the same time, we’re investing in state parties and in building a robust on-the-ground organizing operation. We’re already seeing it pay off: Democrats have massively overperformed in nearly every special election this year. In Wisconsin, voters rejected a MAGA candidate backed by Elon Musk, who had poured tens of millions of dollars into the race. In Pennsylvania, we recently flipped a district that went to Trump by 15 points in 2024. In Florida, Democrats massively overperformed our 2024 performance — a huge warning sign for Republicans. The work we are doing right now is not easy. But it’s absolutely essential. There has never been a more important time to join the fight, and it’s going to take all of us stepping up to check Trump and his administration at every turn while working to elect Democrats who will do the same. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: "To disarm the people is the most effectual way to enslave them."
body:
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._E_NQ/s9md719cab6)
---
| | |
---
| | Peter,
One of America’s Founding Fathers, George Mason once said, “ _To disarm the people is the most effectual way to enslave them_.”
Laws that try to restrict or remove our rights to own guns are not a misguided attempt to save lives– it is the government’s attempt to restrict our God-given rights.
To remain free, it is imperative that we know what is _really_ going on in our government and in our state. The Rocky Mountain Voice is here to provide you with the truth so we can be free.
During this year's legislative session, some lawmakers in Colorado have decided to launch assaults on our Second Amendment rights. Proposed bans on the manufacture, distribution, transfer, sale, and purchase of guns they deem "dangerous" loom over law-abiding Coloradans.
What is so important about our right to bear arms is that it is the only thing that guarantees all of our other freedoms. The Rocky Mountain Voice is determined to make sure that Colorado is informed with the truth and prepared for any attacks on the Constitution that come our way. [Will you help us make sure that Coloradans know the facts?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._E_NQ/sdt8b80aaf3)
---
[Arm Coloradans with the Truth!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._E_NQ/sesca60b0d7)
The Rocky Mountain Voice provides pro-citizen journalism that aims at fostering trust within our community and embraces liberty and knowledge. Your donation of [$115, $45, or even $25](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._E_NQ/s7l2b206f24) directly advances this mission.
Your contribution will help ensure that citizens are armed with the truth so that they can take informed initiative that will help keep us free from power-hungry politicians determined to disarm us.
We want to accomplish our mission of keeping Coloradans free by reporting the truth. Will you help us?
[Keep Colorado Free!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._E_NQ/s3te41167c3)
| | |
---
| | | **For Colorado,**
**Heidi Ganahl** **CEO, Rocky Mountain Voice**
