name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Three questions: Why, why, and why? Let me explain:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
We were ONE ELECTION AWAY from a country you and I wouldn’t recognize anymore.

We were ONE ELECTION AWAY from a country you and I wouldn’t recognize anymore.
1) Why am I running? 2) Why am I running for Governor? 3) Why am I running for Governor of Ohio?
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LTQ3M2U4MzE2NDE1NzQ4MTM4M2NmMDM5ZjI0OTJmMDI2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL3doeS1zZi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LRy1YTC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMzNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS0ctWEwuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMzYzLTM2MjMifQ/GbW7UWdsfjU_NRKITTqtyw)
---
My fellow Americans:

When I'm shaking hands with veterans, talking with college students, or speaking at our (packed!) campaign events, I get asked these three questions just about every day:
1. Why am I [running](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LTQ3M2U4MzE2NDE1NzQ4MTM4M2NmMDM5ZjI0OTJmMDI2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL3doeS1zZi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LRy1YTC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMzNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS0ctWEwuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMzYzLTM2MjMifQ/sBntJx1Go2CEabk5MpUrVQ "running")?
2. Why am I running for [Governor](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LTQ3M2U4MzE2NDE1NzQ4MTM4M2NmMDM5ZjI0OTJmMDI2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL3doeS1zZi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LRy1YTC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMzNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS0ctWEwuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMzYzLTM2MjMifQ/YYOICJpR1mDRliN-FfJN_Q "Governor")?
3. Why am I running for Governor of [Ohio](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LTQ3M2U4MzE2NDE1NzQ4MTM4M2NmMDM5ZjI0OTJmMDI2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL3doeS1zZi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LRy1YTC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMzNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS0ctWEwuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMzYzLTM2MjMifQ/gXZXJypc3corbMtxvaRTNg "Ohio")?

The short and the long of it is this:

**I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country.** I mean that. We were ONE ELECTION AWAY from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore.

President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That's why this race means so much. And why Ohio? This one's easy - I was born here, raised here, and live here now with my amazing wife and two children.

**[If that's all you need to hear, I encourage you to join my campaign with a small contribution today.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LTQ3M2U4MzE2NDE1NzQ4MTM4M2NmMDM5ZjI0OTJmMDI2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL3doeS1zZi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LRy1YTC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMzNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS0ctWEwuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMzYzLTM2MjMifQ/v1SCDKHLaAXuxcAzqkBMAA "If that’s all you need to hear, I encourage you to join my campaign with a small contribution today.")** Every dollar helps, but the amount doesn't matter NEARLY as much as the number of folks who step up.

_Can you please lend a hand today?_
---
| | [**PLEASE: JOIN MY CAMPAIGN HERE ->** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LTQ3M2U4MzE2NDE1NzQ4MTM4M2NmMDM5ZjI0OTJmMDI2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL3doeS1zZi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LRy1YTC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMzNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS0ctWEwuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMzYzLTM2MjMifQ/aafCYIUQSDuJMY8nSefBJQ)
---
Look, you and I both know that not everyone wants President Trump to succeed.

The traditional Republicans want to take us back to the Party of yesteryear, before any of this 'America First nonsense.' The Democrat Party obviously wants to sabotage, undermine, and knife President Trump's agenda at every possible turn.

As President Trump slashes illegal immigration, lowers taxes, and exposes waste, it is a DIRECT INDICTMENT of everything they stand for. **No one is shocked that the Democrat Party cares more about self-preservation - and blaming Donald Trump - than they do about actually healing the country.**

That's where I can help as the next Governor of Ohio.

_As President Trump 's tax cuts add rocket fuel to our economy... I will partner with him to slash our state taxes and make Ohio the next epicenter of economic growth as it once was. _

_As President Trump shutters the Department of Education and sends power back to states ... I will take the baton and fix our failing schools. _

_As President Trump exposes waste and obliterates the Deep State in DC ... I will do the same at the state level to make sure your tax dollars are spent wisely and benefit you. _

**[Whether you live here or not, Ohio will set an example for the other 49 states.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LTQ3M2U4MzE2NDE1NzQ4MTM4M2NmMDM5ZjI0OTJmMDI2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL3doeS1zZi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LRy1YTC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMzNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS0ctWEwuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMzYzLTM2MjMifQ/lgXroMkcFQSPG9tUfE3nDg "Whether you live here or not, Ohio will set an example for the other 49 states. ")**

This may not be popular at Georgetown Democrat cocktail parties, but I'm not running to please them - I'm running to represent YOU and the values we both believe in. That's my answer to the "why" questions.

**[I hope I can earn your support today because I really need it.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LTQ3M2U4MzE2NDE1NzQ4MTM4M2NmMDM5ZjI0OTJmMDI2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL3doeS1zZi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LRy1YTC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMzNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS0ctWEwuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMzYzLTM2MjMifQ/DGl5W2kJWyk5FAZ3vxvTIA "I hope I can earn your support today because I really need it.") There are a lot of powerful folks trying to end this campaign early. Your support will go a long way toward getting us across the finish line. **

So I have to ask: Can you please lend me a hand?
---
| | [**PLEASE: JOIN MY CAMPAIGN HERE ->** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LTQ3M2U4MzE2NDE1NzQ4MTM4M2NmMDM5ZjI0OTJmMDI2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL3doeS1zZi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LRy1YTC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMzNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS0ctWEwuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMzYzLTM2MjMifQ/U2bCuscDXQFV_rUgfaAmWQ)
---
Thank you for your time. I look forward to speaking with you soon.

God bless you,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

Your support will go a long way toward getting us across the finish line. So I have to ask: Can you please lend me a hand? | | Thank you for your time. I look forward to speaking with you soon. God bless you, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201 | To unsubscribe from this mailing list

Peter — Donald Trump says he’s “not joking” about running for a third term.
**Let’s be clear: the U.S. Constitution forbids it.** The 22nd Amendment states that no president can serve more than two terms. But Trump doesn’t care about rules. He only cares about power.
First, he stacked the government with extreme loyalists.
Then, he has purged tens of thousands of federal workers while he tries to gut critical programs like Medicare and Medicaid.
Now, he’s testing the waters for an illegal power grab.
This is how democracy dies, Peter. Trump and his MAGA allies are already looking for loopholes to dismantle term limits. **We must fight back.**
We need to show the country where the American people stand. Our official poll closes at midnight, and we need 500 responses to send a message loud and clear:
**Should Trump be allowed to run for a third term?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105220627/537768553/1494179065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5NmU3NzhjLTJjMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q54yS7F4P6gJa9G6ZnMRHrOcSylYzJMmFwbkrgNw2Ac=&emci=72503fbf-8011-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=496e778c-2c12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16951753)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105220629/537768554/1494179065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5NmU3NzhjLTJjMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q54yS7F4P6gJa9G6ZnMRHrOcSylYzJMmFwbkrgNw2Ac=&emci=72503fbf-8011-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=496e778c-2c12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16951753)**

Unite the Country
| Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable, expose his broken promises, and protect the progress we’ve made over the past four years — but we can’t do it without you!

clean_body: Do you agree? | NBC NEWS: “Trump won’t rule out seeking a third term in the White House, tells NBC News ‘there are methods’ for doing so” | TELL US: Should Trump be allowed to run for a third term? | | ---|--- Peter — Donald Trump says he’s “not joking” about running for a third term. Let’s be clear: the U.S. Constitution forbids it. The 22nd Amendment states that no president can serve more than two terms. But Trump doesn’t care about rules. He only cares about power. First, he stacked the government with extreme loyalists. Then, he has purged tens of thousands of federal workers while he tries to gut critical programs like Medicare and Medicaid. Now, he’s testing the waters for an illegal power grab. This is how democracy dies, Peter. Trump and his MAGA allies are already looking for loopholes to dismantle term limits. We must fight back. We need to show the country where the American people stand. Our official poll closes at midnight, and we need 500 responses to send a message loud and clear: Should Trump be allowed to run for a third term? | | ---|--- Make your voice heard before it’s too late! Unite the Country | Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable, expose his broken promises, and protect the progress we’ve made over the past four years — but we can’t do it without you! name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Sign to defend due process rights from Trump’sattacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Violating federal court orders and due process rights, Trump’s administration is ramping up deportations. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWhE3KUtd-3AvUmQV2eqr7CO76MNampFv1MsqBCrvArivNrbhWytRysTN-DxZWpds9Q2ZC2noOwRAZavSJUbv8Fd_ltzkBYU7oPjt2AQPQYx93TnrJWtV6HV3OyVzdP5HmD2LNef1fF0XU8apcexm4EFREgboU2rPR3ovYPowcxZC2Yo6WGMXkrCF8MyRZ4nReZ9bq4xi32JxRCLsCinUHD69MA4xdd3Fvbtuby5-ekKY/4fe/zd3_JQV2RT-8fh5TUv93WA/h0/h001.0QtPUeKxMDy71s96T2h6I2aQdnh5C1RVRh8W7x5JPfA)
---
Friend, Trump’s administration has detained and deported more students, professors, and workers without accusing them of committing any crimes—often in direct defiance of federal judges’ orders. This includes Mahmoud Khalil, Rasha Alawieh, Rumeysa Ozturk, Ranjani Srinivasan, Badar Khan Suri, Yunseo Chung, Momodou Taal, Fabian Schmidt, Jasmine Mooney, and Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia. **The Trump administration is violating these people’s constitutional rights to due process** , which blocks law enforcement from arresting and detaining anyone without reasonable suspicion of a crime, ensures the right to a fair court hearing, and more. Being undocumented is not a crime, and **due process protections apply to every U.S. resident, regardless of immigration status.** In violation of federal judges’ orders, Trump is trying to avoid abiding by due process protections, including by illegally sending people to notorious overseas prisons and by invoking a racist wartime law that was used to intern Japanese Americans during World War II. Family members have identified some of the people deported to El Salvador and Guantánamo Bay, noting that they hadn’t committed any crime.1,2**** At least one family is suing the Department of Homeland Security for illegally deporting a father with protected status.3 Right now Trump’s administration is targeting undocumented people, green card holders, and people with valid visas, but **they won’t stop at attacking immigrants**. They’re already racially profiling and kidnapping citizens, only releasing them after seeing proof of citizenship. Unless we stop them, they will try out fascist repression on citizens who speak out against Trump and for social justice. **We must act now to defend immigrants and all of us who call this country home.** [**Sign to tell Congress, federal courts, and the U.S. Marshals Service: Take urgent action now to defend our due process rights from Trump’s fascist attacks!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38bacrXqz-CH_FIlv0-54amCNmAJj07ewsBTrSWFnSaeGoxy2Ba8YfsqQ7OE_g-8y0Hk_a_zt3vz5AYGweBAH-QSr7WTjB6v6dVKRIjh4MV4-GhysfacC0-2CfjH-tJYtt2CFwhfsJGKiSu8EQ6sw-71iklV5E1VDbAtOFPWLm-PZs6iRcXOSn5DvALMamtWmy8X17MeOnwUembpcwT_y61Pd5KFr-Hy5efrPuVTb_a-c48h2YUSQ_jWIAzTiuRjOaKMNer29kwIhELlIlVj11NawCBTXN1twswXK2BVSkU22Y1hAYbUrYoAsFPrn-Cr0wukxP3Lve5xJyzSiSNrMmCKaN_75rVLHkimdUP6VGydHNB6V4dsf6HUWqZLToRzl14OoaHCyLmtXhVrifd9pmO8hlYTbk-gJ84pPOsvALxDbu2sfJA1Uy8u9ch5HYvtAGDYpw2TaYwlKmdC3trveZjmG_lg3fa_vn5jehBBD2UVHwWdltbsoHPH4rIne3LfC6s8E6OzkaS45fnQIA3m4a5/4fe/zd3_JQV2RT-8fh5TUv93WA/h1/h001.GejPjsRU3Q9283MbfZJt2_YP05nOkm8CEfHAHb5RUGc) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38bacrXqz-CH_FIlv0-54amCNmAJj07ewsBTrSWFnSaeGoxy2Ba8YfsqQ7OE_g-8y0Hk_a_zt3vz5AYGweBAH-QSr7WTjB6v6dVKRIjh4MV4-GhysfacC0-2CfjH-tJYtt2CFwhfsJGKiSu8EQ6sw-71iklV5E1VDbAtOFPWLm-PZs6iRcXOSn5DvALMamtWmy8X17MeOnwUembpcwT_y61rGyGgqswwJxwMnZ9v1u0bGkfCt_2fv8ZYSOagIjPaX_Kz34FlIIC_UIQQj-Ki4uNmqCBXfTEk5YwM7kKachljeyHBgIct3P6qdX9CIubxrDOW_Ucl3lkeCa7oQw1f3nnrgan2tdlSiUtAg0zyWj-ThdO1ZAgr8xqrOdLF1Wb0hdZFBjwGUHSB2M-NUh_s2sDASFq8aF_whBu6tDAU2fOl0HKojgU3fIwHQ81CxUWmLoA2SbuE0Lx_rhDRB2_AroscflkUb09WFU01t3bB8FH0qz98HO-fhrooiAnGAzHnopN3kl6ONSdRAc85yEwjkW7/4fe/zd3_JQV2RT-8fh5TUv93WA/h2/h001.DScOkcqtizHrIpGqJ7usTnNW7yTc-4e4fpRrBVqz1LM)
---
In an unprecedented constitutional crisis, the Trump administration has continued to openly violate federal court orders—even threatening to impeach federal judges who’ve blocked his unconstitutional actions.
The federal judiciary branch of government is obligated to provide a check on unconstitutional actions from the legislative branch (Congress) and the executive branch (the president). Federal judges challenging Trump are doing their duty.
But the head of Trump’s Department of Justice, Attorney General Pam Bondi, has vowed to continue defying court orders, including the order blocking the deportation of Venezuelan refugees to El Salvador’s torture prisons. She has even claimed that judges don’t have the right to block Trump’s actions, an outrageous lie.
**Trump and his administration are not only violating human and constitutional rights, they’re also undermining one of the most fundamental principles of our democracy: the system of checks and balances between branches of government.** **This is a threat to all of us.**
The U.S. Marshals Service specifically has the power to enforce federal court orders, but it’s overseen by the Department of Justice along with the courts. Despite their connection to the Trump administration, we need U.S. Marshals—as well as the judiciary and legislative branches—to act immediately as checks to Trump’s power.
[**Sign to demand the U.S. Marshals Service, Congress, and federal courts stop Trump’s fascist repression and protect our constitutional rights, including the right to due process.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38bacrXqz-CH_FIlv0-54amCNmAJj07ewsBTrSWFnSaeGoxy2Ba8YfsqQ7OE_g-8y0Hk_a_zt3vz5AYGweBAH-QSr7WTjB6v6dVKRIjh4MV4-GhysfacC0-2CfjH-tJYtt2CFwhfsJGKiSu8EQ6sw-71iklV5E1VDbAtOFPWLm-PZs6iRcXOSn5DvALMamtWmy8X17MeOnwUembpcwT_y61EpryW8DvxL_wExWJpyIQDqpquRixge4B071QWNZLcb6CK3s31GMT-fP5J9Vi9ORxuYNBf7hYXoLIF9rNxdx42phvcd5hKzj1Ie5atW64E8VpnKSqTTLttvJzTMFl6BS86uGxFxCHs74wWSCTTnBa5xq_Q5ErK3RwE--4i0OT9LD-7D8B4eTt2CRkjQWYIoJIkuMSnNoLgiUl_ccYBpFcWE2AZhjkK5Ipofi-N0LL6RnI41YcNi7fqVXSjDCGHfdCwMTfDsZfOarQroG38Y2AgWzRSL8X_6J5chH6cKTsby9SdLzcwI0afdpcZR_YljIT/4fe/zd3_JQV2RT-8fh5TUv93WA/h3/h001.HIpi5Oz_bhckqoUTIGIk08dHVTaOhq05WopcaEWwPIs)
Thank you for taking action. We will speak up for everyone targeted by the Trump administration—not only because it’s the right thing to do, but also because the more they can get away with, the more of us they’ll attack.
In my district, I’ve been honored to join with community groups to inform immigrants about their rights and to support people on their path to obtaining citizenship, including connecting families with free legal assistance. I will do all that’s in my power in Congress—including using my positions on the Oversight Committee—to stop Trump’s unconstitutional and immoral actions. I will keep demanding the release of detained immigrants and pushing for a humane immigration system.
Together we will resist harmful rhetoric and policies that demonize our neighbors, and we will continue demanding a future with dignity, safety, and equal rights for all people.
With you in this fight,

Mahmoud Khalil is still illegally detained, and since his abduction the Trump administration has been detaining and deporting even more immigrants, including students, professors, and workers with valid visas and permanent residency status.
**Trump’s administration has:**
* **Deported Dr. Rasha Alawieh** in violation of a judge’s orders. The Brown University professor was blocked from re-entering the U.S. after visiting family in Lebanon.1
* **Kidnapped Rumeysa Ozturk** , a PhD student at Tufts University in Massachusetts, taking her to Louisiana in violation of a judge’s orders.2 Surveillance video shows masked, plainclothes ICE agents surrounding and handcuffing her in broad daylight before putting her in an unmarked car.
* **Revoked the student visa of Ranjani Srinivasan** —a Fulbright scholar pursuing a PhD at Columbia University—**and Badar Khan Suri** , a PhD student and teacher at Georgetown University whose wife is a U.S. citizen.3,4 Badar is still detained and Ranjani fled the country in fear after ICE came to the student’s home.
* **Took and tortured Fabian Schmidt** , a permanent resident who’s lived here for 17 years, as he returned from a trip abroad.5
* **Held Jasmine Mooney** , a Canadian with a valid U.S. work visa, for two weeks**** in “freezing-cold jail cells” with no explanation.6
* **Tried to deport two brave students who are now suing the Trump administration** : permanent resident Yunseo Chung and visa-holder Momodou Taal.
* **Deported Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia to El Salvador’s notorious torture prisons** , in violation of multiple judges’ orders.7 A brother, father, and husband of U.S. citizens, Abrego Garcia had protected status that prevented him from being sent to his home country of El Salvador, where he could face persecution. ICE admitted to what they called an “administrative error,” but oppose his return to his family.

None of these people have been accused of any crime in association with deportation. **Regardless of immigration status, all residents of the United States have constitutional rights like the right to free speech and the right to due process.**
Due process protections are meant to block arrests if agents don’t have reasonable suspicion of a crime. Due process requirements include proper notice of an immigration hearing, the ability to advocate and present evidence on one’s behalf in court, the right to a neutral rather than partisan judge, and the right to legal counsel in deportation proceedings.
**Trump’s administration is testing out anti-democratic power grabs and violating our due process rights.** Secretary of State Marco Rubio says he’s monitoring student visa holders’ social media posts and aiming to deport people who criticize the U.S. government. Then they might come for anyone who criticizes Trump, including citizens. **We must stop this fascist repression immediately and make sure it doesn’t spread even further.**

Trump keeps violating court orders, including an order to block his deportations of hundreds of immigrants to El Salvador’s notorious torture prisons without any due process. He even threatened to impeach the judge who issued that order. **These unprecedented actions undermine one of the most fundamental principles of our democracy: the constitutionally mandated system of checks and balances between branches of government.**
The judicial branch (courts) is an important check on the legislative branch (Congress) and executive (president) branch of government. Congress and judges act as checks to presidents’ power. When federal judges block Trump’s unconstitutional actions, they’re doing their duty and their job.
The U.S. Marshals Service is the group designated to enforce federal court orders. Unfortunately, the U.S. Marshals Service reports not only to the courts, but also to Trump’s Department of Justice. Trump’s Attorney General Pam Bondi has openly defied court orders, lying to the public by claiming that it’s unconstitutional for judges to block Trump’s (illegal) actions. The opposite is true.
**If the fascists in power can violate court orders and laws without consequences now, they will come for others** ,**including people speaking out for lifesaving services like Medicaid, people advocating against police brutality, and others who are exercising their free speech rights.**
Already, Customs and Border Patrol has denied entry and even detained numerous tourists after checking their phones and finding criticism of Trump—prompting countries like Germany and the UK to issue travel warnings about the United States. And the Department of Homeland Security emailed hundreds of students with visas, stating that their visas have been revoked and threatening them with deportation to countries other than their country of origin.8
**The time is NOW to speak up and demand all branches of our federal government stop Trump’s fascist attacks and defend our fundamental rights.**

clean_body: Violating federal court orders and due process rights, Trump’s administration is ramping up deportations. | | | Friend, Trump’s administration has detained and deported more students, professors, and workers without accusing them of committing any crimes—often in direct defiance of federal judges’ orders. This includes Mahmoud Khalil, Rasha Alawieh, Rumeysa Ozturk, Ranjani Srinivasan, Badar Khan Suri, Yunseo Chung, Momodou Taal, Fabian Schmidt, Jasmine Mooney, and Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia. The Trump administration is violating these people’s constitutional rights to due process , which blocks law enforcement from arresting and detaining anyone without reasonable suspicion of a crime, ensures the right to a fair court hearing, and more. Being undocumented is not a crime, and due process protections apply to every U.S. resident, regardless of immigration status. In violation of federal judges’ orders, Trump is trying to avoid abiding by due process protections, including by illegally sending people to notorious overseas prisons and by invoking a racist wartime law that was used to intern Japanese Americans during World War II. Family members have identified some of the people deported to El Salvador and Guantánamo Bay, noting that they hadn’t committed any crime.1,2** At least one family is suing the Department of Homeland Security for illegally deporting a father with protected status.3 Right now Trump’s administration is targeting undocumented people, green card holders, and people with valid visas, but they won’t stop at attacking immigrants. They’re already racially profiling and kidnapping citizens, only releasing them after seeing proof of citizenship. Unless we stop them, they will try out fascist repression on citizens who speak out against Trump and for social justice. We must act now to defend immigrants and all of us who call this country home. | In an unprecedented constitutional crisis, the Trump administration has continued to openly violate federal court orders—even threatening to impeach federal judges who’ve blocked his unconstitutional actions. The federal judiciary branch of government is obligated to provide a check on unconstitutional actions from the legislative branch (Congress) and the executive branch (the president). Federal judges challenging Trump are doing their duty. But the head of Trump’s Department of Justice, Attorney General Pam Bondi, has vowed to continue defying court orders, including the order blocking the deportation of Venezuelan refugees to El Salvador’s torture prisons. She has even claimed that judges don’t have the right to block Trump’s actions, an outrageous lie. Trump and his administration are not only violating human and constitutional rights, they’re also undermining one of the most fundamental principles of our democracy: the system of checks and balances between branches of government. This is a threat to all of us. The U.S. Marshals Service specifically has the power to enforce federal court orders, but it’s overseen by the Department of Justice along with the courts. Despite their connection to the Trump administration, we need U.S. Marshals—as well as the judiciary and legislative branches—to act immediately as checks to Trump’s power. Thank you for taking action. We will speak up for everyone targeted by the Trump administration—not only because it’s the right thing to do, but also because the more they can get away with, the more of us they’ll attack. In my district, I’ve been honored to join with community groups to inform immigrants about their rights and to support people on their path to obtaining citizenship, including connecting families with free legal assistance. I will do all that’s in my power in Congress—including using my positions on the Oversight Committee—to stop Trump’s unconstitutional and immoral actions. I will keep demanding the release of detained immigrants and pushing for a humane immigration system. Together we will resist harmful rhetoric and policies that demonize our neighbors, and we will continue demanding a future with dignity, safety, and equal rights for all people. With you in this fight, Rashida 1\. 2\. 3\. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib**** Date: Fri, Apr 4, 2025 Subject: Sign to defend due process rights from Trump’s attacks To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Mahmoud Khalil is still illegally detained, and since his abduction the Trump administration has been detaining and deporting even more immigrants, including students, professors, and workers with valid visas and permanent residency status. Trump’s administration has: Deported Dr. Rasha Alawieh in violation of a judge’s orders. The Brown University professor was blocked from re-entering the U.S. after visiting family in Lebanon.1 Kidnapped Rumeysa Ozturk , a PhD student at Tufts University in Massachusetts, taking her to Louisiana in violation of a judge’s orders.2 Surveillance video shows masked, plainclothes ICE agents surrounding and handcuffing her in broad daylight before putting her in an unmarked car. Revoked the student visa of Ranjani Srinivasan —a Fulbright scholar pursuing a PhD at Columbia University—and Badar Khan Suri , a PhD student and teacher at Georgetown University whose wife is a U.S. citizen.3,4 Badar is still detained and Ranjani fled the country in fear after ICE came to the student’s home. Took and tortured Fabian Schmidt , a permanent resident who’s lived here for 17 years, as he returned from a trip abroad.5 Held Jasmine Mooney , a Canadian with a valid U.S. work visa, for two weeks** in “freezing-cold jail cells” with no explanation.6 Tried to deport two brave students who are now suing the Trump administration : permanent resident Yunseo Chung and visa-holder Momodou Taal. Deported Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia to El Salvador’s notorious torture prisons , in violation of multiple judges’ orders.7 A brother, father, and husband of U.S. citizens, Abrego Garcia had protected status that prevented him from being sent to his home country of El Salvador, where he could face persecution. ICE admitted to what they called an “administrative error,” but oppose his return to his family. None of these people have been accused of any crime in association with deportation. Regardless of immigration status, all residents of the United States have constitutional rights like the right to free speech and the right to due process. Due process protections are meant to block arrests if agents don’t have reasonable suspicion of a crime. Due process requirements include proper notice of an immigration hearing, the ability to advocate and present evidence on one’s behalf in court, the right to a neutral rather than partisan judge, and the right to legal counsel in deportation proceedings. Trump’s administration is testing out anti-democratic power grabs and violating our due process rights. Secretary of State Marco Rubio says he’s monitoring student visa holders’ social media posts and aiming to deport people who criticize the U.S. government. Then they might come for anyone who criticizes Trump, including citizens. We must stop this fascist repression immediately and make sure it doesn’t spread even further. Trump keeps violating court orders, including an order to block his deportations of hundreds of immigrants to El Salvador’s notorious torture prisons without any due process. He even threatened to impeach the judge who issued that order. These unprecedented actions undermine one of the most fundamental principles of our democracy: the constitutionally mandated system of checks and balances between branches of government. The judicial branch (courts) is an important check on the legislative branch (Congress) and executive (president) branch of government. Congress and judges act as checks to presidents’ power. When federal judges block Trump’s unconstitutional actions, they’re doing their duty and their job. The U.S. Marshals Service is the group designated to enforce federal court orders. Unfortunately, the U.S. Marshals Service reports not only to the courts, but also to Trump’s Department of Justice. Trump’s Attorney General Pam Bondi has openly defied court orders, lying to the public by claiming that it’s unconstitutional for judges to block Trump’s (illegal) actions. The opposite is true. If the fascists in power can violate court orders and laws without consequences now, they will come for others ,including people speaking out for lifesaving services like Medicaid, people advocating against police brutality, and others who are exercising their free speech rights. Already, Customs and Border Patrol has denied entry and even detained numerous tourists after checking their phones and finding criticism of Trump—prompting countries like Germany and the UK to issue travel warnings about the United States. And the Department of Homeland Security emailed hundreds of students with visas, stating that their visas have been revoked and threatening them with deportation to countries other than their country of origin.8 The time is NOW to speak up and demand all branches of our federal government stop Trump’s fascist attacks and defend our fundamental rights. Thank you. Together, we will keep standing up for our rights. As a daughter of immigrants and former immigration lawyer, I will also keep demanding the human right to freedom of movement and pushing for a humane immigration system with real pathways to citizenship. To our immigrant neighbors: Please know we see you and we will fight to protect you. You deserve to live with dignity and respect in the place you’ve lived and worked for years. Remember you have rights no matter your immigration status. If an immigration agent comes to talk to you or knock on your door, don’t answer the questions or open the door. ICE has no right to enter your home without a valid warrant signed by a judge, and you have the right to remain silent and to ask for a lawyer. You don’t have to sign anything or hand anything over. Don’t forget the importance of grassroots pressure: It’s always the people who shift oppressive systems and get us closer to the society we deserve. Change doesn’t start inside the halls of power; the people make it possible. With you in this fight, Rashida 1\. 2\. 3\. 4\. 5\. 6\. 7\. 8\. * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Bill Gray
subject: A tough question
body:
Why chemistry?

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0ea1ca16f2874f5aa2a4af359ef788b8&_e=MCEneuSiFqvk-5DB4YexHye4uEmTMb54AM5owLzqd8pRMn35undo51wgik0guECldnJUxzxy2y96-i2t8ZDsq2x7ExWpzeXOD3ZWoPWfexTgqMlF-GMaRX2bPrj4G9U8FxNG3Ga60pD0zmq_rP9F36LjmuATMs3y0uGgL61JckvbvxgGrGNx4mUmAB6tr-3twIfKpP1Ihn0VKFdJJBYLnWbBn5q3Tu14wU_SDJziArSTObYSUrr5D3VrZVs32HrcdN4YDt0oS2y3-fhPwAe9ZkxNLajvxvMef2600hQwlur8fqbImbvKjB2fPDYsUrxZKJ1iYQjQOe00y0Xwg_towuVhNsTTE_Ac1VeVLfmqG74-NQ7fHINaOP4a6GZyiS0wh9qAsw3x1-sJFdbthuo7-xbQE58jWMVDFPtv_dhcgKA%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0ea1ca16f2874f5aa2a4af359ef788b8&_e=MCEneuSiFqvk-5DB4YexHye4uEmTMb54AM5owLzqd8pRMn35undo51wgik0guECldnJUxzxy2y96-i2t8ZDsq2x7ExWpzeXOD3ZWoPWfexTgqMlF-GMaRX2bPrj4G9U8FxNG3Ga60pD0zmq_rP9F36LjmuATMs3y0uGgL61JckvbvxgGrGNx4mUmAB6tr-3twIfKpP1Ihn0VKFdJJBYLnWbBn5q3Tu14wU_SDJziArSTObYSUrr5D3VrZVs32HrcOlAfmty18nayXWoP1BN2Me8qQfIJkVgFt5U2cn6qyJjXGmvG5bU85JEgD-dsSftc0Y4yuQRF4i8OqK1sYHduVA5zZSNKborD9p_4xC4N62y_H_R9rAnRZCQ2IhWXnAdeQuS2fh2-kQtfueV_cRGcq2H00uotaCvMFdVYzXS5Qpo%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=0ea1ca16f2874f5aa2a4af359ef788b8&_t=X_QFxoZcKDfY-KoaVrCO7Heyqz62L1ZQKu-M3b_Rk5ksFuL-g-iPXYOXCcqGoRYpQDVNTC0ZxFLlzpcqK1DWS3p0BW_moRbaR2UdOFeicihD5O7HK2GETKmVldK2lYLJ)

body:

**“Tim Walz vs. Elon Musk”** \- _Minnesota Star Tribune_
Peter,
Look, I think it’s clear that Elon Musk pisses me off. I won’t deny it.
He’s an unelected nepo-baby billionaire who only cares about stroking his own ego. And while everyday Americans are struggling to get by, Musk is whining about his stock losses on national television, gutting essential services, bankrolling extremist candidates, and firing the public servants who keep this country running.
**The richest man in the world shouldn’t be running our government, and I’m going to keep calling him out every chance I get. **
I know I’m not the only one who feels this way. That’s why I’m hosting town halls where sitting Republican members of Congress refuse to show up and listen to their constituents—and sure as hell won’t stand up to Musk’s outrageous agenda.
These events are all about amplifying the voices of Americans who are fed up with being ignored. They’re making an impact, but I need your help to stay on the road.
[**If you’re ready to join me in taking on bullies like Musk, Trump, and the MAGA Republicans who gave them control of the federal government, please pitch in $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can afford today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105223505/537774379/656624352?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzYwOTZmYS0yZTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hRXDpa7I9PiLo4uFprcaxIfNC-1oAYRTHvZ8qG6KJEw=)

clean_body: He’s an unelected nepo-baby billionaire who only cares about stroking his own ego. | = “Tim Walz vs. Elon Musk” \- Minnesota Star Tribune Peter, Look, I think it’s clear that Elon Musk pisses me off. I won’t deny it. He’s an unelected nepo-baby billionaire who only cares about stroking his own ego. And while everyday Americans are struggling to get by, Musk is whining about his stock losses on national television, gutting essential services, bankrolling extremist candidates, and firing the public servants who keep this country running. The richest man in the world shouldn’t be running our government, and I’m going to keep calling him out every chance I get. I know I’m not the only one who feels this way. That’s why I’m hosting town halls where sitting Republican members of Congress refuse to show up and listen to their constituents—and sure as hell won’t stand up to Musk’s outrageous agenda. These events are all about amplifying the voices of Americans who are fed up with being ignored. They’re making an impact, but I need your help to stay on the road. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Tim Walz ********=******

name: Wes Moore
subject: Answering a few of your questions
body:
Last month, my team reached out with an opportunity to ask me anything, and y’all delivered!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105223537/537774403/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjVkMGNlNy0yZTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X6X38zArDpcGNZfavaRBae0fO3qpipkm2Mb7smF6Fao=&emci=e45d0ce7-2e12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ef5d0ce7-2e12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)
Hey there, Last month, my team reached out with an opportunity to ask me anything, and _y’all delivered!_ We received so many thoughtful questions and notes, and picked a few to answer. Let’s get into it: Gordon asked, **"What can you do for the workers that have just lost their jobs because of the cuts by the federal government?"**
> With so many Marylanders employed by the federal government, these reckless layoffs have hit us hard. I recently had the chance to speak with Madelyn, a woman from Ellicott City. Ten months ago, she landed her dream job with the National Park Service, working at Ft. McHenry.
>
> On Valentine’s Day, Madelyn and five of her colleagues were fired by email, without warning. It’s outrageous. And it’s exactly why we’re taking action — because our people deserve better.
>
> To support impacted Marylanders, we’ve expanded our workforce assistance portal, which connects displaced workers with job opportunities, and hosted job fairs across the state. We also partnered with Work for America, a nonprofit dedicated to recruiting public servants for state and local government jobs.
Jeffrey asked, **"How do we most effectively fight fascism and take our country back?"**
> Be an active changemaker. Real patriotism means lifting each other up, whether by running for office, volunteering, donating, or speaking up at protests. That urge to act is what compelled me to run for governor — I wanted to be the person who has the pen in their hand, making a tangible impact on people’s lives.
Merida asked, **“How will you protect education funding now that the President is trying to close the Department of Education?”**
> Ensuring every Maryland child receives a world-class education is a mission I hold dear. My mother prioritized education heavily. She worked multiple jobs so em and my siblings could attend good schools and ultimately succeed. But people shouldn’t have to sacrifice this much to access a quality education.
>
> That’s why I’m working with our state legislature to pass The Excellence in Maryland Public Schools Act, which increases investments in teacher recruitment and retention. I’m also fighting to close the teacher shortage gap, and invest more in K-12 education so that no one gets left behind, no matter what the Trump administration does.
Drew asked, **"What is your Chick & Ruth’s order?"**
> Now, you’re making me hungry. Crab cakes and waffles! 🦀🧇
That’s all I have time for today, but I’d love to keep this conversation going. **[Click here to ask me anything.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105223538/537774406/2060911508?source=em20250405-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjVkMGNlNy0yZTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X6X38zArDpcGNZfavaRBae0fO3qpipkm2Mb7smF6Fao=&emci=e45d0ce7-2e12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ef5d0ce7-2e12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)** Elevate, Wes
---

| Peter, We’re just a few months into Trump’s second term, but the damage has already been severe.
* Our allies are angry about his threats to take over Canada and Greenland, and his failure to stand up for Ukraine.
* Our economy is tanking thanks to Trump’s ridiculous tariffs. Our stock market is going down fast, while grocery prices are skyrocketing.
* Our rights are in danger as Trump signs orders that directly contradict our Constitution and Congress’ authority. He’s attacked the LGBTQ+ community, immigrants, and many other minority groups, putting their freedoms at risk.

We need to know how we can best prepare over the next few years to take on Trump and his MAGA movement. This is a critical moment, Peter, and the strategies we outline right now will set the tone for dealing with the Trump Administration. [That’s why we’re asking you to take our Spring 2025 Priorities Survey by 11:59 PM tonight. Your response will be critical as we respond to Trump’s attacks on our rights and rule of law, so please take a few minutes to fill out the quick survey ASAP.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2096cbb8-a5fc-426b-923b-08699d9577d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbfefe037-32e7-40cb-94a4-bc8fddaedd0d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team BWC
subject: Bonnie wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
|

Did you see Bonnie’s note? She’s not afraid of hearing from her constituents to know how to best support you. Given how things are going in Washington, it’s more important than ever that we stand together and use our voices.

[Bonnie wants to hear from you. Can you share your thoughts with us by taking our quick survey? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105225504/537778195/2105802230?source=EM_NBI_BWC_202504_SV_TownHall_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_TownHallSV2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGIzMjBhZS0zMDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47Y_dTcF2RSksHJU-yriFdKjJLjJhRdSa0lSKomgFU8=&emci=4bb320ae-3012-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=58b320ae-3012-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098)
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_**

I’m so grateful to be able to speak with you and my other supporters in our recent town halls. It’s a privilege to be able to connect with my constituents and understand your concerns in these difficult times.

Republicans aren’t willing to explain their vote, which put affordable healthcare on the chopping block and gave the wealthiest Americans tax breaks in exchange. **That’s why I hosted town hall meetings in their district to explain their actions.**

[I want to keep hearing from you. Can you take a minute to take this short survey to let me know your concerns and thoughts so I can serve you best? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105225511/537778196/2105802230?source=EM_NBI_BWC_202504_SV_TownHall_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_TownHallSV2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGIzMjBhZS0zMDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47Y_dTcF2RSksHJU-yriFdKjJLjJhRdSa0lSKomgFU8=&emci=4bb320ae-3012-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=58b320ae-3012-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098) | | **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105225513/537778197/2105802230?source=EM_NBI_BWC_202504_SV_TownHall_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_TownHallSV2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGIzMjBhZS0zMDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47Y_dTcF2RSksHJU-yriFdKjJLjJhRdSa0lSKomgFU8=&emci=4bb320ae-3012-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=58b320ae-3012-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098)**
---
Unsurprisingly, Republicans are scared of facing their constituents — they’ve made it clear they don’t care about the American people. I want to hear from you so I can bring your concerns to Washington, and ensure that you’re getting your voice heard.

It hasn’t been an easy couple of months, and I want to know the best way to fight back that supports you and your concerns.

[Share your thoughts with us. Click here to take our quick survey >>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105225514/537778198/2105802230?source=EM_NBI_BWC_202504_SV_TownHall_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_TownHallSV2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGIzMjBhZS0zMDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47Y_dTcF2RSksHJU-yriFdKjJLjJhRdSa0lSKomgFU8=&emci=4bb320ae-3012-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=58b320ae-3012-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098)

Thank you for your continued support.

— Bonnie
* * *

---
Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87611?refcode=em20250405-8869&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8869%2E614464%2EiHnT69)
Peter, it’s Cory.
This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. Peter, it’s Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: With love and gratitude, Cory | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). name: Forward Party
subject: ICYMI: MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT - UUP/FWD Merger agreement signed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In case you missed it!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=1)
---
| Peter -- In case you missed the announcement, the Utah Forward Party announced an amazing merger with the United Utah Party on April 2nd this week. This is a huge deal - but don't take my word for it, read what they had to say about it below. \---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: **Utah Forward Party** <[hi@utahforwardparty.org](mailto:hi@utahforwardparty.org)>
Date: Wed, Apr 2, 2025, 9:30 AM
Subject: MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT \- UUP/FWD Merger agreement signed! |
---
Forwardists, **Today, The United Utah Party (UUP) and the Utah Forward Party (FWD) signed an agreement that sets the groundwork for a party merger. This unprecedented agreement will be ratified by vote during our upcoming April 26th convention.** Make no mistake, this is a really big deal. Building on the news from earlier this month that Senator Dan Thatcher [switched his affiliation to FWD](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E15n0HljlFusjbu6dzlTH5bdwx5wrcIfThRyeAsP5BY0kooi2ehqWSH5lxIhlsLKcGfEiV77ku9uExRrY6DHfDKa_HTlOf7LFneaDwSqlmG9f0FsD6aXNl2h52qA_LyJzQsP5oxVX--IHqb_Atq9thY1CscT14Bh1FzxqH1EL2kthC_UKYRtWRTPeiLJ6hhoTo&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=2), there’s no denying our momentum. We’ve never been closer to a viable, competitive third party. And while the details of this may be Utah-specific, we feel it's a story with national implications. Here's what our Utah Chair Adam Teuscher said about the merger:
* * *
_“Since 2017 the UUP has been a home to disenfranchised voters and candidates who bravely opted out of an obviously dysfunctional two-party system. They’ve worked tirelessly to give voters a quality third option. They believe that electeds should put the interests of their constituents over those of party bosses. Forward stands for the same, but we do so as part of a 50-state movement. UUP blazed the path, and through this merger, we hope to widen it.”_
* * *
You can read the full press release and find a link to the agreement [here](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E3L5XDg41h1WFPOXldjXTUMTjIc4sU8XLvmY8qmeplr6aKnqr4jCkbJK11SNA_sxoGgPZMf9q45k4c7hyvWpYi8OhEAs1qVkCqifqelrsVQ2b2X7_4QJ6ALx5N0N8mS_I8LCNP17Gos3gOvJgBCH2LDhq8NXlZ9j8Gm5SADq9uFrVMk9k9HJo95kpF2hmTvICk&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=3). RSVP to the 4/26 convention ASAP to witness the next steps in our story.
---
| [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E0NZ3aSlAR6Fff_2L-LQG3_T6C9bNJeBOeCiU4c-QkwpB334yl9TzawkiIfXm-_3k0uaAXG1JqaOkCsWQZyToAFiCQVYVGHtRuJK3cRrDf4in6PRpDWtuoYrCW48WkOBwIV3C5Hr2WS0e20kAClmtbSUcHu8Hx6Z5bqCdZwRcJgOvMlDaTjd6FPRgQ0GbL7mJuePvfTzpCbtK0mJOHNLcHlRxIJ-wv8Z_kU7wL5h3YhXTjnc8OygNTTIOC6PInWg_c&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=4 "RSVP for the Convention")[RSVP for the Convention](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E0NZ3aSlAR6Fff_2L-LQG3_T6C9bNJeBOeCiU4c-QkwpB334yl9TzawkiIfXm-_3k0uaAXG1JqaOkCsWQZyToAFiCQVYVGHtRuJK3cRrDf4in6PRpDWtuoYrCW48WkOBwIV3C5Hr2WS0e20kAClmtbSUcHu8Hx6Z5bqCdZwRcJgOvMlDaTjd6FPRgQ0GbL7mJuePvfTzpCbtK0mJOHNLcHlRxIJ-wv8Z_kU7wL5h3YhXTjnc8OygNTTIOC6PInWg_c&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=4)
---
As if this news isn't enough of a draw, there’ll be a lot more to this joint convention than party business. **We welcome all Utahns broadly interested in election reform and the independent political space to attend.** The convention will include keynote speeches by party notables, a candidate panel, breakout sessions focused on our Priorities, free lunch, and FWD-branded swag handouts!
---
---
* * *
---
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E3QvSlSZ-zqebUuMZunNe0qg29s4G3eIlUQNs96t8cbNKB0Jzxca6wjnQ0r1RaGQz12u3Cvz98TMHAHaCfrcrvx5boS3Jod9zq2904pv1v2FnL7XJ0_N6Vkg09oLZ1LOpWCTWD1AXLO4Jke8ZKnX_Tb1UGQm_k49kOiZeriq9PX4Q&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=5)Here’s how the proposed agreement for a FWD/UUP merger would work: At the April 26 convention:
1. The UUP – in attendance – will vote to approve the merger agreement.*
2. FWD will vote to approve the merger agreement.*
3. FWD will vote on its State Leadership for the 2025-26 term.
4. FWD will vote on a temporary resolution allowing members of both the UUP and FWD to participate in the 2025-26 Priorities selection vote.
5. FWD and UUP will [vote together for the 2025-26 Priorities](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E3QvSlSZ-zqebUuMZunNe0qg29s4G3eIlUQNs96t8cbNKB0Jzxca6wjnQ0r1RaGQz12u3Cvz98TMHAHaCfrcrvx5boS3Jod9zq2904pv1v2FnL7XJ0_N6Vkg09oLZ1LOpWCTWD1AXLO4Jke8ZKnX_Tb1JfYGaSVaoOhpW-jQHLD5Q&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=6).
6. Elected leadership of FWD and UUP will appoint a combined interim Executive Committee to oversee the party joining process.

Then after the convention:
1. Over the course of the next months, the parties will go through the (unprecedented!) process of completing the merge in accordance with the laws of Utah.
2. The county-level conventions (which have been postponed) will occur in the fall, where county parties can select their own leadership and priorities.

_*Voting to approve the merger will be limited to those who were registered party members prior to the date of this announcement (3/31). However, both FWD and UUP Party members who change their registration after this date will still be eligible in the Priorities vote. Stand with Senator Thatcher and [change your registration](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E1ecbpIFaPhQpQBOy7o0PhSx265t9x1FaHRCHCoAux5F7LB0wskWd17CLijabXeVdkQXZpaWV7OhiSi9cb0AP_0Ls1eCpNnYTHKpwC981mR_ZvLmB0woQxhjokWN7EoQnRLenlnKn4yhkFRsm1Tb7ShpKbubGewmjqXedu8mgD1XA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=7) today._
---
* * *
---
At the national level, political dysfunction and polarization are clearly at all-time highs. Here in Utah, this year’s legislative session was a case study in the “growing disconnect between the public and its representatives,” as Senator Thatcher puts it ([here](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E1epO3q9ZpS0Drb3MJcgEsKYID3zcc4ZQG_5cU7Ud1HRgeKxuBCIAq6Tikni0FDp6ODab0y6rsE3AnFhR_y8pjAhSEzVPiI0kX1wzURxWN0XgUHtlzzu5uVruzk9Wa4Thy8_V6w4HE7K4ItDmVeX9wCdIWf9irEYi6c8FBbSxnYaDm7j9Jml7po8VOv8LPE6DLhSjbGohKsAtZKOwotHlBiXeFSSnOoyGQbl9Pe3hkAnNpjlkXScSKx6eik8j98VAs&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=8)). To many, things may seem pretty dire at the moment. But there’s a brighter path forward, and today’s news is further evidence that we can indeed break through the pessimism and the deadlock. Being a Forwardist means having something rare: **Optimism for a brighter future.** Stay tuned for many more updates in the days and weeks to come,
The Utah Forward Party Executive Committee
---
| [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E0NZ3aSlAR6Fff_2L-LQG3_T6C9bNJeBOeCiU4c-QkwpB334yl9TzawkiIfXm-_3k0uaAXG1JqaOkCsWQZyToAFiCQVYVGHtRuJK3cRrDf4in6PRpDWtuoYrCW48WkOBwIV3C5Hr2WS0e20kAClmtbSUcHu8Hx6Z5bqCdZwRcJgOvMlDaTjd6FPRgQ0GbL7mJuePvfTzpCbtK0mJOHNLcHlRxIJ-wv8Z_kU7wL5h3YhXdtVCZSuKCp3MYreIt_vc2o&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=9 "RSVP for the Convention")[RSVP for the Convention](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E0NZ3aSlAR6Fff_2L-LQG3_T6C9bNJeBOeCiU4c-QkwpB334yl9TzawkiIfXm-_3k0uaAXG1JqaOkCsWQZyToAFiCQVYVGHtRuJK3cRrDf4in6PRpDWtuoYrCW48WkOBwIV3C5Hr2WS0e20kAClmtbSUcHu8Hx6Z5bqCdZwRcJgOvMlDaTjd6FPRgQ0GbL7mJuePvfTzpCbtK0mJOHNLcHlRxIJ-wv8Z_kU7wL5h3YhXdtVCZSuKCp3MYreIt_vc2o&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_utah_party_merger_annou&n=9)
---

# [Why are they attacking us kids?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=160650366&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNjUwMzY2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM4NjczMDMsImV4cCI6MTc0NjQ1OTMwMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nyvueFPbNoWojH87qmBBKBeuerjkOIkS7CBifJFOqOw)

Good Morning!
I think we don't realize, as adults, the impact that politics has on kids. Particularly when things are as crazy as they are right now and kids are more plugged in than ever before.
My 11 year old son, Grady, who has been following the news with his friends and has seen me writing this Substack, is worried that no one cares about or is paying attention to the thoughts of his generation, who will have to deal with the fallout for all of this their entire lives.
So he has decided to start his own Substack: The Political View from Middle School.
The first issue, which is below, can also be found on his page here:
I hope you'll enjoy it and encourage his work by [subscribing to his page](https://substack.com/redirect/47e94bcc-217c-46f6-aeca-7fdd7137dffc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and letting him know what you think in the comments!
Lucas
* * *
Hi, and welcome to my Substack, [The Political View from Middle School.](https://substack.com/redirect/18e2db2e-a600-4ab4-9d7b-e6f87cdd76a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
My name is Grady Kunce and I'm in the sixth grade. On my Substack, I will talk about politics, but in a different way than you may see them. I'll be talking about them through the eyes of me and my friends, the eyes of middle schoolers.
I am doing this because I want people to know that kids are a part of this world, too, and because I think if a lot of people subscribe it will show us that people really do care about us.
[(You can Subscribe to The Political View from Middle School by clicking here)](https://substack.com/redirect/47e94bcc-217c-46f6-aeca-7fdd7137dffc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I will talk about what it is like for us when political events occur, what I think about them, and how I think they affect kids like me. I will also share other points of view from my fellow classmates and friends. I am not going to use AI or ChatGPT or anything like that to help because I want you to hear it from me.
So the talk going around school last week was how Trump signed an order to dismantle the department of education.
A few days ago I got really worried when I heard about this. I was just sitting at the table getting ready for school like any other start of the day when my friends started texting about what Trump did the day before, but I didn't understand. I hadn't heard of anything that had happened the night before.
When I asked them what had happened, my friend sent me the title of an article that said "Trump signs an order to dismantle the department of education." And that's when I started to freak out. I asked my mom what this meant, and she told me not to worry too much about it. But I was still worried, so after school, I did some research, talked to my friends, and found some answers.
Now, I'm gonna be honest, most of the articles that popped up were a little boring to a kid like me, but I was determined to learn more about the department of education and how dismantling it was going to affect me. I was worried that my school was going to lose a lot of funding and therefore after school programs and materials, and after some research I finally got a clear answer of what the department did and that I think I was right.
The department of education oversees the funding of public schools, which means that to keep up, my school might have to get rid of after school programs and even fire a few teachers. But I also learned that I was not going to be affected as much as some others. The department of education also oversees student loans and other programs that help low-income students, which means thousands of these kids might be forced to drop out of school.
But I'm really annoyed about why the president is cutting this department. And he is doing it to pay for rich people's taxes. I think that this is an absurd reason to do such a thing, and many people at my school agree with me. Why are rich people so worried about getting more money and don't care about kids? Why don't we mean anything to them? Thousands of low-income and disabled students are going to be affected by this order and many other civil rights laws for public schools will be dumped as well, just to pay for a few rich people's taxes.
Other kids will also be affected because the lack of funds will cause schools to only be able to afford some materials and teachers. This means that classes will also be larger due to lack of teachers. I'm worried they won't be able to help all of us anymore.
I also believe that getting rid of this department would be giving up on our future because of the many kids that will have to stop learning or will not learn enough. So I hope, along with many of my peers, that the order fails and the department of education stays as it is, even though it does not look very good for this hope.
But I also want to do more than just hope, which is why I am starting this Substack.
I want my voice to be heard and people to understand what it is like to be a kid while these events occur. I also want people to look at these things from a kid's point of view, which may help you understand what your child is going through and maybe just make you look at it differently.
Thank you for reading this substack, which will be the first of many. I plan to post a new [substack on politics and what is going on at schools](https://substack.com/redirect/18e2db2e-a600-4ab4-9d7b-e6f87cdd76a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) every weekend or every other weekend. Please ask me in the comments if there is anything you would like to know our thoughts on.
It is free to [subscribe to my substack](https://substack.com/redirect/47e94bcc-217c-46f6-aeca-7fdd7137dffc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), because, like I mentioned at the beginning, I want people to know that kids are a part of this world, too, and because I think if a lot of people subscribe it will show us that people really do care about us.
But if you would like to [support my work financially,](https://substack.com/redirect/47e94bcc-217c-46f6-aeca-7fdd7137dffc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) I am offering the minimum subscription amounts that substack will let me do. $5.00 a month to subscribe or $50.00 a year (discount for yearly). I tried to do $2 a month and $18 a year, but it wouldn't let me. So if the minimum is too much, don't feel bad about being a free subscriber. I think sharing is the most important thing.
I will send out messages asking paid subscribers to submit questions that I will try to answer. My dad just did an ask me anything and I think that might be a good idea, too.
But in the meantime, thank you for reading this substack, please share it with your friends and family, and again I plan to publish a new one every weekend or every other weekend.
Thank you!
Grady
PS-- I wrote this by myself but my dad did help me set up the account, checked for typos, and helped me add links.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you join my focus group?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am excited and honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC.

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'm pleased to invite you to join my official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable us to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19943%2E9716520%2ERButMC)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19943%2E9716520%2ERButMC)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19943%2E9716520%2ERButMC)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19943%2E9716520%2ERButMC)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250405-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19943%2E9716520%2ERButMC)

I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. And that last piece is why I want to hear from you. | | Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: If you haven’t heard, we’ll catch you up
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250405-1303-foote&t=1001&akid=1303%2E342411%2EFnWzWV ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, if you
haven’t heard, we’ll catch you up.

Elon Musk made a desperate attempt to influence Tuesday’s Wisconsin
Supreme Court race by offering $1 million to two voters as a "gift" for
casting their ballots.

Peter, if that
sounds suspicious, it’s because it is. Musk attempted to sway the election
through spending millions of dollars to buy votes. And it’s against the
law. Fortunately, Wisconsin voters saw right through this ploy and
decisively elected liberal judge Susan Crawford.

This victory in Wisconsin is more than just a state win – it’s a win for
our democracy. People are tired of billionaires like Musk and corrupt
politicians like Trump undermining our system to advance their own selfish
agendas.

Now, we must build power to stop figures like Trump and Musk from shaping
our future. That’s where our Squad comes in.

Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC are fighting on the front lines to hold
Trump, Musk, and others accountable for their actions. They’re speaking
truth to power, standing up for working people, and pushing for policies
that prioritize our communities — not the ultra-rich and powerful.

The bottom line is,
Peter: we can’t do this work
without you.

To continue this fight, we need to reach more voters, build stronger
grassroots campaigns, and ensure that we have the resources to stand up to
the likes of Trump and Musk.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250405-movement.Lkx5C6&refcode=em20250405-1303&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1303%2E342411%2EFnWzWV ]Will you chip in $3 or more today to fuel this momentum
and help our Squad keep fighting for the people?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250405-movement.Lkx5C6&refcode=em20250405-1303&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1303%2E342411%2EFnWzWV ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1303%2E342411%2EFnWzWV

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

| | | [](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/sa-eVelyXrwpZw7dl82k3QrmWFArUPV77Lf7j7RIJSTdL3bmWyjk9fB1gmQr4CMg_Anp-niHdYfk7gwPNWVKdJLJGpnb7AnRfdbLZEjMzv1MbV_P5ob0ZBg5_TH_Z_-JNpwe1QqiB043BQa8WCGKDN4WJXrD_6aAnvnZmlehF0Goqh3Bq_j0WElqpHStnQ_VMDtz6PqbS8MUN8f9P9sH9yYHlwhS2aAIGw-hDMusfWlERTUZrHP-x_PhBNxnaHXv-n_cAIHzOeRImp6UQ3_j34jo3pKTNjjdOTLUzDsBPDSrZRTjsEebGDTtrA40tDUAwiTdSjvkfzsVfqQ7M1mCSTGFbFcCEOcQl21Hyv7TFijEDPYJ1D2IwpkzKt4EBTj31SHys3n34mfAqkUdIEEvKPzxp54vSA9Ob4EmtD8OV1dr-EbENRQC8U049lP0ODhucXVxfA/qlzdimmU--kzHUER5QU2N57gfrmpTsn_/7)
