Peter,This is difficult to hear - but it's critically important for you to understand.Vulnerable children are being abducted and sold into sex trafficking at the highest rates in history.A **massive surge in immigration** , **skyrocketing drug use** , and a **22% increase in online recruitment** of victims during the pandemic are all to blame for the estimated **50,000 children** who will be sold into sex trafficking in the United States this year.Rescuing minors from their abusers and combatting the multi-billion-dollar human trafficking and child sex "industry" -- which is larger than the global cocaine market -- takes a great deal of resources. **[**At the Sound of Freedom Foundation, we need your emergency support to equip our agents with the tools and resources they need to rescue defenseless children from modern-day slavery. Please help with your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more today.**](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/w1bXkQj75SGNjPCNKBRuoEZ4BymN1_7RemWWJpUztiyqGx2kzRYeO6XiDxkQZRk7q_FldhI0oDKYHqZ4QU6y-a81wCzf3rcVhh8I7KSLdfLI0yR_Lrhn685MCbtomPEevulo--Il4ubqorsyGSSoz9AaOVUljB-QbWoa41CWylje0x5imNwN9zbtrpHsz2XCI7V7tYEZfWnpLpuERmIPBubeyO7NPsHq64CRnoXs3MM4l18szxueNkJj-l1KEMQmE1LdBImrEcTODKt3Gmgzphd6fMhuQl9oTH5WjwE-oxrzMKF6gyh5lob2xYu9CJvcKwkFaEOgyhBFlAtHOIlHDTRfozC2nbyZm6Jk9Ly0hR7DZmO0CQFP1-_C7X_CVKQQicYVrIPvjNK3tZuhW96eE5C3EAIVcuzLnMDrQwkp7B81v7tJep7HZ567FFhlG9V9FEvZdw/w-YWU55pCfe6IcuJxpX4BP35O-b2YBDo/7)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/jQfdqiWOwShTgTCU30gplkNuvHGtZWpT0Zgl4FJbtMK5RtM9kx5U96WAIQH2tKteK-gHiS8h3CcyosFUc_2cLVnwWfK0gX2Hcfqf4RSlkysKwMsctXkPJQiKy4HKGQCLWQk-3zKA4aC1j-KmEQSHaDRmek3hv8_JED6P2Xu2GG5UABCg-skNMcdJy6Htk14ysGjHKfS335KQtCEFb3lub_iP-Z5LLsPhsx2rihSMOov6ugY3pIBu0yWe3k0c-wqfiKYgn2fIgFys6YXzd3c2aIwHX1eQLNYvY5adky9b5gGDu542NgIzlLFoul9OnxtrxdMKEDlHWisBGFDy-MTsjlm9N9zTpkYamFAyz-N9_bW-hJsHYQwc11uxXMwRNP3zR-O9AGpj3OI2g8MzsBjcPhNnsU5ABALpiA-ZRqkXpHjnQMvVRE7u0QLhLv0942BeYlSYrA/nM4Fpw3_oo1JbHovsDv2oVbAlEVdw2Hp/7)

As the producer of the feature film _Sound of Freedom_ -- which you have likely seen or heard about -- I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry. Based on a true story, _Sound of Freedom_ tells the gut-wrenching story of a brother and sister -- Miguel and Rocio Aguilar -- who were abducted and sold to be used as sex slaves ... taken by organized criminals who tricked their father._Sound of Freedom_ was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities. Now, through The Sound of Freedom Foundation, we identify and track cases of child abduction and trafficking, and we tirelessly search for and rescue defenseless victims. **[God's children are NOT for sale, which is why we must act immediately to SAVE these innocent lives from sex trafficking. I hope I can count on your gift of $25, $50, or more to help us reunite young girls and boys with their families who are praying for their return.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/L8GWRnmV46mB_V_XhHq7bsFBJ_T8cyAXivgv3R_FoScPNfAEQdp5mNTiMjDbXNFFuMO2JKYKkT-1uBHY88x3GNgr9N7HBBi_hDvP7GPBE16UCASewnHv5nBPDYZW6scNhe4Kv6uXvJ6YBUonioiaWwqsRGt--cyGnttzQqrwL4z-V25Oyt12cDrioAodsHg8uUaXn4-xjdYp8feAgEWP4EoEQ5DvuEH4-Bo4S-_g4bSLEKAo4s7aHrcrOKIswnllA4jfq886t1ZltXrIF0d3H-o9GICTRh_HRrXHtTJJJ68CQDr2oOBnXiMyL0qExM9I7LJryzPid1Z2vYIzeYfGJuXTQ1SuluNJ2BKlxxHvm0xXoYQ3WRUfQzoQfEIFzWg1yj_CSUrrz8a140G3qpBh4mtCwUIWwM79tC9GlFdIlJqyEf6fJwg1HbbciI15BUrCqBv4KA/x8igjJKmA76BLz4z4aGPNomaDiatZ3dC/7)**

clean_body: | | | Peter,This is difficult to hear - but it's critically important for you to understand.Vulnerable children are being abducted and sold into sex trafficking at the highest rates in history.A massive surge in immigration , skyrocketing drug use , and a 22% increase in online recruitment of victims during the pandemic are all to blame for the estimated 50,000 children who will be sold into sex trafficking in the United States this year.Rescuing minors from their abusers and combatting the multi-billion-dollar human trafficking and child sex "industry" -- which is larger than the global cocaine market -- takes a great deal of resources. As the producer of the feature film Sound of Freedom -- which you have likely seen or heard about -- I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry. Based on a true story, Sound of Freedom tells the gut-wrenching story of a brother and sister -- Miguel and Rocio Aguilar -- who were abducted and sold to be used as sex slaves ... taken by organized criminals who tricked their father.Sound of Freedom was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities. Now, through The Sound of Freedom Foundation, we identify and track cases of child abduction and trafficking, and we tirelessly search for and rescue defenseless victims. Shockingly, the average age of victims is 12 years old and 79% of all human trafficking cases are for sexual exploitation. In many cases, abduction occurs internationally and there are costs associated with hiring attorneys, filing petitions, and even traveling to the country where the child is located.While the cost of returning an abducted child varies depending on the case, the truth is that the rescue of a missing child is an incredibly complex and expensive mission. At the Sound of Freedom Foundation, we firmly believe that no family deserves to end the search for their child because there isn't the financial ability to continue their fight! Imagine learning that your child, grandchild, or family friend vanished and having no idea where in the world they are and if they're being sold by sex traffickers.It makes your stomach churn just to think about such a thing. Together, we can set them free!Many blessings,Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom , Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 5442 Thornwood Drive, San Jose CA 95123 |

name: David Hogg
subject: This is what sets Leaders We Deserve apart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I hear the same kind of frustrated reaction to Democratic fundraising a lot.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250405-1&t=1&akid=1938%2E587540%2EsGP3yr)
Peter, I hear the same kind of frustrated reaction to Democratic fundraising a lot:
_**“Why the f*ck are you asking me for $5 when Trump is destroying our country and Democrats aren’t doing anything about it?”**_
I can’t speak for every group, but I do know what sets Leaders We Deserve apart.
We represent a generation of people who walked out of their schools, marching with millions of their peers to demand action on gun violence and mass shootings.
Young people are at the forefront of progressive movements, fighting for solutions on issues like gun reform, climate change, student debt, and Gaza, to name a few.
Now, these same young leaders are old enough to actually run for political office, right at the time when we need a massive movement of young people in power.
**Leaders We Deserve exists to transform these movements into political power.** Running for office is more expensive than ever — and these young leaders need our support to help lead their movements into state legislatures and Congress. We know that the billionaire class isn’t showing up to bankroll these campaigns, so it’s not an exaggeration to say they can’t win these fights without grassroots support.
**[Peter, can you contribute $5 to power our transformational movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250405-1?refcode=em20250405-1938&amount=5&refcode2=1938_587540_sGP3yr&akid=1938%2E587540%2EsGP3yr)**
**The young candidates that Leaders We Deserve supports are gamechangers. They will revitalize the Democratic Party and revolutionize our government.**
Our candidates are leading the fight to rebuild our political system. And they aren’t rebuilding the same political system that brought us school shootings, climate change, and all of the bullsh*t younger generations have to deal with in America.
They’re building something better — a system that actually works for the people.
I believe that a big part of the answer to Donald Trump is building a movement of young people who will take back the reins of our government from the far right.
**Young people are up to this challenge.** If history has taught us anything, it's that great generations aren’t born, they’re made in the crucible of awful circumstances.
So when you give a donation to Leaders We Deserve, you aren’t just throwing out money at the status quo. You are investing in a different vision for what’s possible.
**[Please — pitch in $5 now to join our movement and fight for our future.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250405-1?refcode=em20250405-1938&amount=5&refcode2=1938_587540_sGP3yr&akid=1938%2E587540%2EsGP3yr)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250405-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1938&refcode2=1938_587540_sGP3yr&akid=1938%2E587540%2EsGP3yr)**
We can only do this work with your support. I deeply appreciate your generosity.
Thank you,
David Hogg

name: Scott Forrester, Campaign Manager
subject: Our numbers as of this morning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
This is Scott — Deb’s Campaign Manager.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1152%2E400544%2E_jRa38)
Hi. This is Scott — Deb’s Campaign Manager.
Your support means a lot. You’re a key part of the campaign we’re building to elect Deb and change the game for New Mexico. And with our first major fundraising deadline on Monday, I wanted to check in with you.
**Here’s where our fundraising is as of this morning:**
**Stretch Goal:** $250,000
**Raised So Far:** $193,500
**Left to Raise: $56,500**
**[We’ve got two days left to close this gap. And to do it, we’re counting on a big surge of grassroots support. If Deb can count on you, will you pitch in $5 to help us reach our stretch goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250405_1_goal?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1152&refcode2=1152_400544__jRa38&akid=1152%2E400544%2E_jRa38)**
**I’ll be blunt.** This governor’s race in New Mexico? It’s going to be a fight — competitive, expensive, _and_ absolutely critical.
With Donald Trump back in the White House, MAGA forces are more emboldened than ever, and they’re coming for New Mexico. They want to flip this state red — and they’re willing to launch smear campaigns and spend big to do it.
**But they’re up against Deb.**
She’s a fighter. Someone who won’t flinch. Someone who’s fierce enough to take a stand and fight for the bright future all New Mexicans deserve. She’s never backed down from a challenge, and she’s not about to start now.
That’s why every single grassroots donation right now matters. To everyone watching this race, we want to send one message: momentum and grassroots power are on our side.
**[So, pitch in $5 to help make sure our first fundraising report is as fierce as Deb.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250405_1_goal?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1152&refcode2=1152_400544__jRa38&akid=1152%2E400544%2E_jRa38)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250405_1_goal?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1152&refcode2=1152_400544__jRa38&akid=1152%2E400544%2E_jRa38)**
Thank you,
Scott
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250405-1&t=2&refcode2=1152_400544__jRa38&akid=1152%2E400544%2E_jRa38)**

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we) This survey is exclusively for you regarding Donald Trump. You have been chosen to represent Democrats in your area. [**_Please answer within 3 minutes of opening this email. >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=3&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)
* * *
[**BREAKING PRESIDENTIAL ALERT: THIS IS A TRAVESTY! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=4&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we) **Speaking to reporter, Trump Says He 's 'Not Joking' About Seeking a Third Term in Defiance of Constitution** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=5&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we) [**_OUR DEMOCRACY IS UNDER ATTACK - so we need another 6,712 top Democrats to take our live poll before the end of the day, BUT YOUR RESPONSE IS STILL MISSING!!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=6&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)

**Tell us NOW:**

[**DO YOU THINK DONALD TRUMP SHOULD SEEK A THIRD PRESIDENTIAL TERM?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=7&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=8&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=9&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=10&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)
---
Donald Trump's **DISASTROUS** administration has **TOTALLY UPENDED** the federal government and other American institutions, going through with policies such as slapping tariffs on key allies, firing over 100,000 federal workers, dismantling key agencies, and much more!

**AND IT GETS WORSE:** Trump's horrible decisions are drastically cratering America's credibility with our allies worldwide, as well as hurting Americans within.

After all this, Trump still says he's the best president in American history. And now he wants to seek a **THIRD TERM?!**

**WE CAN 'T LET TRUMP KEEP RUINING AMERICA FOR THIRD TIME!**

[**But if we don 't receive 6,712 more responses from TOP Democrats like you, we won't be able to show the rest of the country how UNPOPULAR it would be for Trump to seek a third presidential term.

_We selected you to represent your area. Please don 't wait til it's too late. Tell us, NOW:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=11&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)
[**DO YOU THINK DONALD TRUMP SHOULD SEEK A THIRD PRESIDENTIAL TERM?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=12&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)
| | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=13&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=14&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60471?t=15&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)
---
Awaiting your response,

_Fight for Reform_
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=16&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=17&akid=22978%2E4449941%2Eyv_9we)

FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.

#################################
Fellow Patriot,

**[BIG NEWS:](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=2e959b16b0f24aa8ad4260495efc6c32&_e=IPUZ2Z32pl5jKHilBJc5T8BKbuco5rbcJkhclJThzJmD54q-_5xBTXCtI40mov1sMRhCBnKYt84LWDPdxEzUO_oWIDa3zg3p87-UAHekrlx2v4x0IEerFYZbOnLW4-fo7gjmgvJotWW7bF7XxYP8%3D) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025._

_We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats._

| The adage goes: _Once is an accident, twice is a coincidence, three times is a pattern._

In 2022, I flipped this seat, and Republicans thought it was a fluke. In 2024, I became the first Democrat in a century to HOLD this seat, and Republicans said, "Well, she just got lucky a second time." This cycle will be important again–they still believe that West Michigan is theirs. But we can prove the pattern.

The Cook Political Report has named MI-03 as one of the country’s most competitive districts. And with two Republican opponents already lining up to take this seat, we’re wasting no time building the resources to defend it.

**Republicans have a historically slim 3-seat majority. body:
You’re not going to want to miss this opportunity.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105237896/537795460/1328794144?refcode=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2OGZhNjMzLTNiMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0nwJp4gEfJeaG84wTsSaqAlVU-dL0cCixT7gYoG9CYY=&emci=0b9faba5-ca10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)

You might be asking yourself why I would go head-to-head with Gen Z in front of a live audience. The answer’s simple: I love a good challenge. **That’s why I’m excited to invite you to join JanePAC and MoveOn’s[Boomers vs. Zoomers: Celeb Trivia Night on April 9.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105237897/537795461/1261390751?refcode=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2OGZhNjMzLTNiMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0nwJp4gEfJeaG84wTsSaqAlVU-dL0cCixT7gYoG9CYY=)** It’s going to be a lively, cross-generational trivia showdown where some of us seasoned show business and advocacy veterans — including **Dolores Huerta, Whoopi Goldberg,** and **Tony Goldwyn** — will go head-to-head with rising stars like **Beanie Feldstein, Quannah ChasingHorse,** and **Leah Thomas.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105237898/537795462/1261390751?refcode=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2OGZhNjMzLTNiMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0nwJp4gEfJeaG84wTsSaqAlVU-dL0cCixT7gYoG9CYY=) | [**🎟️ Reserve your ticket now →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105237899/537795463/1261390751?refcode=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2OGZhNjMzLTNiMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0nwJp4gEfJeaG84wTsSaqAlVU-dL0cCixT7gYoG9CYY=)

And while we’ll be flexing our trivia muscles on everything from pop culture to climate action, the event is about much more than bragging rights.
Between rounds, we’ll be talking about the power of multigenerational organizing — and what it will take to build a brighter future _together._
**Because if we’re serious about creating a firewall of resistance against the Trump administration and the billionaires backing him, we need to come together like never before to elect bold, progressive leaders at every level of government.**
**[So don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity! RSVP today to join us virtually on April 9 at 5:30 p.m. PT/8:30 p.m. ET.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105237900/537795464/1261390751?refcode=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.368fa633-3b12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2OGZhNjMzLTNiMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0nwJp4gEfJeaG84wTsSaqAlVU-dL0cCixT7gYoG9CYY=)**

clean_body: You’re not going to want to miss this opportunity. | You might be asking yourself why I would go head-to-head with Gen Z in front of a live audience. The answer’s simple: I love a good challenge. That’s why I’m excited to invite you to join JanePAC and MoveOn’s= It’s going to be a lively, cross-generational trivia showdown where some of us seasoned show business and advocacy veterans — including Dolores Huerta, Whoopi Goldberg, and Tony Goldwyn — will go head-to-head with rising stars like Beanie Feldstein, Quannah ChasingHorse, and Leah Thomas. = | = And while we’ll be flexing our trivia muscles on everything from pop culture to climate action, the event is about much more than bragging rights. Between rounds, we’ll be talking about the power of multigenerational organizing — and what it will take to build a brighter future together. Because if we’re serious about creating a firewall of resistance against the Trump administration and the billionaires backing him, we need to come together like never before to elect bold, progressive leaders at every level of government. = = I hope to see you there! – Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: "We will see you in court" | = | It's official: California is SUING Donald Trump. Donald Trump and Robert F. Kennedy are both working to cut $11 billion in healthcare funding, which will have a devastating impact on rural hospitals, emergency services and other health programs. But we are fighting back, and Attorney General Bontas has officially joined a lawsuit to stop this heartless plan directly in its tracks. = = = Donald Trump woke up one day and decided to unlawfully terminate $11 billion in critical healthcare funding because he’s decided that “it’s no longer necessary.” Californians alone stand to lose more than $972 million from these illegal cancellations. But we aren’t just going to stand around and complain. Our California Strong leaders are standing up and taking the fight directly to Donald Trump. In other words...Donald Trump — we will see you in court. = = = = = = Thank you! \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. | **“I rise with the intention of getting in some good trouble.”** Peter, those are the words Sen. Cory Booker spoke as he began the speech that broke the record for the longest Senate floor speech in history — referencing Georgia’s very own Rep. John Lewis. And I believe John Lewis would be incredibly proud to watch as Sen. Booker’s protest against Donald Trump’s extremist agenda broke a record previously held by someone filibustering against the Civil Rights Act of 1957. Sen. Booker’s good trouble made HISTORY, and now, we need to show our appreciation for his unwavering commitment to defending our democracy. [If you haven’t done so yet, will you sign our card to thank Cory Booker now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105239311/537796999/-1539987030?source=SBD_DPG_EM_CARD_040525_Thank-Booker-FWD-RE_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_T2_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTllY2E5Yi0zYzEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_e3bfkgvUROoXzqxs0O2SvZEDRf_ukfJ6GfS47-Org=&emci=fdfff78c-9311-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=919eca9b-3c12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43566853) | [SIGN THE CARD: THANK CORY BOOKER!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105239330/537797018/-1539987030?source=SBD_DPG_EM_CARD_040525_Thank-Booker-FWD-RE_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_T2_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTllY2E5Yi0zYzEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_e3bfkgvUROoXzqxs0O2SvZEDRf_ukfJ6GfS47-Org=&emci=fdfff78c-9311-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=919eca9b-3c12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43566853) | | **[THANK CORY BOOKER »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105239342/537797034/-1539987030?source=SBD_DPG_EM_CARD_040525_Thank-Booker-FWD-RE_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_T2_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTllY2E5Yi0zYzEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_e3bfkgvUROoXzqxs0O2SvZEDRf_ukfJ6GfS47-Org=&emci=fdfff78c-9311-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=919eca9b-3c12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43566853)**

And I believe John Lewis would be incredibly proud to watch as Sen. | | Peter — Saturday, April 5th is **Hands Off Democracy Day.** Folks across the country are taking to the streets to fight back against the recent unlawful and extreme actions of this Administration, and I encourage you to join us.

It’s more important now than ever that we use our voices to fight back. This Administration is trying to suppress our voices, undermine our democracy, and rule with extremism — and we can’t let them get away with it.

**_[Click here to see a list of rallies near you>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105240553/537798504/1464114150?end_date=2025-04-06T03%3A59%3A59.999Z&is_virtual_flexible=false&start_date=2025-03-29T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&refcode=EM_NBI_MT_202504_EN_HandsOff_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_HandsOff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzk4NzljZS0zZDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9t83erjA2Zazj0GBGfcdNgLMIuWYRYGhw8TrFISQxk=&emci=109879ce-3d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c9879ce-3d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2678920)_**

Our mass mobilization on Saturday is our message to the Administration that we do not consent to their destruction of our government and democracy. We’re determined to use our voices in the way democracy was intended to function.

We’re stronger in numbers, Peter. I encourage you to take to the streets with your friends and family this weekend. The time to act is now, we have too much at stake.

And once again, here’s **[a list of rallies near you to spread to your neighbors, friends, and family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105240554/537798505/1464114150?end_date=2025-04-06T03%3A59%3A59.999Z&is_virtual_flexible=false&start_date=2025-03-29T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&refcode=EM_NBI_MT_202504_EN_HandsOff_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_HandsOff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzk4NzljZS0zZDEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9t83erjA2Zazj0GBGfcdNgLMIuWYRYGhw8TrFISQxk=&emci=109879ce-3d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c9879ce-3d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2678920)**

I hope to see you there.

— Mike

name: Chris Murdock
subject: One Thousand Five Hundred and Four
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee
body:
| .
---
| [ ](http://email.mg.advocacyai.com/c/eJxMzc1KAzEUQOGnSXZT8jtNF1nYYgUVREFd30nSzqVpMkyuI_P2ogvp9sDhi14lJQfLk5dbo53rrZN89KeTiGEAE2K0EmwwSateJG3dTshhFzl6CIQLENbSPTy_0hs9Nuz2-nDoL2586erH_j4TlNZdzNNaPlfxzoyAuNQAYQXchHrl2Y9EU2P6jqkjU8f6NVMqZVPnM599nL4xZ2z9lhlxvgLmv4lu6fSbOfl_mC9e_QQAAP__zXJE6Q)
---
Peter,

In 1957 segregationist Strom Thurmond stood on the Senate Floor and tried to block the passage of the Civil Rights Act.

It was the longest speech in Senate history.

Earlier this week, Cory Booker, a descendant of slaves, a man whose parents fought FOR the Civil Rights Act, stood in the same place and broke Strom Thurmond’s record.

Senator Booker stood on the floor for one thousand five hundred and four minutes.

When I saw Senator Booker standing on the Senate floor, I knew he was not doing it for himself. He was doing it for the mom in Memphis who has to work two jobs to put food on the table.

He was doing it for the retiree in Knoxville, who fears Elon Musk’s cuts to Social Security.

He was doing it for the young child in Johnson City, who had their science lessons interrupted to do gun safety lock down drills at school.

He was doing it for all of us.

We owe Senator Booker a thank you. Will you sign our thank you card to Senator Booker today?
---

Best,
Chris Murdock

Dear Derek

The **2025 Young Democrats of America (YDA) National Convention** is coming up, and you won't want to miss this incredible opportunity to connect, learn, and lead! From **July 17-20, 2025** , we're heading to **Philadelphia, PA** --the city where democracy was born--to celebrate **250 years of progress and power up the next generation of changemakers.** This year's theme, **"Philly250: The Next Generation,"** is all about honoring the history of our nation while driving forward the bold, progressive future we're building together. Get ready for inspiring speakers, hands-on campaign training, groundbreaking policy discussions, and an amazing chance to meet Young Democrats from all across the country. 🔥 **Be Part of the Movement - Register & Book Your Hotel Now!** 🔥

clean_body: | | Dear Derek The 2025 Young Democrats of America (YDA) National Convention is coming up, and you won't want to miss this incredible opportunity to connect, learn, and lead! From July 17-20, 2025 , we're heading to Philadelphia, PA --the city where democracy was born--to celebrate 250 years of progress and power up the next generation of changemakers. This year's theme, "Philly250: The Next Generation," is all about honoring the history of our nation while driving forward the bold, progressive future we're building together. Get ready for inspiring speakers, hands-on campaign training, groundbreaking policy discussions, and an amazing chance to meet Young Democrats from all across the country. 🔥 Be Part of the Movement - Register & Book Your Hotel Now! 🔥 🔹 Sign up today: 🔹 Secure your room: The excitement is building, and we want YOU to be part of it. Whether you're a seasoned activist or new to the movement, the YDA National Convention is where young leaders come together to make an impact. Let's make history in Philadelphia--I can 't wait to see you there! In solidarity, Quentin Wathum-Ocama President, Young Democrats of America | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: Help me Defeat Kamala Harris Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

Dear Friend,

You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff.

As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six
court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public
Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract
cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over
one billion dollars.

It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my
home safe is the best job in the world.

Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against
the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the
line and kept Riverside County safe.

Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities
is graver than ever before.

[https://secure.winred.com/chad-bianco-for-governor-2026/wma38113da532f99?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250401_BDG_BIANCO_SCBFG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for
Governor of California.

TODAY, I’M ASKING YOU TO HELP ME DEFEAT RADICAL KAMALA HARRIS IN THE
RACE FOR CALIFORNIA GOVERNOR.
[https://secure.winred.com/chad-bianco-for-governor-2026/wma38113da532f99?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250401_BDG_BIANCO_SCBFG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat
rule have been.

There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself,
a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against
Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in
public safety that we are living with today.

Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to
forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.

But you know how these years have been:

* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed
wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were
nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix”
it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with
nothing to show for it.

As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.

Well Californians ought to be ashamed.

There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of
living is unbearable...

Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned
dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies
like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage
improvement.

These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are
having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the
misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.

And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid
California’s best days are behind us.”

But listen, here’s something you need to remember...

REPUBLICANS TURNED THINGS AROUND BY ELECTING RONALD REAGAN AS GOVERNOR
OF CALIFORNIA.

AND WE CAN DO THAT AGAIN.

BUT THERE’S NO WAY I CAN PULL IT OFF WITHOUT YOU.

THAT’S WHY I’M ASKING YOU TO RUSH YOUR $35 DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
TODAY.
[https://secure.winred.com/chad-bianco-for-governor-2026/wma38113da532f99?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250401_BDG_BIANCO_SCBFG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years
of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on
the party that betrayed them.

A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating
among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is
even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A.
residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in
10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction.

The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years
because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their
government.

The time is right...

But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots
movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58
counties.

WHEN YOU RUSH YOUR BIANCO FOR CALIFORNIA CONTRIBUTION OF $35 OR
MORE...
[https://secure.winred.com/chad-bianco-for-governor-2026/wma38113da532f99?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250401_BDG_BIANCO_SCBFG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door
knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message:

_You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of
us less safe, less prosperous, and less free._

WE RELY ON EVERYDAY AMERICANS LIKE YOU—_Not liberal Hollywood
elites_—to fund this campaign.

THAT’S WHY I’M ASKING YOU TO CHIP IN TO MY CAMPAIGN AND GIVE US
THE RESOURCES WE NEED TO GO UP AGAINST THE KAMALA HARRIS FUNDRAISING
GOLIATH.
[https://secure.winred.com/chad-bianco-for-governor-2026/wma38113da532f99?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250401_BDG_BIANCO_SCBFG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris
is going to come out in full force in her home state of California.
But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the
years of Democrat rule.

Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.

This race is the toughest in the nation.

But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in
California.

Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem:
when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put
them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism
problem. It is an accountability problem.

I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for
years.

And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid
of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.

That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.

Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win
statewide in California as a Republican.

When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time...

...we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies
spreading to the rest of the country.

And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for
Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their
extremist agenda.

It all depends on you!

DONATE

Thank you and God Bless,

Sheriff Chad Bianco

[https://secure.winred.com/chad-bianco-for-governor-2026/wma38113da532f99?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250401_BDG_BIANCO_SCBFG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

Chad Bianco For Governor

Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026

PO BOX 706

RIVERSIDE, CA 92502

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=283917&trkid=648072986&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

Rebecca Cooke is a small business owner and nonprofit leader who grew up working on her family's dairy farm in Eau Claire, Wisconsin.

**She's running for Congress to fight for the economic well-being, rights, and freedoms of working families and rural communities.**

Rebecca knows the importance of bringing working class voices to fight for everyday people — not billionaires. Her opponent, on the other hand, is pushing an agenda that benefits the wealthy at the expense of hardworking families.

We're proud to stand with Rebecca Cooke because we know she's the leader Wisconsin deserves, and the representation we need in Congress right now.

name: John Fetterman
subject: I'll always stand with workers ✊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10028%2E434096%2EEhuSC1)
| | |
---
Hey, Derek, it's John Fetterman.
When the voters in PA sent me to Washington, I was clear that I’ll _always_ stand with workers in PA + across this country.
The union way of life is sacred. It’s what built Pennsylvania and this nation.
**And every single union worker walking the picket line needs to know that we have their back here in Washington.**
So I wanted to let you know that I just introduced a new bill – the Food Secure Strikers Act – to make sure that if a worker goes on strike, the government doesn’t punish them by taking away things like food stamps.
**[But if this bill is gonna have a chance of making it through a Republican-controlled Congress, we need a surge of grassroots momentum. Will you add your name in support of our bill to help make sure striking workers can feed their families while they fight for what’s right?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50978?code=jtk33-su-fl&email=&zip=&t=2&akid=10028%2E434096%2EEhuSC1)**
| | [SIGN NOW >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50978?code=jtk33-su-fl&email=&zip=&t=3&akid=10028%2E434096%2EEhuSC1)
---
Workers should never have to choose between fighting for fair working conditions and feeding their families.
_It’s past time we scrap this restriction._
To protect workers’ right to organize, we have to make sure they can put food on the table for themselves and their families while on strike – and they’re already dealing with enough uncertainty by having to go on strike in the first place.
**[So if you’re with me, will you please add your name now to show your support?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50978?code=jtk33-su-fl&email=&zip=&t=4&akid=10028%2E434096%2EEhuSC1)**
Thanks yinz,
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=jtk33-su-fl-footer&t=5&refcode2=10028_434096_EhuSC1&akid=10028%2E434096%2EEhuSC1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=10028%2E434096%2EEhuSC1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=10028%2E434096%2EEhuSC1)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

So I wanted to let you know that I just introduced a new bill – the Food Secure Strikers Act – to make sure that if a worker goes on strike, the government doesn’t punish them by taking away things like food stamps. | | Workers should never have to choose between fighting for fair working conditions and feeding their families. name: Doug White
subject: Today April 5th: Stand Up For HANDS OFF!
body:

| | HANDS OFF is a nationwide day of protest. Information about how to participate in your area can be found by contacting your local Democrat Party office or through [mobilize](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/ccPO6u_i1/c?w=vMasdTtR4qps1w6wvUzfbIsZSYs0uXUzbWiCa-zE7K4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvIiwiciI6IjMzZmZlYWYyLTFkZGUtNGY3Ni1hYzg5LTM2MzI1MTZiNzcyNSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9).
---
| | | |
---
| | What is the solution? Goodness knows we don’t need anymore problems. As I see, hear and feel the palpable tension among my neighbors I am forever looking for a solution and it may be in sight. Tragically the damage done before the cure may be so damning and entrenched that it will take great will for many years just to undo what has been done in a few short weeks.
We know there is a project 2025 which provides a, supposedly, well thought out roadmap for the far-rights future. But it is being implemented by some of the most incompetent people on the planet. I say that out of fact not anger, bitterness or desire to ridicule. They are just a bunch of buffoons and so if they don’t knock us back to the stone age by destroying our economy, causing some horrendous environmental disaster or, heaven forbid, blow us all up we can win this.
---
| | [](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/ccPO6u_i1/c?w=kGQlfrN_-RjoqS9lVTXJbwxu9eE3ollx2RlqEPTz--o.)
---
| | Why do I remain optimistic? Because despite the political ignorance of American citizens the game that the far-right has been playing so successfully in the past is now catching up with them. Their dumbed down drum beat of Democrat doom is showing wear. With an electorate where a third do not vote at all, I would venture a guess that less than 10%, probably far less than 10%, are sufficiently politically aware to make an informed decision that has made the lies of the far-right believable fallacies. It does not stretch our imagination to know how this was possible. If the only context you have is your own life and you live in let’s say Yakima County where the fentanyl incidence are twice the state average and wages are half the state average it is pretty easy to conclude that things are not good and when someone gives you a justification to believe that then it is easy to make that belief your reality. The mistake that the far-right has made is believing that ignorance is the same as stupid; it is not.
---
| |
---
| | If you have this large group of people whose political belief system was based on ludicrous and contradicting lies shored up by bullying and vilifying marginalized groups and Democrats who are now faced with losing their jobs, family members deported, losing access to their children’s healthcare, rising food and gas prices and, OMG, a war with Canada! This goes beyond a wakeup call - this is a – before your morning coffee bitch slaps both ways. As the reality of the far-right starts hitting home the ignorant become enlightened. Join us Saturday April 5th[mobilize](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/ccPO6u_i1/c?w=J262OWPpcXVBb2M3JXYG1VYx0slSN1i9NmOFQId6oFs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvIiwiciI6Ijc0ZTFkNWU1LTEzN2YtNGYwNS1hOTUwLWM4MmE4MzRmNmFiOSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) The signs of our success are there and they are getting brighter and more frequent. From the floundering of our local politicians like Congressional District 4 Representative Dan Newhouse’s silly attempts to spin MAGA driven legislation which will have catastrophic consequences to his constituents, us, to newly minted and hubris abundant Congressional District 5 Michael Baumgartner going to the media to bad mouth his constituents saying he “does not represent them” to tangible victories such as the Wisconsin Supreme Court win where voter turnout was estimated to be up by 50% and the victories in Florida in Districts 1 and 6 where 47’s 30 point lead last November was whittled away to barely double digits during this last special election. Now is our time to keep the pressure on, continue to exploit the weaknesses and highlight the devastating direct effects on our lives. Make it real! See you April 5th!
---
| | | |
---
| | Potpourri
---
| | An Economical Economics Lesson by Don Hinman But wait, a lesson that Democrats must learn is to keep it simple. In business, we used to call it the KISS principle: Keep It Simple Stupid. This has little to do with the intellect of the people you are communicating with and more to do with being an effective and successful communicator. Please read this [piece](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/ccPO6u_i1/c?w=e6lgGhMVlfhkv6k4fYV_eiyJheUsWKobnvkQ5Z6PIZ0.) by Don Hinman, where he takes what could be a complex issue and makes it accessible to everyone. Don is no slouch, he could have written a textbook, but instead, he chose to be succinct, brief, and use practical examples. We are so proud of our Shirley Grossman Before you check out, click on the excellent resource page our advisory board member Shirley Grossman compiled. It is a comprehensive “go-to” reference for the Spokane area. Nicely done, Shirley. [https://www.saveusa.me/](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/ccPO6u_i1/c?w=gR1Qow3vNBEToPUtE1taB3X97ewSMlQHxgzWz_AIOBo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2F2ZXVzYS5tZS8iLCJyIjoiMjZiMzkyZTEtOTA1MS00NzQ1LTlhYWItZmJiMzdmYjRhODQzIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0)

| | | |
---
| | Senator Patty Murray(509) 453-7462 Senator Maria Cantwell(509) 946 - 8106 Representative Dan Newhouse CD 4(509) 713-7374 Representative Michael Baumgartner CD 5(509) 353-2374
---
| | As Democrats, we have been given two once in a generation opportunities to win Congressional District 4 since Jay Inslee held the position more than thirty years ago. The first was when I, Doug White, ran in 2022, when Loren Culp made a Democratic victory possible. A similar scenario played out in Congressional District 3, where Democrat Marie Gluesenkamp Perez captured the "not so crazy" vote against Joe Kent and won. She has now proved that she, and we, can hold that seat with a reelection in 2024. The second is looking more and more like 2026. A path to victory is becoming clearer for 2026, and I will write more on this because my vision forward is stronger than ever, and I hope yours is too.
---

name: The USO
subject: Today is a difficult day, USO Supporter
body:
Sign the card in honor of Gold Star Spouses Day.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Dear USO Supporter,
Today is a somber day, but one where we can ensure our fallen heroes are not forgotten. On April 5, we commemorate Gold Star Spouses Day, a day to honor the spouses of military members who have made the ultimate sacrifice for our country.
Dating back to World War I, military families flew flags displaying a blue star for every family member in active service and a gold star for those who died in the line of duty.
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~8eXC0rz3Zfg/ZTN6K0p2bVpnTytSSEh5U2tzcGpZR3FVK3V5ZkVqOG5ZbVRmMkFYWFBjbkNQUEE0TjBIbndibWZHWjM1aGtoc2NRRktCMEdSMzdMYlNIQW4wZ1BPYks5QjRKUFg5NDhPcFdRbVVGRURveUk9S0/djQ5a1NxTVlOanJTNEdBbi95WE5Fa2g5QlVndmxLekdhYTY5cExCZ3AweXV2R011SnpoS0xWUTFlUkN3TXFTdFI0K0NRcXk5TjhjcEtTdUszVnIwQTJLV1o1SFVNYk5rS0)
---
| [PLEASE SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thanks to caring friends like you, **the USO can help provide Gold Star Spouses with comfort as they grieve and heal.**
**[On this important day, will you sign the USO's card to honor our fallen heroes, Gold Star Spouses and all who serve?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-Z39JWZp8YTV/ZTN6K0p2bVpnTytSSEh5U2tzcGpZR3FVK3V5ZkVqOG5ZbVRmMkFYWFBjbkNQUEE0TjBIbndibWZHWjM1aGtoc2NRRktCMEdSMzdMYlNIQW4wZ1BPYks5QjRKUFg5NDhPcFdRbVVGRURveUk9S0/djQ5a1NxTVlOanJTNEdBbi95WE5Fa2g5QlVndmxLekdhYTY5cExCZ3AweXV2R011SnpoS0xWUTFlUkN3TXFTdFI0K0NRcXk5TjhjcEtTdUszVnIwQTJLV1o1SFVNYk5rS0)**

clean_body: Sign the card in honor of Gold Star Spouses Day. Dear USO Supporter, Today is a somber day, but one where we can ensure our fallen heroes are not forgotten. On April 5, we commemorate Gold Star Spouses Day, a day to honor the spouses of military members who have made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. Dating back to World War I, military families flew flags displaying a blue star for every family member in active service and a gold star for those who died in the line of duty. | Thanks to caring friends like you, the USO can help provide Gold Star Spouses with comfort as they grieve and heal. |

Peter,

As DOGE cuts millions in education, healthcare, and so much more, Elon Musk has been using his wealth and influence to secure lucrative government contracts, profiting off taxpayer money.

I’m committed to holding powerful figures like Musk accountable. We cannot allow the Trump administration to line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy while hardworking families bear the burden. It’s time to hold the Trump administration and unelected billionaires like Elon Musk to account. I’m fighting every day to make sure that the government works for all of us—not just the rich and powerful.

[_**Together, we can hold those in power accountable and build a future where the government works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Congress can block Trump’s tariffs — but only if Mike Johnson does his job
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105249262/537808289/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjZhNDZkNC00NTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQCw9KOqIuix-6oTBtklKoBAkdqmX97O-n3eJyHjyUY=) Let’s call Trump’s tariffs what they actually are, team: a massive tax hike. In fact, it may be the biggest tax hike ever inflicted on the American people. And it’s a disaster for our economy. It’s a disaster for the small business owners in Oregon and across the country who are seeing Trump thoughtlessly put their life’s work at risk. And it’s a disaster for the workers who are facing rising costs at the grocery store and the pharmacy counter, plummeting retirement accounts, and, if this goes on much longer, rising odds of unemployment. **But here’s the thing, team: Congressional Republicans have the power to stop Trump’s massive tax hike in its tracks.** All Speaker Johnson has to do is bring legislation blocking the tariffs up for a vote on the House floor. I’d vote for it in a heartbeat, and I bet some Republicans would, too. **[We can’t wait until the damage is irreversible, and I’m certainly not going to be silent. If you agree with me that this massive tax hike is a disaster, then I hope you’ll sign my petition calling on Speaker Johnson to immediately bring up legislation blocking Trump’s reckless tariffs →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105249263/537808290/-1692742716?refcode=email_040525_tariffs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjZhNDZkNC00NTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQCw9KOqIuix-6oTBtklKoBAkdqmX97O-n3eJyHjyUY=&emci=0b99e9f0-c011-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b26a46d4-4512-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5643047)** | | [Add Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105249264/537808291/-1692742716?refcode=email_040525_tariffs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjZhNDZkNC00NTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQCw9KOqIuix-6oTBtklKoBAkdqmX97O-n3eJyHjyUY=&emci=0b99e9f0-c011-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b26a46d4-4512-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5643047)
---
Our workers deserve better than this reckless incompetence, folks. Our small business owners deserve better. And our country deserves better.
Congress has the power to deliver a better outcome here — to rescue our workers and our businesses from the devastating economic toll of this massive tax hike. But only if Mike Johnson is willing to use it, so we need to exert maximum public pressure on him to stand up to Trump and do his job.
[**If you’re with me, please join me in calling on Mike Johnson to bring up legislation blocking Trump’s disastrous tariffs.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105249265/537808292/-545041973?refcode=email_040525_tariffs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjZhNDZkNC00NTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQCw9KOqIuix-6oTBtklKoBAkdqmX97O-n3eJyHjyUY=&emci=0b99e9f0-c011-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b26a46d4-4512-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5643047)

Andrea

name: Katie Porter for Governor 2026
subject: California’s primary system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39615%2E3422442%2EuJgOun)
Dear Derek,
California has a top-two primary system, which means all candidates regardless of party run on the same ballot.
And with another Democrat jumping into the race this week, there are now 15 declared candidates running for California Governor—and we could see even more before the election next year.
In such a crowded environment, campaigns need even more resources to cut through the noise. **[That’s why we’re asking for your help. Can you chip in $5?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250405_1_ak?refcode=em20250405-39615&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39615_3422442_uJgOun&akid=39615%2E3422442%2EuJgOun)**
We believe in Katie’s vision for California, and early polling shows that Katie is the clear favorite among currently declared candidates.
**But without enough resources to get Katie’s message out there, we could start to lose ground.**
Will you chip in $5 to support Katie’s fight to protect the future of California?
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250405_1_ak?refcode=em20250405-39615&refcode2=39615_3422442_uJgOun&akid=39615%2E3422442%2EuJgOun)
Thanks for considering,
Team KP 2026

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250405-39615&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39615_3422442_uJgOun&akid=39615%2E3422442%2EuJgOun)**

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026

name: George Whitesides
subject: We must fight back
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105252646/537810679/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTBmOTUwMi00ODEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-i9pjneS_y_ZpN6x_c-d1vemStSHuQosFG66SE-oFY=)
Peter,

The first 70 days of the Trump administration have been nothing short of chaotic:

❌ Thousands of federal employees lost their jobs,
❌ Agencies like NASA, USAID, and the Department of Education were gutted,
❌ And now, his reckless tariff war is hurting millions of working families.

But this past week, we’ve seen a few bright spots:

✅ We blocked a GOP bill that prevented parents from voting remotely,
✅ A Supreme Court win in Wisconsin demonstrated power of the people,
✅ Special elections in Florida saw a 15-point swing away from Republicans.

We keep fighting.

We demand accountability.

And we don’t take their overreach lying down.

**That’s exactly what I’m doing in Congress – because I took an oath to serve my community, and I intend to act swiftly when our rights come under attack.**

While I’m doing all I can in Congress, the bottom line is real oversight won’t come with Republicans in the majority. It’s what makes CA-27 a key race in 2026, and it’s why the GOP is already targeting me.

**[Let’s fight back together and flip the House majority. Please chip in $3 or any amount to stay ahead of the attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105252648/537810688/1606932672?refcode=em-4.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTBmOTUwMi00ODEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-i9pjneS_y_ZpN6x_c-d1vemStSHuQosFG66SE-oFY=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, The first 70 days of the Trump administration have been nothing short of chaotic: ❌ Thousands of federal employees lost their jobs, ❌ Agencies like NASA, USAID, and the Department of Education were gutted, ❌ And now, his reckless tariff war is hurting millions of working families. But this past week, we’ve seen a few bright spots: ✅ We blocked a GOP bill that prevented parents from voting remotely, ✅ A Supreme Court win in Wisconsin demonstrated power of the people, ✅ Special elections in Florida saw a 15-point swing away from Republicans. We keep fighting. We demand accountability. And we don’t take their overreach lying down. That’s exactly what I’m doing in Congress – because I took an oath to serve my community, and I intend to act swiftly when our rights come under attack. While I’m doing all I can in Congress, the bottom line is real oversight won’t come with Republicans in the majority. It’s what makes CA-27 a key race in 2026, and it’s why the GOP is already targeting me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ca5c71df814e43f1b911f19fe5458e90&_e=83bT906PqbRIwuMhWxG8qBBCXSX98lPX8Wmgidk1IU1GNYb6tAoHtkOwpS9-3_obF37_ieyyRegryQn-GtAtnZpAwEn3XB7hyloiJR_uuCQkeM18-UkiXlppotWK_yp3WkFNfocIbuDcolXIV3qbAk7FgRvhgIEEPauhOuCFA6efNEphdACB3vmsgh3szpFpPSfLPZNb9e9Bg2Ibt2FAAD3oXA8Q6wiJd2LkV8jOZLbHOZluOlnUwa6fQeslfgO0lHg6elwnSbshv5l0UvA2kf9fxXpwh3AtvnJQgUVQvp_HFZJHD8IaPAM2HDZl4Uw45__ZQHxyAHFQXMbgSJSLFbrrh_bzp3dnr02377OUYj39L_vjstcK9M8junhfp90JCgeG8gIwG12e2bTn9EKlFA%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ca5c71df814e43f1b911f19fe5458e90&_e=83bT906PqbRIwuMhWxG8qBBCXSX98lPX8Wmgidk1IU1GNYb6tAoHtkOwpS9-3_obF37_ieyyRegryQn-GtAtnZpAwEn3XB7hyloiJR_uuCQkeM18-UkiXlppotWK_yp3WkFNfocIbuDcolXIV3qbAk7FgRvhgIEEPauhOuCFA6efNEphdACB3vmsgh3szpFpPSfLPZNb9e9Bg2Ibt2FAAD3oXA8Q6wiJd2LkV8jOZLbHOZluOlnUwa6fQeslfgO0vcUQ7jVUn1c9fl-6-SlduimSDzuZNqlsANfTtShr4zqziCSUjWpEtj41qBHgmbjGYEkGL7WtCP3GoZ6AHiw-a8ZwT2F7wlm0iatoUmnklIF4aiaCDMuBN2zPdEfY2-bBCJHNG5QJFlhMiAD0EeXYWQ%3D%3D)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ca5c71df814e43f1b911f19fe5458e90&_e=83bT906PqbRIwuMhWxG8qBBCXSX98lPX8Wmgidk1IU1GNYb6tAoHtkOwpS9-3_obF37_ieyyRegryQn-GtAtnZpAwEn3XB7hyloiJR_uuCQkeM18-UkiXlppotWK_yp3WkFNfocIbuDcolXIV3qbAk7FgRvhgIEEPauhOuCFA6efNEphdACB3vmsgh3szpFpPSfLPZNb9e9Bg2Ibt2FAAD3oXA8Q6wiJd2LkV8jOZLbHOZluOlnUwa6fQeslfgO0njui4K5lrgC0oU7Fj6Tss9ZyP89By8EQSt9uyxYc3yqxFfm077vU_juuaCMmv8S_DRTVCEDM0S4EuXdF6t8NUdSnRYwLpqIYqjlFoWTVmTE-OyzzuI-dfQyX3F8oLszaDJlGQAkwv3zxfgBgow_6qQ%3D%3D) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ca5c71df814e43f1b911f19fe5458e90&_e=83bT906PqbRIwuMhWxG8qBBCXSX98lPX8Wmgidk1IU1GNYb6tAoHtkOwpS9-3_obF37_ieyyRegryQn-GtAtnZpAwEn3XB7hyloiJR_uuCQkeM18-UkiXlppotWK_yp3WkFNfocIbuDcolXIV3qbAk7FgRvhgIEEPauhOuCFA6efNEphdACB3vmsgh3szpFpPSfLPZNb9e9Bg2Ibt2FAAD3oXA8Q6wiJd2LkV8jOZLbHOZluOlnUwa6fQeslfgO0x7p3PWCZAyQ_rQ2gsLfVUekQuWdN_j-6CpsmiHWXjoSVkiUPeueH4I6bjy9-YxmJy3P1hk-iXvCHCbn7alv_qazUArrNGYoBg24TiebFTp6TmreghJ_6NoFg-byGmlyM0zW16prBkqvju5m_usCwIg%3D%3D)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ca5c71df814e43f1b911f19fe5458e90&_e=83bT906PqbRIwuMhWxG8qBBCXSX98lPX8Wmgidk1IU1GNYb6tAoHtkOwpS9-3_obF37_ieyyRegryQn-GtAtnZpAwEn3XB7hyloiJR_uuCQkeM18-UkiXlppotWK_yp3WkFNfocIbuDcolXIV3qbAk7FgRvhgIEEPauhOuCFA6efNEphdACB3vmsgh3szpFpPSfLPZNb9e9Bg2Ibt2FAAD3oXA8Q6wiJd2LkV8jOZLbHOZluOlnUwa6fQeslfgO0CZ8D3SV9TOx0H5qCBd717Og0h4sgpnItgsNwuTKMTxGnk_EOYAxBfLedUWV838IeSDCIbMCbKO7aXQBDKEMxmL-fndbSEQbB1UUPh92bwoS0QNxnrCbjR_2u4tuKaLQGEc7NdbRxAeEPk5vh0XCQWA%3D%3D)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ca5c71df814e43f1b911f19fe5458e90&_e=83bT906PqbRIwuMhWxG8qBBCXSX98lPX8Wmgidk1IU1GNYb6tAoHtkOwpS9-3_obF37_ieyyRegryQn-GtAtnZpAwEn3XB7hyloiJR_uuCQkeM18-UkiXlppotWK_yp3WkFNfocIbuDcolXIV3qbAk7FgRvhgIEEPauhOuCFA6efNEphdACB3vmsgh3szpFpPSfLPZNb9e9Bg2Ibt2FAAD3oXA8Q6wiJd2LkV8jOZLbHOZluOlnUwa6fQeslfgO0fNGe7xC0BoYjvBljT0w5sSrq5U1IqG3LAh3ekSdnHqBVVVhI5TOicusCgXwGDJvR-83nd037Uj4Fx85_T6YRc8nvVqaedvU-dYmc0ANG1jnV2aAmQyZwz85JE00vr0syjktyCJhZ1FEq4ELZZp3q_g%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ca5c71df814e43f1b911f19fe5458e90&_e=83bT906PqbRIwuMhWxG8qBBCXSX98lPX8Wmgidk1IU1GNYb6tAoHtkOwpS9-3_obF37_ieyyRegryQn-GtAtnZpAwEn3XB7hyloiJR_uuCQkeM18-UkiXlppotWK_yp3WkFNfocIbuDcolXIV3qbAk7FgRvhgIEEPauhOuCFA6efNEphdACB3vmsgh3szpFpPSfLPZNb9e9Bg2Ibt2FAAD3oXA8Q6wiJd2LkV8jOZLbHOZluOlnUwa6fQeslfgO0m24wYD0vJ2OVxtcrDSL9t5a4W8G-dnzxnjvXLv_jUJp5C30sfjKxYKdhjQ86gUtsSgt-vwxBxECl6ufmGz468qq8yN8ftWQdf5xwk86jZC_PKkOA6PV-eexKfIs4r7AEE9p18cu0H74JNRZgZyqcZw%3D%3D)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ca5c71df814e43f1b911f19fe5458e90&_e=83bT906PqbRIwuMhWxG8qBBCXSX98lPX8Wmgidk1IU1GNYb6tAoHtkOwpS9-3_obF37_ieyyRegryQn-GtAtnZpAwEn3XB7hyloiJR_uuCQkeM18-UkiXlppotWK_yp3WkFNfocIbuDcolXIV3qbAk7FgRvhgIEEPauhOuCFA6efNEphdACB3vmsgh3szpFpPSfLPZNb9e9Bg2Ibt2FAAD3oXA8Q6wiJd2LkV8jOZLbHOZluOlnUwa6fQeslfgO0BC4agYD4Qu9apX8otl0U89OtoEXFaY6TrY2ZbVnEG6uGD0UY9NiSsBe-QPd-H8zdA19MMmjmlKUqOKW1n2AVlkGKhz268aVfEY01gCdwQzQgICE5IzK0kg3pxQgXOS8Y410ZJ5Q3AoxE5mQXMmAb1A%3D%3D)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Virginians deserve better than chaos and instability
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
All across the board, Virginians are already feeling the sting of Trump’s misguided policy and leadership.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105254174/537813062/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDEwMzVmYzQtNDgxMi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MIG2C-ET982lpEWZOdBo51YISyemn5JuxbeYxE60EKs=)
---
My opponent and Virginia’s Republican leadership are doubling down on their support for Donald Trump — and his attacks on Virginians and our economy. I want to make one thing clear amidst the chaos happening: this is really bad for Virginia. People are hurting, and they are counting on their leaders to step up and speak out. _**Because Virginia deserves better.**_

All across the board, Virginians are already feeling the sting of Trump’s misguided policy and leadership. His reckless tariffs, his attacks on Virginia’s economy, and the firing of tens of thousands of federal workers who call our Commonwealth home have left families and Virginians uncertain about their future. It’s really heartbreaking.

As I’ve traveled across the Commonwealth, I’ve heard directly from Virginians who are worried about the fallout from these policies. They’re scared. They’re hurting. And they want change.

We can’t afford to let Trump’s chaos go unchecked. Virginians deserve better than the destruction and instability that Trump’s leadership has brought. But in order to defeat my opponent, who has stood by him at every step, we need your help. [_**Your contribution today will make sure we have the resources to stand up to this dangerous direction and build a better future for Virginia.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105254175/537813063/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDEwMzVmYzQtNDgxMi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MIG2C-ET982lpEWZOdBo51YISyemn5JuxbeYxE60EKs=)

body:
BREAKING: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105257445/537814729/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjUwNDBmZi00YTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I0VNYyqMxaxrOnbKyTgvZ-vYsHf2pSgSs5U2k4aqQ3I=&emci=ba2a68d3-7d11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=af5040ff-4a12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105257447/537814731/-782864167?refcode=em25_250405_proxyv_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250405_proxyv_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=af5040ff-4a12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjUwNDBmZi00YTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I0VNYyqMxaxrOnbKyTgvZ-vYsHf2pSgSs5U2k4aqQ3I=) **Mike Johnson scraps his whole week after brutal defeat **
* * *
Peter,

House Speaker Mike Johnson just lost control of his own party— _again._

In a desperate attempt to block his own GOP colleagues from working around him, Johnson tried to manipulate House procedure. His plan completely backfired, and when Republicans refused to back him up, he threw a tantrum and canceled the rest of the votes for the week.

This is what happens when extreme Republicans run the House: infighting, dysfunction, and zero results for the American people. While they bicker and play political games, Democrats are fighting for real solutions—lowering costs, protecting reproductive rights, and keeping our communities safe.

But if we want a Congress that actually works for the people, **we need to take back the majority.**

[**That starts right here in WA-08. Our race will be one of the most competitive in the country, and with the House majority on the line, we cannot afford to fall short. clean_body: BREAKING: = Mike Johnson scraps his whole week after brutal defeat Peter, House Speaker Mike Johnson just lost control of his own party— again. In a desperate attempt to block his own GOP colleagues from working around him, Johnson tried to manipulate House procedure. His plan completely backfired, and when Republicans refused to back him up, he threw a tantrum and canceled the rest of the votes for the week. This is what happens when extreme Republicans run the House: infighting, dysfunction, and zero results for the American people. While they bicker and play political games, Democrats are fighting for real solutions—lowering costs, protecting reproductive rights, and keeping our communities safe. But if we want a Congress that actually works for the people, we need to take back the majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd654362-c824-4240-8f82-1d69156ae8c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, it’s Abigail Spanberger. I’m honored to share that I’m officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the Governor’s office in Virginia! I’m grateful for the grassroots support from volunteers and contributors like you who have made this possible. Every dollar we raised, every phone call we made, and every conversation we had was only possible because of you. The Virginia governor’s race is one of the most competitive races in the country right now, and it’s being called a total toss-up by experts. All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race — and set the stage for 2026 and beyond. That’s why we need to continue building on the strong foundation that we’ve built so far: your contribution will help us continue mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and holding events. We need to reach voters across the Commonwealth to show them that I’m running to stand up for the people of Virginia, not stand by as chaos and division are spread. [Will you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us continue this momentum and flip the Governor’s office blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3fbabec8-d591-4a05-b174-c8bb1ec0e0c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e914b0f-b9af-48ff-9df3-e26f881cd6a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We CANNOT allow this to happen. America needs patriots like you to fight back—NOW.

body:
