#### **Big News from the Frozen North 🎬❄️**
**We’ve had an incredible response to our upcoming film** _**Frozen Odds**_**— and I couldn’t be more grateful for the support.**
#### Because of that momentum, I’m excited to officially announce a **new project** already in the works:
**🎥** _**The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal**_
The **first showing of** _**Frozen Odds**_ is scheduled for **July/August 2025** , and **Golden Ticket Holders** (only 23 left!) and **Angel Ticket Holders** (sold out) will be the **first** to see it.But that’s not all — Golden and Angel Ticket Holders will also get **exclusive tickets** to our next hard-hitting exposé:
_The Permanent Short – Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal_ This film asks the big question:
**What happens when a state government quietly reallocates tens of billions of dollars meant for its citizens?**
We follow the money—into the hands of government expansion, the homeless industrial complex, union bureaucracy, and the education industrial complex pushed by groups like Arabella Advisors, Alaska Venture Fund, 1630 Fund, and so many more.More announcements coming soon. Thank you for being part of this journey.
---
---
|
---
---
|
---

This ultra-exclusive experience is designed for those who believe in the story, the mission, and want front-row access to something special.
#### **Golden Ticket Benefits:**
* 🧥 **Exclusive “Frozen Odds” Limited-Edition Merchandise**
(Only available to Golden Ticket holders)
* 🎬 **Private Screening of “Frozen Odds”**
Watch the premiere _before anyone else_ , in an intimate VIP setting.
* 🍽️ **Catered Dinner Experience**
Share a gourmet meal with fellow supporters and filmmakers.
* 🤝 **Private VIP Event with Special Guests**
Rub shoulders with the director, crew, and hand-selected VIPs. This invite-only evening will include personal insights, behind-the-scenes reveals, and interactive conversations.

> ⚠️ Only **25 tickets** will ever be issued. Once they're gone, they're gone.
🔒 **Reserve your Golden Ticket today** and become part of the story that’s rewriting Alaska’s future.

#### **Frozen Odds -**
**Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised nearly 40% what we expected for the entire film to cost.****A huge Thank You,****Phil Izon**
---
[_ _ Click Here to Join Frozen Odds Film Project _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67f17e0c0d63192b44f3fda6&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Ffrozen-odds&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67f17a5d5161802646803e91&l=en-US&s=tHYEfqxnFA2W3AWTd4_Y84V6MSE%3D)

body:
I risked my life to get this footage..| | | Help me and Tucker Carlson today.
---
| |
#
---
From the desk of
---
# [James O'Keefe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=53e57a6a39c74d488c0c3457b422715b&_e=wbqj3_5jrdAYTvBKVcIZBz2pojS6tDP1SHlEROiBLGm7B5LRtg4aGFS0OCl6TOqNMMmYR_hXoC0FG1RWQyeUYGUKm3WwPj-A5qn-s_G07okkXbOLrW4JStzBRPS9PJa6fLRSrSM03q8GA33p2ofREVOQn_W4Pb7Gx1nvdrWiBJOl0ZQrPEh3dIhO6ySoEEOfVQnms68Y7wJYJLnPZybArjITneLmcd0FGSI5ChGMNm3fhgoScLb94sxG02GhLw_Nzkx85gTxx305qWCvzeg6185o1x1sHa39oGReRjr0dTacYw3GGL1B8zPVS-6FFwzsAPSCFfmZWPwEAz1GeO1iPsHzEOb3nMQ8hBfohCR2VSXjWBdCHY9zQLNFNTQoNCPIBaqeyu9m6aw4z0PWzI14TVmNYsXGbvCuseAFxvMue9E%3D)
---
|
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, I risked my life to get this footage from the border. clean_body: I risked my life to get this footage..| | | Help me and Tucker Carlson today. | | From the desk of | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I risked my life to get this footage from the border. Jumping aboard a moving freight train filled with Venezuelan migrants in the dead of night... being detained by the Mexican national guard ... and even sneaking into a secret child encampment in Texas that housed unaccompanied children. Anyone who has seen what I’ve seen and still resistsPresident Trump on securing the border, deporting criminal illegals, and designating cartels as foreign terrorist organizations is leading America down a dangerous path. That’s why I’m writing to you today with this personal request. I interviewed border patrol agents who were extremely emotional and who clearly had reached their breaking point... not long after we came across a little girl standing alone in the desert in the middle of the night completely abandoned. This left me more convinced than ever that when it comes to the border, there are only two kinds of Americans. 1\. Those who are outraged and already demanding it be secured; and 2\. Those who will be outraged and demand it be secured once they come face to face with the threat posed by the 11.5 million migrants who illegally crossed our border over the last four years – a shocking 650,000 with criminal backgrounds (including 14,944 murders and 20,061 charged with sexual assault) | | I traveled to this warzone. I saw with my own eyes. And I did all this so you wouldn’t have to. I also did this after being repeatedly struck in the face by the reality that nothing will change until the second group of people I described a moment ago wake up and stop their complacency. That’s exactly what this documentary has the power to do. Correction. That’s exactly what you have the power to do. My friend, this is why I joined forces with Tucker Carlson to promote and distribute “LINE IN THE SAND”. We must continue to investigate what is really happening at our Southern Border. Here’s the problem. It’s one we can’t overcome alone. You see, our open southern border is much more than a national security threat...it’s big business. I call it the “migrant industrial complex.” Let’s connect those dots: Your tax dollars → NGO’s masquerading as churches → Cartels → All of it under the eye (and protection) of local law enforcement | | This isn’t conjecture. It’s reality... A reality that one of OMG’s undercover journalists (alias Caesar) working with Citizen Journalism Foundation experienced as he was held at gunpoint by cartel members after he infiltrated a border encampment in the middle of the Aravaca Desert – a site being operated by an NGO (non-governmental organization) affiliated with the Unitarian Universalist Church. A reality I experienced when Pima County deputies threatened to arrest me for exposing a bus filled with illegal immigrants being brought to the Ramada Hotel. A reality that is captured and documented on film by going inside a cartel tunnel, interviewing border patrol agents, climbing aboard a moving freight train with migrants from Venezuela, and uncovering the horrors of babies getting run over and children being drugged so they could be smuggled across the border in silence. Our New President gets it. Tom Homan and Kristi Noem get it. They’ve been relentless. But you know who doesn’t report this? The legacy media in America. The actions that you take over the next 5 minutes will play a huge role in whether we have the resources to continue with the powerful citizen journalism that made “LINE IN THE SAND” possible. It’s that simple. Oh, there may be a place on the map called “ the United States.” But, whether the idea of America (and the freedom it has represented for the last 249 years) will survive? That part depends on what you do today. Because the very first freedom – the Freedom of Speech and a Free Press upon which all other freedoms rest – is being chipped away. And not little by little. But massive cracks and fissures are happening each and every day. . People familiar with our multi-part border investigation keep texting me, asking if I fear for my life. Here is my response: I’m not suicidal. But I’m also not afraid to die. At 40, I’ve lived a good life. Whether it’s complete or not is not up to me. What happens next, I don’t know. If there’s more to come here, so be it. I’ve learned the pursuit of truth requires extreme risk while operating without a safety net. Meteoric highs, extreme lows, and near-death experiences, jail and jury trials, constant travel, adventures, travails, failures, betrayals, repeated valleys, moving and climbing mountains, enduring multiple rebirths and renewals. Which leads me to the border videos I've released and the wider mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation – the mission is to discover other people whose principles are not for sale and who will do the right thing rather than talk about doing the right thing. I’m tired of seeing tens-of-thousands of people message me privately about how bad things are... and then they make excuses or do nothing. You see, the truth is the only thing the enemies of freedom hate more than one citizen journalist is an entire army of citizen journalists doing the work “the media” is supposed to do. The mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation is promoting these truths and providing this desperately needed transparency. I have to tell you, so far, this border investigation takes the prize as one of the most dangerous operations I’ve ever been involved with. Cartel members pointing guns at our undercover reporter. Sheriff’s deputies threatening jail-time. And, after our reporter escaped the Cartel encampment, I personally donned a bullet-proof vest and “press” badge to exfiltrate our reporter, who was on the point of blacking-out when we finally got him in the vehicle. I’ll tell you pointblank... The entire operation was a reality check for me and for our OMG team. And we’re not backing down. Uncovering the truth is too important. It’s worth the fight. It’s worth the sacrifice. If you agree, good. I need you to join me. That’s why I’m urging you to rush me your “LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution before you do anything else today. I need to hear from you within the next 48 hours so we can conduct even more undercover investigations, and fully execute our blueprint for training and equipping our army of Citizen Journalists. I’m counting on your help to expose the corruption on our southern border and in big government, big tech, big banks, big media, and big pharma. It won’t be easy. As I mentioned the retaliation I – and those citizen journalists working alongside me – will face is well-documented. Our vital mission cannot continue without your support. So, whether you can send $35 or more, please make your “LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution in the next 48 hours using the button below. | | With Sincere Thanks, | | James O'KeefeCEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation | | | James O'KeefeCEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation | | | Citizen Journalism Foundation is a 501(c)(3) organization, gifts to which are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. | | P.O. Box 1225Merrifield, VA 22116-1225

name: Maxine Dexter
subject: I'll make this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hey there, Peter,
It’s Maxine.
We are 75 days into the most turbulent, cruel administration in recent memory.
I’ve always said that I’m willing to work across the aisle on behalf of the American people.
But I will not ignore science, and that’s what these MAGA extremists do...to the detriment of all of us. They are rewriting our history, denying science, antagonizing doctors and scientists who disagree, and prescribing nonsense—snake oil solutions to an increasingly sicker United States.
The Trump administration is now looking to axe $880 billion in Medicaid funding, leaving American families sicker and without help.
That is why I and five other doctors in the House, launched the Congressional Doctors Caucus. We’re coming together to ensure that our healthcare policy transcends petty political squabbles and does what it is meant to do: protect the American people.
We need grassroots supporters like you to help us take back the House and Senate to end this reign of cruelty. We need to create a deep bench of candidates who have spines, not doormats who will let Trump and his Republican cronies walk all over them.
And we need to fight for policies that actually work: universal healthcare, expanding affordable housing, investing in clean energy, and more. Are you with us? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250405_75days_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We won't back down,
Maxine

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: 12 days and counting…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
12 days ago, news broke that the upper echelon of the Trump Administration’s national security apparatus accidentally added a journalist to an unofficial and unsecure group chat where they were discussing highly sensitive and classified war plans. The people most entrusted with keeping our servicemembers and our most sensitive secrets safe utterly failed—then they lied about it. They claimed classified war plans weren’t discussed when that clearly isn’t the case. In fact, we have screenshots:
[https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcUqaPwVAwCljjuZBFa05ApUcUPoZnZdNE6nwBgIV8omsq1PKfYuh0ujsbAT5GhF4duoBg0GV5hflxhJm62hiQLVZdkRaPBWqbxAxLxEPvYbYfrse5De9On3tEHxhFyeaOAno0eDg?key=Ybi9YeKOrPlN_3roslks48sA]
12 days later and there has still been no Congressional investigation. The Administration has attempted to declare the case closed, but it’s clear that no one has been held accountable for this serious breach. In fact, we learned just this week that this group chat was not in fact an isolated incident, but that Waltz regularly communicated information on world crises in at least 20 different signal chats. We still don’t know what other information was shared and who else has been put in harm's way by this Administration’s incompetence.
Let me be clear: when I want to discuss top secret national security issues with a colleague who also has a clearance, I do so in a SCIF: a secured facility where no electronics are allowed.
As a member of the House Armed Services Committee, the daughter of a veteran, and a representative of tens of thousands of military families, I want to be clear that this is totally unacceptable. Secretary Pete Hegseth should be fired for this heinous security breach. I’m also calling for Congress to exercise our responsibility to provide critical oversight and hold hearings. I sincerely hope my Republican colleagues will join us in doing everything in our power to investigate, hold those responsible accountable, and ensure this never happens again.
Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]

Annapolis, MD 21403
United States

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I endorsed Vivek before he was even running!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
My good friend Vivek Ramaswamy just launched his campaign for Governor.

My good friend Vivek Ramaswamy just launched his campaign for Governor.
My good friend Vivek Ramaswamy just launched his campaign for Governor.
| |
---
| | | Y'all - this is some of the BEST NEWS I've heard since President Trump was sworn in.

My good friend Vivek Ramaswamy just launched his campaign for Governor! This will be one of the single most important races this cycle, and I know he's the right guy for the job. _In fact, I was so confident that I endorsed him BEFORE he even announced! _

**[Now that it's official, I'm personally asking you to become a Founding Donor for his campaign.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LWEyODNjNzcyY2IyZTRmOWY4YTJkYTZmMGQyY2VlZWQ0IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2JsYWNrYnVybi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LTS1FSC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMxMjQtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS00tRUguMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMTI0LTM2MjMifQ/SN9vGRbYJ2PMSKlnMzP_FA "Now that it’s official, I’m personally asking you to become a Founding Donor for his campaign. ")**

The amount you contribute is not nearly as important as the amount of folks agreeing to help. Every dollar counts in a race this important.
---
| [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LWEyODNjNzcyY2IyZTRmOWY4YTJkYTZmMGQyY2VlZWQ0IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2JsYWNrYnVybi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LTS1FSC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMxMjQtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS00tRUguMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMTI0LTM2MjMifQ/Bj8kgF_08gISNroGdW1tgw)
---
| | [**BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR ->**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LWEyODNjNzcyY2IyZTRmOWY4YTJkYTZmMGQyY2VlZWQ0IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2JsYWNrYnVybi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LTS1FSC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMxMjQtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS00tRUguMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMTI0LTM2MjMifQ/ExqO68dCqOoLiZ6-jrrgHQ)
---
Anyone who listens to Vivek speak for about 10 seconds knows he has his finger on the pulse of commonsense, patriotic folks like you and me.

He gets us.

I know this from personal experience, too. He campaigned alongside me in my re-election campaign. He was an excellent partner in helping me hold the line in Tennessee.

**Now I 'm returning the favor - not only because I know him well but also because he will make a spectacular Governor.** I mean that. He'll slash taxes, gut waste and bloat in the government, clean up the streets, fix failing schools, and support President Trump every step of the way.

Unfortunately, that's enough to make you a LOT of enemies.

The Democrats, the Deep State, and special interests have a vested interest in keeping MAGA warriors like Vivek out of office. His leading Democrat opponent is raking in cash to destroy Vivek's candidacy once and for all. They'll do anything to stop him.

[So that's where folks like us come in.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LWEyODNjNzcyY2IyZTRmOWY4YTJkYTZmMGQyY2VlZWQ0IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2JsYWNrYnVybi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LTS1FSC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMxMjQtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS00tRUguMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMTI0LTM2MjMifQ/5x3PWGIsMqXqWjRyyZ3UWA "So that’s where folks like us come in.")

He'll need our help to spread his powerful message, knock doors in swing cities, keep his ads up, and reach voters in every corner of the state.

That's EXPENSIVE in a race like this and in a state like Ohio.
---
| | [**BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR ->**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LWEyODNjNzcyY2IyZTRmOWY4YTJkYTZmMGQyY2VlZWQ0IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2JsYWNrYnVybi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LTS1FSC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMxMjQtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS00tRUguMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMTI0LTM2MjMifQ/7ScQpxYVRXspJUjz6ZpVWg)
---
**[Which is why I'm personally asking you to become a Founding Donor to his campaign.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDk1LWEyODNjNzcyY2IyZTRmOWY4YTJkYTZmMGQyY2VlZWQ0IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2JsYWNrYnVybi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwNV9LTS1FSC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjMxMjQtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDVfS00tRUguMTE0NTEwX3QxNjIzMTI0LTM2MjMifQ/-02y6GN1D-2fGKcXhwZBuQ "Which is why I’m personally asking you to become a Founding Donor to his campaign.")** It would mean the world to me and Vivek if you'd be willing to step up now that he launched his campaign for Governor.

Thanks for taking the time to read this email. I appreciate your attention.

God bless you,
Marsha

**Marsha Blackburn**
U.S. Senator for Tennessee

---
|

| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

Columbus, OH 43201

clean_body: At a time when the American people are desperately waiting for action — on the border, on inflation, on energy independence — what does Congress do? Cancel its votes for the week. Why? Because Rep. Anna Paulina Luna decided now was the moment to team up with Democrats to push for proxy voting for new [...] | At a time when the American people are desperately waiting for action — on the border, on inflation, on energy independence — what does Congress do? Cancel its votes for the week. Why? Because Rep. Anna Paulina Luna decided now was the moment to team up with Democrats to push for proxy voting for new [...] Read More Here we are again, asking the question that shouldn’t even need to be asked in a country built on law, order, and common sense: Do rules matter anymore? President Donald Trump signed an executive order earlier this year to protect the integrity of women’s sports, removing biological males from female competitions — a move welcomed [...] Well, isn’t this just the cherry on top of the Democrats’ dysfunctional sundae. According to Jonathan Allen — respected journalist, political insider, and, let’s be honest, no card-carrying member of the GOP — former President Barack Obama was quietly torpedoing Kamala Harris’s campaign before it even left the harbor. That’s right. The man who practically [...] Things didn’t go quite the way Republicans were hoping on Tuesday in Wisconsin, and let’s be honest — the results left more than a few conservatives rubbing their temples. In a critical Supreme Court race with national implications, liberal Susan Crawford sailed past Brad Schimel by a wider margin than most anticipated, despite the cavalry [...] Well, well, well — Elon Musk just couldn’t help but stir the pot in Wisconsin, could he? The world’s most unconventional tech mogul turned bureaucratic bloodhound showed up ahead of the state’s high-stakes Supreme Court election and decided to drop a little bombshell — casually, of course — about the latest sniffing expedition he’s been [...] If you come for Megyn Kelly, you better be ready to take a hit back—and hard. A recent encounter with a New York Times journalist proved that once again, the gloves are off, and Kelly isn’t playing by the legacy media’s rules anymore. The flashpoint came during a lengthy interview between Kelly and Lulu Garcia-Navarro, [...] P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 No longer want to receive the Liberty Ledger? Unsubscribe .

Peter — While chaos and confusion continue to erupt out of Washington, House Democrats are laser-focused on what matters to you. Those causing all of the chaos and confusion might want us to forget, but **reproductive rights are still top of mind for House Democrats.** When the Trump administration purged reproductive health care information from federal websites and ordered the FBI to target abortion clinics instead of investigating bomb threats — _yes, that actually happened_ — Democrats came together to act swiftly. We reintroduced the _Right to Contraception Act_ to keep Trump and his allies out of our doctors’ offices, and no matter what this administration or the House GOP throws at us, my Democratic colleagues and I will meet every attack on our fundamental freedoms with a united front — one that puts your interests above all else. **[These are the Democratic leaders that Fair Shot supports. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Drop the tough guy act, Elon.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Elon Musk called me a traitor. He tweeted that in response to my visit to Ukraine and Poland. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105271764/537825038/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzM3MDcwMTktNTMxMi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_CEoujh-62JDJ2vix5_45ARzNWu1WiIv6lxEP9mMtp8=)
---
Elon Musk called me a traitor. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105271767/537825039/1566195844?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzM3MDcwMTktNTMxMi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_CEoujh-62JDJ2vix5_45ARzNWu1WiIv6lxEP9mMtp8=) He tweeted that in response to my visit to Ukraine and Poland. “You are a traitor,” for having dinner with American soldiers deployed to Poland. “You are a traitor” for meeting with Ukrainians defending their country from a Russian invasion. “You are a traitor” for visiting with nurses and doctors in hospitals that treat Ukrainian soldiers wounded in combat. When I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our national security, I’m going to stand with Ukraine until they win a peace that protects their sovereignty and safety. Elon is only looking out for himself. And if he doesn’t understand that defending freedom is a basic tenet of what makes America great and keeps us safe, maybe he should leave it to those of us who do. I’ll be honest with you, though. If the richest man on Earth is lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back. **[Please, if you can afford it, split a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party. It adds up fast when lots of people are chipping in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105271768/537825040/1566195844?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzM3MDcwMTktNTMxMi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_CEoujh-62JDJ2vix5_45ARzNWu1WiIv6lxEP9mMtp8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and the Arizona Democratic Party will go through immediately:_ **** | | ****[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105271769/537825041/1566195844?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzM3MDcwMTktNTMxMi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_CEoujh-62JDJ2vix5_45ARzNWu1WiIv6lxEP9mMtp8=)****

If the richest man on Earth is lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and the Arizona Democratic Party will go through immediately: ** | | = ** **= ** | **= ** **= | = ** **= ** Thanks for sticking with me. It means a lot to have you by my side. Mark Kelly ** Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. GREG FREEMAN, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Participant ID #: 16452447-484
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmutw1apytvpt3y1j9yizfifd855pk0i4pnwuds5es4lxgpgtvw2wwvw2urud9a6ofmyo0x5cx0872ng5r&__stmp=su9fi9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su9fi9&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkssrbkb3y0to0rnk23fvomvt4n6eqquws6s1kgwsid1o03aujxvst3nalp1ux2mjjl75tuelmodvpil7ppzns90wn4m4tfp4chqlpofvxmnej3xefup9gvqe6v3ifb2z675jq7s2bew3p1fiyxp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su9fi9&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su9fi9&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su9fi9&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su9fi9&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkssrbkb3y0to0rnk23fvomvcdpz06opopphd587z9oi6mfy958bz0vfhuscl6tofh1v60ka1k72htyg0utuk2ud97j91s4p1tc9fhpri1ng3geegcxlig5at3f1pz8ylriubggrjdu9x254gn1x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su9fi9&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su9fi9&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: A tax hike on working people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
President Trump’s newly announced “Liberation Day” tariffs are a reckless economic move that will directly hurt southern New Mexico.

subject: What Top Conservative Political Analysts Say About President Trump’s New Tariffs
body:
On April 2, 2025, President Donald Trump proclaimed "Liberation Day" for American workers, rolling out a bold tariff plan to reshape U.S.

# [What Top Conservative Political Analysts Say About President Trump's New Tariffs](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=160665540&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNjY1NTQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM4ODE2ODEsImV4cCI6MTc0NjQ3MzY4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Y8DnHKG2dPhfXXoJ1QL9BSlwpa7AgU4y_o_iXZrb0uM)

Photo by [Markus Winkler](https://substack.com/redirect/d51deecd-3ed2-409a-b0f7-f091d4325e38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/373ed4e5-413a-4668-ad00-0e6dcc157da3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
On April 2, 2025, President Donald Trump proclaimed "Liberation Day" for American workers, rolling out a bold tariff plan to reshape U.S. trade. As of April 5, a 10% tariff hits all imports, with a hefty 54% levy on Chinese goods starting April 9. Markets jolted, and political reactions flared. Among conservative analysts, opinions span from hearty approval to pointed caution, spotlighting the stakes of Trump's economic move. Here's what top conservative voices are saying.
**A Triumph of Economic Nationalism**
Some conservatives see the tariffs as a masterstroke for American sovereignty. Oren Cass, Chief Economist at American Compass, cheers them as a direct hit on decades of lopsided trade. "This is conservatism in action--shielding our workers from globalist erosion," Cass asserts. He highlights the 54% China tariff and the end of the de minimis loophole for cheap imports as proof of Trump's resolve. For Cass, these steps could revive industries long hammered by foreign rivals, especially in manufacturing heartlands.
Former Representative Andy Biggs, a Fox News regular, agrees, calling the tariffs "brilliant economic strategy." He casts them as a rebuttal to Biden-era trade deficits, which ballooned to $1.2 trillion in 2024. "Trump's forcing fair play," Biggs says, praising the reciprocal tariff design that punishes nations blocking U.S. goods. To him, it's not just economics--it's a power play to reclaim America's global edge.
Scott Paul, President of the Alliance for American Manufacturing, zeroes in on jobs. He backs the 25% tariff on foreign cars, forecasting a boom for U.S. auto plants. "This brings production back where it belongs," Paul says, picturing revitalized factories in states like Ohio and Michigan. For these analysts, Trump's tariffs deliver on the "America First" promise with gusto.
**Cautions of Economic and Political Risk**
Not every conservative is on board. Thomas Sowell, Senior Fellow at the Hoover Institution, raises a red flag steeped in history. "Tariffs can backfire--think Smoot-Hawley," he warns, recalling the 1930s trade war that worsened the Great Depression. Sowell gets Trump's goal of slashing the trade deficit but fears long-term tariffs could spark retaliation and stall growth. The Dow's 1,200-point tumble on April 3 lends weight to his unease.
Stephen Moore, a Heritage Foundation economist and Trump ally, offers a different critique. "These tariffs could choke the very growth we've fought for," Moore says, estimating a $2,000 annual price hike for households. He worries higher costs could sour voters on Trump's economic record, especially after inflation dogged the 2024 campaign. For Moore, the risk isn't just economic--it's a political tightrope for the GOP.
Senator Rand Paul, a libertarian-leaning conservative, questions the scope. "Blanket tariffs punish American consumers as much as foreign producers," he argues, citing Kentucky's bourbon exports as a potential casualty of retaliation. Paul's stance reflects a free-market strain within conservatism, wary of Trump's heavy-handed approach.
**Bridging the Divide: Support with Caveats**
Some analysts tread a middle path. Senate Majority Leader John Thune backs the tariffs' aim but calls for precision. "We want better trade deals, not a sledgehammer," he says, mindful of export-reliant states like South Dakota. Thune embodies a pragmatic conservatism that cheers the intent while sweating the details.
Sowell, despite his skepticism, sees a silver lining. "Used briefly, tariffs can squeeze bad actors like China," he allows, separating short-term leverage from long-term peril. This balanced take mirrors a wider conservative tension: Can Trump wield tariffs deftly enough to win without wounding?
**Conservatism at a Crossroads**
The tariffs lay bare a rift in conservative ranks. Free-market stalwarts like Sowell, Moore, and Rand Paul spar with economic nationalists like Cass and Biggs. This clash could steer GOP rhetoric as elections near. Success might lock in Trump's vision as conservative gospel; failure could splinter a party still navigating his shadow.
Globally, the stakes differ by lens. Cass views tariffs as a muscle-flexing win for America's clout, while Sowell fears a step back from economic leadership. As of April 5, 2025, the outcome hangs in the balance.
**Conclusion**
Conservative analysts are split on Trump's tariffs. Cass, Biggs, and Paul hail a bold stand for American workers, while Sowell, Moore, and Rand Paul flag economic traps and political pitfalls. Thune and others straddle the line, rooting for results but bracing for turbulence. Whether "Liberation Day" frees or fetters America is to be determined. For now, the conservative debate rages--loud, diverse, and far from resolved--hinting Trump's tariff legacy could either unify or unravel the movement he redefined.

subject: Trump’s assault on everything we hold dear

body:
we need to be raising alarms
| [ ](https://takano4ca.us/l/YGrypgAqQlQt?t=YrBgLKz5OBz6)
---
Peter, in the last few weeks alone, Trump has dramatically ramped up his dictatorial instincts and abuse for the rule of law.

❌ He declared, without legal basis, that Joe Biden’s pardons were **“void and vacant”** & announced politically motivated investigations of Adam Schiff, Jamie Raskin, and other members of the January 6th committee.

❌ He ignored court orders from a federal judge and called on federal judges who disagree with him to be impeached.

❌ He once again hinted at running for a Constitutionally-barred 3rd term.

Peter, I want to be clear here. I have great faith in the American people to always be willing to counter authoritarianism and dictators, but our country has never before been tested like this. **Faith and hope are critical, but action is necessary.**

I’m fighting with my Democratic colleagues to build the necessary resources we need to flip the House in 2026. If we take this step toward taking back the House, our path to stopping Trump’s authoritarianism becomes 10x easier.

**But we can’t flip the House blue without your support today, Peter.** [**I’m counting on you to take the necessary action today to fight for a Democratic Majority and stand up to Trump’s creeping authoritarianism. body:
| | | **This weekend, democracy defenders TOOK TO THE STREETS to demand Donald Trump's impeachment.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6Sht7A47eix1sV_LW2CZCZAys1c9ksOWkDIutz9Tc4YOi-czObLPBkg4Top37si3OHEjXq6hBt6ne2okpkRti-VRU6i9yUINNWYdEisYSnZ_EcHPx2jO7nDj22tQOinpyLe9PqZVfo_0hNH5XrEn6zb478a-NIWcUylD7k69I1t7qFAXVYxhZQ4aNit5l7vDTOfZMfj8gSbtCqn8aT-CsKC_Br_gMGXTpiCsP-x4QjUBaZ8o10aTvoFLZRc7aBahbFnA3cIGbGvjCMWZp0n9ncJiqIURI9end3C4Dx-wD8s-mguPBOro5QS9XZ4Nmktg5GZAfAhmpjKQc5-fjYhyCl__vHF8K9V6m3wa1LHcRRgVkJIBFBLCtHNy8WfxHrC1tSXA/4fe/RyiDrXQ8RS-MRpFl7LyKKA/h0/h001.jVxEJ9aQg9ZtR0SjDQ8CpEkANcBy6fgPnb0nJl1PdQs) And, over 100 Cedar Key Progress supporters like you donated to reveal our next IMPEACH TRUMP billboard ... being printed RIGHT NOW for Albuquerque, New Mexico, where the cost is around $35 a day. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6Sht7A47eix1sV_LW2CZCZAys1c9ksOWkDIutz9Tc4YOi-mWNwoauYTbnmqyVXXqRCzvVtAPqZlrPe8ArDkopRFFGaq1XRCEaKfC8bDR9t7Y_wDZhcMZiJEBuhR33phV6x1LKsj0RJUyV2_3N5kPXinVmTSxRPnkeZCj-x_pfahwHXpJCI4cm0NNLHfygYr8uhtiL_ze8jlNTDHWW5QuIyiQrbFabC_LSFbksJQgsqg5jQd5xUxRzA1ACXO_X_iuCsHI1Q3QLELJssyYly8oEOPxpaJerrykzfsnc88BeOxAIhOOb7JboxEyPbnyT_2RzRn56BCkqJ_WnzWTH7KmUakfBSnxPDztoIp-FsQXpZfDpIbPfNh4eqlpFh-49K2Vlj8A/4fe/RyiDrXQ8RS-MRpFl7LyKKA/h1/h001.A78XUGdxjOexficvn6-2r-OyMGZuLcTwJJjBLS3xcBk)
**Our IMPEACH billboards have gone up in Pennsylvania, California, New York, and Minnesota -_and we're not stopping until we've hit every state we can._** _Donald Trump's approval rates are falling. name: AOC
subject: "It's their fault"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
You will never be able to deport your way into more affordable rent.
#
We have a problem on immigration because of the lack of progress. And as we know, Republicans weaponize that lack of progress.
There was a bipartisan bill last year that a GOP majority was willing to pass, Biden was willing to work with them on it, and Trump said, “Do not solve this problem."
**"As long as it is broken, it will be politically beneficial for us.”**
It is a problem not just for Democrats, it is a problem for the _entire country_ that Republicans do not want to solve any sort of problem with immigration.
It’s not even about creating a mass deportation pipeline: **they are creating a private prison camp pipeline**.
We have a population of undocumented people. Overwhelmingly, it is not because they crossed the southern border — it’s because they came here in a documented fashion, overstayed a visa, and became undocumented.
It is the lack of ability for us to expand and modernize paths to citizenship that creates this bubbling issue that Republicans are allowed to weaponize.
When that is paired with divestment from the social safety net and rising costs of living, it sets the stage for a Strong Man to point to any marginalized group and say, “It’s their fault” — **instead of looking at the gross income inequality that we have, and its _actual_ causes, in the United States**.
You will never be able to deport your way into more affordable rent.
You’re never going to deport your way into being able to make your mortgage meet, or make your groceries more affordable.
In fact, **mass deportations may only make those things more expensive**.
People voted to lower their groceries. People voted to try and make their lives more affordable.
But MAGA is focused on creating fear to get us to give up in advance and withdraw from public life _without them lifting a finger_.
**Hell no**. [Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250405.1fGyf2&refcode=em20250405-8538-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8538%2E2526796%2E2m9RSf)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250405.1fGyf2&refcode=em20250405-8538-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8538%2E2526796%2E2m9RSf)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250405?refcode=em20250405-8538-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8538_2526796_2m9RSf&akid=8538%2E2526796%2E2m9RSf)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250405-8538-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=8538%2E2526796%2E2m9RSf)**

"As long as it is broken, it will be politically beneficial for us.” It is a problem not just for Democrats, it is a problem for the entire country that Republicans do not want to solve any sort of problem with immigration. It’s not even about creating a mass deportation pipeline: they are creating a private prison camp pipeline. We have a population of undocumented people. Overwhelmingly, it is not because they crossed the southern border — it’s because they came here in a documented fashion, overstayed a visa, and became undocumented. It is the lack of ability for us to expand and modernize paths to citizenship that creates this bubbling issue that Republicans are allowed to weaponize. When that is paired with divestment from the social safety net and rising costs of living, it sets the stage for a Strong Man to point to any marginalized group and say, “It’s their fault” — instead of looking at the gross income inequality that we have, and its actual causes, in the United States. You will never be able to deport your way into more affordable rent. You’re never going to deport your way into being able to make your mortgage meet, or make your groceries more affordable. In fact, mass deportations may only make those things more expensive. People voted to lower their groceries. People voted to try and make their lives more affordable. But MAGA is focused on creating fear to get us to give up in advance and withdraw from public life without them lifting a finger. Hell no. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: We just went toe to toe with Mike Johnson. And we won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88725?t=6&akid=19466%2E878179%2EC9pxIC) Hey, the Voter Protection Project said I could reach out with some news:

This week, Speaker Mike Johnson held a vote on the House floor to kill my resolution to allow new parents in Congress to vote remotely while raising their newborn children. **But it failed. Mike Johnson lost, and common sense won.**

Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership:**The status quo is not acceptable.**

It’s not acceptable that people from middle-class families, and especially young women, have been deterred from running for Congress. It’s not acceptable that Congress has been dominated by the interests of older, wealthy men. And it’s not acceptable that Mike Johnson tried a desperate, last-second procedural gimmick to silence our voices.

Over the last three months, I went toe-to-toe with the Speaker of the House and all the power he wields. And together, we showed Mike Johnson that nobody fights harder than a mom.

**But this fight isn’t done. Next up is officially passing this resolution and making sure Congress actually reflects the people we serve. Mike Johnson will fight until the bitter end to prevent us from modernizing Congress, so I need your support more than ever before.**

[**If you believe in my work to make Washington more welcoming to young people and regular families, will you pitch in a split donation between me and the Voter Protection Project? Grassroots support is essential in this fight.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88725?t=7&akid=19466%2E878179%2EC9pxIC) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Brittany Pettersen and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88726?t=8&akid=19466%2E878179%2EC9pxIC)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88725?t=12&akid=19466%2E878179%2EC9pxIC)
Thank you,

Brittany Pettersen
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19466%2E878179%2EC9pxIC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19466%2E878179%2EC9pxIC).**

**Peter, there’s THREE THINGS you need to know with MSNBC under attack:**

name: Team Yass
subject: People over billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, while Republicans prioritize billionaires by selling out everyday people, Yassamin is working to **cap household energy costs** and **lower energy burdens** on low-income households. The rapidly changing climate means that people across Arizona’s 3rd district are spending more to cool their homes as our city continues to get hotter. That’s why Yassamin joined alongside climate leader and Senator Ed Markey to introduce the **_Heating and Cooling Relief Act_** , which would lower everyday costs and protect consumers from predatory energy practices. **[Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105279284/537833093/819101343?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFmMTNiYy01YzEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evv02LmNHYrRaoc6qPugiwXkcg4Nf44eXUOO9S5SuHQ=&emci=b6536f95-9c10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4eaf13bc-5c12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105279285/537833094/819101343?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFmMTNiYy01YzEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evv02LmNHYrRaoc6qPugiwXkcg4Nf44eXUOO9S5SuHQ=&emci=b6536f95-9c10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4eaf13bc-5c12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234)**
---
This legislation would expand Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) funding to ensure year-round assistance and expand eligibility so that more lower-income households are able to access these funds and lower energy costs.
Not only would this lower barriers and everyday costs, but this legislation would _also_ strengthen consumer protections to prevent unnecessary shutoffs, excessive fees, and predatory pricing that keeps consumers locked into bad deals.
**[We need support for this in 18326, Peter. Will you add your name right now as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Heating and Cooling Relief Act_? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105279286/537833095/819101343?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFmMTNiYy01YzEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evv02LmNHYrRaoc6qPugiwXkcg4Nf44eXUOO9S5SuHQ=&emci=b6536f95-9c10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4eaf13bc-5c12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234)**
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105279287/537833096/819101343?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250405_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFmMTNiYy01YzEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evv02LmNHYrRaoc6qPugiwXkcg4Nf44eXUOO9S5SuHQ=&emci=b6536f95-9c10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4eaf13bc-5c12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234)**

name: Kat Abughazaleh
subject: Volunteer with our campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kat for Illinois
body:
Come join us in Discord!
---
|
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/SHAAkpHA1Cq8)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/BlpeYYJVBiyk)
---
Friend, I am so happy to announce that our campaign is now ready for volunteers! We got over 1000 volunteer sign-ups in less than a week and if you are receiving this, you’re one of them! Thank you! Discord is going to be our hub for volunteers: It allows for efficient, effective communication between the campaign and all of you. **To join our server, just click[this link](https://ka4il.us/l/hQS2syg49Hsn). This is where you can learn about the vast majority of our volunteer opportunities in real time.** If you’re unfamiliar with the platform, don’t worry! We’ve got info and tutorials in our server guide on the lefthand side. (And if you absolutely don’t want to use Discord, we will also reach out to you via email about volunteer opportunities too!) Oh, and we’ve also got an entire section dedicated to pet pics like this one of my cat, Heater:
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/b8S6wG72PZbF)
---
There truly is something for everyone in this campaign. We need support at events, canvassers on the streets, translators on the Internet, and everything in between. Remote or local, old or young, we want – and need – your help! Especially because this campaign is about community and direct action now. When you volunteer with our campaign, you are going to directly help others too. Thanks, and see you there! -Kat
---
|
---
Email is a really important way that grassroots campaigns can actually win: **we have power when we use technology to organize a large group of people.** We also understand that it can be overwhelming.

If you only want to receive the most important emails, click [here](https://ka4il.us/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&t=0rqtLN0LfNYm).

If you're really just sick of every email, click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/QqWJZXJHIp0y) and you'll be unsubscribed!
---
| **_Democratic leaders are abandoning us._** Our District deserves a fighter in Congress — someone who shows her constituents every day that she is doing everything possible to stop the authoritarian takeover of the United States. Kat has fought fascists before as a citizen, union rep, and independent journalist. Now, she's going to do the same in Congress. **Let's win this together.** **[Chip in!](https://ka4il.us/l/iAY0clS0nr5A)**
---
| | Paid for by Kat for Illinois
---

On Election Day, over 77 million voters put their faith in Donald Trump to _help_ Americans: to lower costs, fight inflation, and reform immigration.

_Instead, he’s spent the past few months _hurting_ us:_ | **Rather than lowering the cost of groceries,** Trump is launching a global trade war and doing _nothing_ to make life more affordable.

**Rather than lifting up working class Americans,** Trump is giving his billionaire buddies tax cuts and _increasing costs for everyone else._

**Rather than strengthening foreign relations,** Trump is _burning bridges_ with longstanding allies and parroting the talking points of the Kremlin.

**Rather than investing in America,** Trump is focused on defunding and dismantling critical departments and organizations that help _all of us._
---
Make no mistake, Peter: **Trump’s plans for his second term were never about helping Americans.** This is his Project 2025 playbook in action, and now we must _all_ do our part to fight back.

subject: Your voice is important to me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|

| | Peter,

It’s a privilege to be able to connect with my constituents through town halls, rallies, coffee chats, and more. I’m happy to take any opportunity I can to hear and understand your concerns in these difficult times.

**_[Your voice is important to me, Peter. Can you take a minute to take this short survey to let me know your concerns and thoughts so I can serve you best?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105279982/537834831/-1039418990?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_202504_SV_TownHall1_0_New_MikeThompson_NA_NA_TownHall1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ2Nzc3OS02MTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eGjRLBHLCi7JUKQSjigqrSK0cKE4zRC_MFr9ajseFwM=&emci=666dc9d5-3412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=01467779-6112-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2678920)_** **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105279984/537834833/-1039418990?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_202504_SV_TownHall1_0_New_MikeThompson_NA_NA_TownHall1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ2Nzc3OS02MTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eGjRLBHLCi7JUKQSjigqrSK0cKE4zRC_MFr9ajseFwM=&emci=666dc9d5-3412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=01467779-6112-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2678920)**
I’m dedicated to working tirelessly in Congress, in the Courts, and on the streets to fight the chaos and disastrous policies of this Administration. Already, nearly 140 lawsuits have been filed challenging the President’s unlawful orders, and I’ll continue to support any lawsuit against the overreach of this Administration.

This weekend, we’re celebrating Hands Off Democracy day, joining rallies throughout the whole day to show that we’re not backing down against this current Administration’s extreme actions. I know these last few weeks have been tough, but that’s why I’m committed now more than ever to fighting for you.

**The best way to support you is if I can hear your thoughts and concerns._[Take our quick survey to share your thoughts with me today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105279986/537834835/-1039418990?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_202504_SV_TownHall1_0_New_MikeThompson_NA_NA_TownHall1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ2Nzc3OS02MTEyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eGjRLBHLCi7JUKQSjigqrSK0cKE4zRC_MFr9ajseFwM=&emci=666dc9d5-3412-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=01467779-6112-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2678920)_**

Thank you for your support.

— Mike

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Good news inside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Aloha Peter, I know my team and I have been emailing you a lot, but I had to reach out with this good news: **We hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!** I’m proud to say that I rely on small-dollar donations from folks like you. Meeting these goals helps us send a strong message that we have the grassroots momentum to flip the Senate blue, stop Donald Trump’s extreme agenda, and prepare for the many fights ahead. From the streets, to the courts, to town halls across the country, Democrats and the American people have shown up to make it clear: **This administration isn’t cutting it.** As Hawaii’s senator, I vow to continue fighting to help working people and demand accountability from this administration and at every level of government. Your support makes that work possible, and I’m grateful to have you on my team as we prepare for whatever comes next. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Not your typical pantsuit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Wearing our moccasins helps us honor our ancestors, whose shoulders we stand on.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)
In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [**make your first-ever $5 contribution to our grassroots campaign for New Mexico.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250405_2_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1132&refcode2=1132_400544_cMckFj&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)
First, I hope you’ll let me show you some of the places where I’ve **rocked my mocs.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250405_2_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1132&refcode2=1132_400544_cMckFj&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)_My child Somáh was my biggest cheerleader on the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior._
On the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior, I decided to wear my white moccasins and a handmade ribbon skirt adorned with butterflies, stars, and corn. No matter where I go, I am a proud Pueblo woman first – including at the Department of the Interior.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250405_2_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1132&refcode2=1132_400544_cMckFj&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)_My moccasins and yellow ribbon skirt stood out in the sea of black suits at Pres. Biden’s inauguration in 2021._
When I wear my mocs, I'm reminded of how powerful our traditional clothing is to our shared heritage. On the first day of the White House Tribal Nations Summit in 2021, I wore my beaded moccasins in solidarity with our Indigenous people across the country. I am incredibly grateful that together, our Administration made extraordinary accomplishments for Indian Country – enduring progress that would make our ancestors proud.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250405_2_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1132&refcode2=1132_400544_cMckFj&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)_I even rocked my mocs at the White House Tribal Nations Summit._
From my ancestral homelands here in New Mexico to the halls of Congress and everywhere in between, I rock my mocs to honor the people whose shoulders I stand on. History has shown us there’s nothing we can’t accomplish when we work together, which is why I’m counting on the support of people like you as we fight for a New Mexico that works for everyone.
**No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor.[Will you chip in $5 so we can build a strong campaign capable of winning this race and making history again?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250405_2_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1132&refcode2=1132_400544_cMckFj&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250405_2_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250405-1132&refcode2=1132_400544_cMckFj&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)**
I am so grateful for your support. Thank you for being by my side,
Deb 💙
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250405-2&t=2&refcode2=1132_400544_cMckFj&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1132%2E400544%2EcMckFj)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Tobias Read
subject: I won’t bow to Trump’s executive order
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250405em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250405em]
Hi, it’s Tobias Read, Oregon Secretary of State.
Last week, President Donald Trump issued a sweeping, unconstitutional executive order that would seriously undermine our democracy.
It would decrease the participation of eligible voters in our elections, and it could even make our elections less secure. So I called him out:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250405em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250405em]
We know Trump and his allies aren’t trying to make our elections more secure at all – they’re trying to disenfranchise people who won’t vote for him.
It’s anti-democracy, it’s likely illegal, and I won’t stand for it.
I will fight back against any attempt to make our elections less fair and less safe – including this one. But I need your support. Will you make a contribution to my team right now to help me stand up to Trump? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250405em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250405em]
This is very simple, folks: It’s a fundamental American right that every citizen has to hold politicians accountable at the ballot box. No one – especially not our president – should be making moves that imperil that or make it more difficult for people.
So we have to push back.
Please join me today by making a contribution of any amount to power my work – and together, we will defend our democracy from Trump’s attacks. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250405em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250405em]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

* **TOP NEWS**

“**Judge awards $6.6 million to whistleblowers who reported Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton to FBI** ,” AP's**Nadia Lathan** — “A district court judge has awarded more than $6 million combined to [four whistleblowers](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r3jZ_m6CEdJ1VtotEB1_NDlDbhB5z-TZqqS_shnyfuo-KyH-T2fZk3E87IGRmdn2C7CiyPMp_8AbnBzDJVL-htPBmx4wjrGKKC8ODfTY_g7cepWYj8rAGj_dSLqMBQCbbrP_qF1SL66WwZTBNsZJesPzUWyn5PwtOxJM6EIAzJerJ5_IUB2_qbTYdyxN6jYt7durmm2imQVY_R5KjCI16rel2NlUtWvd2J4tcnMIwuaWauILx33fZhqf8uq0DoQDUmlUX-DalvJTrrKnX7sqqPf7VwOI_MzNjiGKkOvMnfkPI4F45Duvn-LCUkCGWu7_qr17ADxGmgpheabuy-zrvSZSliCCRtuCqBU5SXgCOoYfxmaT5XeQcXmmCJZd-o415K-jiNST9wLKnP7aS-p41NJm-wg0uICjgVyteS-o9ifP8PeR324JAr0Ybz2P5N7OLbPqBH9rTNKIaRXIEd5BdI7amVnKeeonpWcIbgtMscVRZHH5i6WZhqJ_zn9f0mdNrmjb2HQ92PZHe2_WcQUALeX/4fe/TXexCjDLSGajdJgmTfr3ww/h10/h001.YIzCTnUCulep85QD9HmRwP8xPK9k8nuI4PELkZO4pIo) in their lawsuit against Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton who were fired shortly after they reported him to the FBI.

“By a preponderance of the evidence,” Travis County Judge **Catherine Mauzy** says in her judgment, the plaintiffs proved liability, damages and attorney’s fees in their complaint against the attorney general’s office.

“Because the Office of the Attorney General violated the Texas Whistleblower Act by firing and otherwise retaliating against the plaintiff for in good faith reporting violations of law by**Ken Paxton** and OAG, the court hereby renders judgment for plaintiffs,” Mauzy states.

The court found that the four Paxton aides [were fired in retaliation for reporting allegations](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r3oX4b9dcQbZJ-c07Eac0Mp-KyCWikGPfu6ZC7q97gQDvYg9HeQFzAaxImPR3I90I1Eg3poUTN5dWEAYPA17YpTe6Ba9_6v1BnWv2ABs2RHuHpdOn1j_aJyECOUgY97KOnoYflukz0fHiGrGHMAFCrylrDo1vYRRF-8_OjZP1DB9JYo_FHg429ZB-O1NhBHyVC28J6TMhkxbZmWbXeQ7HjUs-VsW6lW9jstQzClndt_OK5hjX6sTNB0daljYvTjxjjVGiPvoNM5EO4Fe26uQiYXB4rCBjDKbwspo5hx2qzoCpilIfizM25ISf5EYEKDqGhp2zPjCcqjoYg_32JZqP8K7ARzc9weHwzTlRHV1zhQ8k3iPMwRhhQcbWhGbPzPd2PlUYYGhyhVMT1I3UJYP2vRylRqK-aU9J3vjK1kUsCgtOHrPy53UeHuRDXeITmGZLVgzVBx44AAAEZ1xk1fIIUUl_3MhnOSCi5rCASnQA5h72p2r8BcQP-WyaLzShC2_XE/4fe/TXexCjDLSGajdJgmTfr3ww/h12/h001.Jrspgv4Uazxhn_4e4OKFZYa94g8tig78DbLYf4_GGCk) that he was using his office to accept bribes from an Austin real estate developer who employed a woman with whom he was having an extramarital affair. Paxton has denied accepting bribes or misusing his office to help**Nate Paul** , the real estate developer.

The judgment also stated that the employees made their reports to law enforcement “in good faith” and that Paxton’s office did not dispute any claims or damages in the lawsuit.

“It should shock all Texans that their chief law enforcement officer, Ken Paxton, admitted to violating the law, but that is exactly what happened in this case,” said**Tom Nesbitt** , an attorney for**Blake Brickman** , and **TJ Turner** , an attorney for David Maxwell, in a joint statement.

In a statement to the media, Paxton called the ruling “ridiculous” and “not based on the facts or the law.” He also said that his office intends to appeal the ruling.

Paxton was at the center of a federal investigation after eight employees reported his office to the FBI in 2020 for bribery allegations. He agreed to settle the lawsuit for $3.3 million that would be paid by the Legislature. However, the House rejected his request and conducted its own investigation and impeached Paxton in 2023. He was [later acquitted in the Senate](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r02EWzbFcWzHavfKqlElHNX8ZhnRpu9vosP8bXl3RZ4jztg0dAtm4WKdup-4bBH5S2tNmBDCBEfJ9xav4pi0FHxS8QxDIK73JzDBKPowOpkCZxYq3CEfHopyQaHP8uFqUwhW5-bXgUs6Brg05BCurZIQ3sxmLM0vATDnqEEtSkJ-h3-Elp__1VqsjQ19KP8mewKsasAH-QQLSThlc_RWTeJbMzBl-aNnnBJpWOWbM8AZ6pC_C7qvo3RCbcFRzDC8WGWYq6z3GIYj6Csrjr3DIFRLfG9ceYq00pWIGwuH_shNcPgfBk2jBaRfX-K-kHob20kRDH-fCufBAG017qIYJ51qc6yHcZtDDpb2bph1cmDHm_HNz0fbnAlPPLvw7prEq8CvYZ97HbMrUF-mxc_GFJGoXUMg7B1d4y-GTDYmsebGvGVr_WPJf9qT9vErXd_yBugmeyon1e-PrdINvSCQlEHVD_QWWLnOXGf244z0BYYbu5g27Zv-XY_5_07qjzQgtI/4fe/TXexCjDLSGajdJgmTfr3ww/h14/h001.gtsfEJi4M5SqJKoxsojE5xH-DPoqFjQlE3MGJXvCKiM).

Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . | TOP NEWS “Judge awards $6.6 million to whistleblowers who reported Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton to FBI ,” AP'sNadia Lathan — “A district court judge has awarded more than $6 million combined to in their lawsuit against Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton who were fired shortly after they reported him to the FBI. “By a preponderance of the evidence,” Travis County Judge Catherine Mauzy says in her judgment, the plaintiffs proved liability, damages and attorney’s fees in their complaint against the attorney general’s office. “Because the Office of the Attorney General violated the Texas Whistleblower Act by firing and otherwise retaliating against the plaintiff for in good faith reporting violations of law byKen Paxton and OAG, the court hereby renders judgment for plaintiffs,” Mauzy states. » The court found that the four Paxton aides that he was using his office to accept bribes from an Austin real estate developer who employed a woman with whom he was having an extramarital affair. Paxton has denied accepting bribes or misusing his office to helpNate Paul , the real estate developer. The judgment also stated that the employees made their reports to law enforcement “in good faith” and that Paxton’s office did not dispute any claims or damages in the lawsuit. » “It should shock all Texans that their chief law enforcement officer, Ken Paxton, admitted to violating the law, but that is exactly what happened in this case,” saidTom Nesbitt , an attorney forBlake Brickman , and TJ Turner , an attorney for David Maxwell, in a joint statement. In a statement to the media, Paxton called the ruling “ridiculous” and “not based on the facts or the law.” He also said that his office intends to appeal the ruling. Paxton was at the center of a federal investigation after eight employees reported his office to the FBI in 2020 for bribery allegations. He agreed to settle the lawsuit for $3.3 million that would be paid by the Legislature. However, the House rejected his request and conducted its own investigation and impeached Paxton in 2023. He was . In November, the Texas Supreme Court a lower-court ruling that Paxton testify in the lawsuit. Peter, Like many of you, I’m deeply concerned about the impact these new tariffs will have on Americans.

No matter how the White House tries to spin it, tariffs are a tax increase on the American people. They’ve never worked for our country - and I don’t believe they ever will.

Trade makes America stronger and more prosperous. We sell our goods - including the agricultural products that help feed the world - because American innovation and productivity are second to none.

We want free trade, but it has to be fair trade. That means negotiating from a position of strength - not by slapping tariffs across the board that end up hurting our workers, farmers, and families.

I talked more about this in two recent interviews. Click the images below to listen - and let me know what you think.

name: Elizabeth Warren (via Democrats.org)
subject: Today in Nashville
body:
---
Derek, I just stepped off the stage in Nashville, where I joined an incredible crowd of folks who showed up — even though their Republican member of Congress won’t. When elected officials hide from their constituents, it’s not just cowardly — it’s dangerous. It’s how billionaires and giant corporations get away with rigging the system, while working families get left behind. Today, I talked with folks in Nashville about what’s at stake: the GOP’s plan to extend Trump’s tax handouts for the ultra-rich; devastating cuts to Medicaid, Social Security, and public education; and the urgent need to elect Democrats who will fight for working families — _not_ billionaires. These town halls are important, and they’re a critical piece of how we win in 2025 and beyond — by organizing everywhere, including in deep-red districts where Republicans think no one’s paying attention. **But we can’t do it without you.** [Can you chip in $3 right now to help the DNC expand these People’s Town Halls and elect Democrats who actually show up?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?refcode=em_20250405_3138_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3138_22930333_HJWLMk&akid=3138%2E22930333%2EHJWLMk) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250405_3138_fr&refcode2=3138_22930333_HJWLMk&akid=3138%2E22930333%2EHJWLMk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250405_3138_fr&refcode2=3138_22930333_HJWLMk&akid=3138%2E22930333%2EHJWLMk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250405_3138_fr&refcode2=3138_22930333_HJWLMk&akid=3138%2E22930333%2EHJWLMk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250405_3138_fr&refcode2=3138_22930333_HJWLMk&akid=3138%2E22930333%2EHJWLMk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250405_3138_fr&refcode2=3138_22930333_HJWLMk&akid=3138%2E22930333%2EHJWLMk)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?refcode=em_20250405_3138_fr&refcode2=3138_22930333_HJWLMk&akid=3138%2E22930333%2EHJWLMk)**
---
****
Let’s be clear: Republican politicians are counting on silence. On apathy. On you giving up.
But if you were in the room with us in Nashville today — if you saw the energy, the grit, the determination — you’d know what I know:
We are not giving up. We are just getting started.
Thanks for being in this fight with me,
Elizabeth
Elizabeth Warren
U.S. Senator, Massachusetts
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?amount=3&refcode=em_20250405_3138_fr&refcode2=3138_22930333_HJWLMk&akid=3138%2E22930333%2EHJWLMk)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
