name: brutal update [via FFR]
subject: re: horrific Social Security update
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d) It's with a heavy heart that we write to you today.

Donald Trump is threatening to CUT Social Security because of Elon Musk: | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=3&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d) | [**Breaking from _Rolling Stone:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=4&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)

[**" Trump Admin Threatens to Stop Social Security If DOGE Can't Have Personal Data"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=5&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
---|---
But, the deadline to sign our petition to SAVE Social Security from Trump and Musk's tyranny came and went... **_but we never saw your signature._**

**Too much is at stake for America 's seniors who have paid into Social Security their entire lives if the GOP slashes this crucial program, so we're reactivating our petition until the end of the day to give you a chance to sign it.**

It will only be open for another 12 hours.
[**_Please do not squander this opportunity! Just sign your name:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=6&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
[SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY: SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=7&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
---
_Fight for Reform_

\---- FORWARDED MESSAGE ----
[**DISGUSTING: Elon Musk Calls Social Security "The Biggest Ponzi Scheme Of All Time"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=8&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=9&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
The MAGA billionaire's latest attack on Social Security is appalling.

And remember: Elon Musk's DOGE could really cut Social Security!!

**That 's why Congress HAS to protect Social Security and safeguard it from Elon and MAGA Republican destruction!!**

[**Be one of the emergency 6O,OOO signatures we need today to demand Congress save Social Security ->**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=10&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
[SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY: SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=11&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
---
Elon Musk said the social safety net that benefits 68 million Americans is a pyramid scheme and repeated claims that millions of dead Americans are receiving Social Security payouts.

**WE KNOW** this is just not true!

**WE KNOW** that Social Security benefits are essential to Americans' livelihoods.

**WE KNOW** millions of folks would be living out on the streets without their Social Security.

**AND WE KNOW** that Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and his fake DOGE agency are looking for **ANY** reason to gut and privatize Social Security.

Bernie Sanders was right all along:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=12&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
[**Please sign your name to tell Congress to SAVE Social Security before it 's too late! Our petition requires 60,000 signatures by 11:59 PM ->**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=13&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
[SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY: SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60465?t=14&akid=22975%2E4449941%2E7pg4_d)
---
Thank you.

Fight for Reform

name: JanePAC
subject: Tornadoes, floods, and wildfires are devastating our communities right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Trump is slashing climate disaster funding so he can hand out more tax breaks to Big Oil.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105281257/537838457/1328794144?refcode=ea.bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhZDQxNTdkLTZkMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mN3BeFfRXd76SLBS5JaeH8ytUkj6q9VwKEAUPEn8nGI=&emci=9aacbdd9-5b11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
We’re sure many of you are seeing the news about devastating floods, dust storms, wildfires, and tornadoes tearing through our country right now. If you are impacted by these storms, or simply need a break, **[please click here to receive less emails from us at this time.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105281258/537838458/-2038561436?refcode=ea.bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhZDQxNTdkLTZkMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mN3BeFfRXd76SLBS5JaeH8ytUkj6q9VwKEAUPEn8nGI=&emci=9aacbdd9-5b11-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)** Take care of what matters most, and we’ll be here when you're ready. The climate crisis is here. We have seen deadlier storms and bigger disasters every year displacing entire communities, ripping apart neighborhoods, and forcing families to start all over again. It truly pains us to see what’s happening – but what makes us angry is when politicians politicize catastrophe. **Because in a moment of sheer devastation, Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” is dismantling FEMA and NOAA, leaving you to fend for yourself.** It’s flat-out dangerous. It’s wrong. It’s appalling. And when disaster strikes, communities will be left with little warning and scrambling for help. It doesn’t matter where you live – a red state, a blue state, a rural town, or an urban center – government programs like FEMA and NOAA were designed to provide emergency disaster relief and give communities a chance at rebuilding after the worst climate catastrophes. So you may be wondering why DOGE is targeting these programs? It’s about money and power. Trump is slashing climate disaster funding so he can hand out more tax breaks to Big Oil. He’s taking money away from communities trying to survive and giving it to the industries fueling these disasters in the first place. **That’s why JanePAC is dedicated to taking on the polluters and politicians putting profits over people. We’re in the fight of our lives, and we need real leaders in office who will protect our communities – not cast them aside.** | **Our work to elect the next wave of climate champions isn’t easy. But we’re fueled by people like YOU – not Big Oil, not billionaires. ** **[If it’s in your means, will you donate $5 to help us elect leaders who actually believe in science and will defend the agencies that keep us safe?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105281259/537838459/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhZDQxNTdkLTZkMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mN3BeFfRXd76SLBS5JaeH8ytUkj6q9VwKEAUPEn8nGI=)** | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105281260/537838460/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.bad4157d-6d12-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhZDQxNTdkLTZkMTItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mN3BeFfRXd76SLBS5JaeH8ytUkj6q9VwKEAUPEn8nGI=)

* * *
**EMILY'S MESSAGE:** It's been a tough few months to be a new member of Congress, to be a Democrat, to be an American. I know you know what I mean. Attacks on our communities, our country, and our Constitution. Reckless and dangerous decisions by the President and his billionaire bestie. Congressional Republicans unwilling to stand up and defend their constitutional mandate to be a check and balance to the executive branch. Job losses, defunding healthcare and Social Security and housing and education and foreign aid and veterans' services and libraries. BUT — This week, we began to see their grip on power faltering: 👉🏽 Senator Cory Booker held the Senate floor for more than 25 hours, sharing stories from real people about what they are facing because of President Trump, Elon Musk, and Congressional Republicans. 👉🏽 Speaker Mike Johnson tried to thwart a bipartisan effort to allow new parents to vote — tying it up with the so-called "SAVE Act" that disenfranchises American voters (especially women) — and the vote went down in flames. He underestimated women and mothers. He overestimated his own power. He didn't know how to count his votes, and no amount of arm-twisting/bargaining/holding the vote open could keep him from losing. 👉🏽 Democrat Susan Crawford WON the Wisconsin Supreme Court special election, even though Elon Musk spent millions to rig it, including illegal efforts to bribe voters. 👉🏽 While the Republican candidates won the Florida special elections, they did so by a margin half as strong as Trump's win in November in that same district. The pressure that regular people are exerting on politicians, the stories folks are telling about the impact of executive action, the volunteering for special elections, the crowds showing up in our communities day in and day out — IT'S WORKING. There is no power stronger than the power of the people. Keep showing up, day in and day out!

clean_body: We’re getting a LOT of responses from Emily’s latest post on social media. | Peter, We're getting a LOT of responses from Emily's latest post on social media. Read her message below, and please share it with your friends with these links: • Or, forward this email! Thank you so much 💙 — Team Emily EMILY'S MESSAGE:** It's been a tough few months to be a new member of Congress, to be a Democrat, to be an American. I know you know what I mean. Attacks on our communities, our country, and our Constitution. Reckless and dangerous decisions by the President and his billionaire bestie. Congressional Republicans unwilling to stand up and defend their constitutional mandate to be a check and balance to the executive branch. Job losses, defunding healthcare and Social Security and housing and education and foreign aid and veterans' services and libraries. BUT — This week, we began to see their grip on power faltering: 👉🏽 Senator Cory Booker held the Senate floor for more than 25 hours, sharing stories from real people about what they are facing because of President Trump, Elon Musk, and Congressional Republicans. 👉🏽 Speaker Mike Johnson tried to thwart a bipartisan effort to allow new parents to vote — tying it up with the so-called "SAVE Act" that disenfranchises American voters (especially women) — and the vote went down in flames. He underestimated women and mothers. He overestimated his own power. He didn't know how to count his votes, and no amount of arm-twisting/bargaining/holding the vote open could keep him from losing. 👉🏽 Democrat Susan Crawford WON the Wisconsin Supreme Court special election, even though Elon Musk spent millions to rig it, including illegal efforts to bribe voters. 👉🏽 While the Republican candidates won the Florida special elections, they did so by a margin half as strong as Trump's win in November in that same district. The pressure that regular people are exerting on politicians, the stories folks are telling about the impact of executive action, the volunteering for special elections, the crowds showing up in our communities day in and day out — IT'S WORKING. There is no power stronger than the power of the people. Keep showing up, day in and day out! = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. clean_body: Now’s your chance to reactivate, Peter. | | | | Peter... I'm not sure how to say this... But I think it's time for us to face the truth... Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost. We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. But now, it seems like you've moved on. | | | | "Generic Button" I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team. Your support meant everything to us, and we were unstoppable together. But now, everything is at risk. | | | "Generic Button" Look, I'm not here to beg you to come back. But I want you to know that we're not the same without you. Our efforts are diminished, and our progress is stalled. | | | | "Generic Button" "If you're willing to try again, I'm here to give it another shot. Renew your membership, and let's see if we can rekindle what we once had. " Renewing your membership would mean the world to me, Peter, can I count on you to take this step and make a difference? | | | "Generic Button" Yours truly, Dan, Membership Services | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/3643d865-6ec1-41d9-b453-9ea4d3a35d08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy Giuliani**
Listen, folks, I've seen America at its best and its worst, and let me tell you something: what we're doing with these tariffs is tough, it's bold, and it's exactly what this country needs to get its economic self-esteem back. The media? They're screaming like a bunch of spoiled kids who didn't get their participation trophies. "Economic disaster!" they cry. "Trade wars!" they shriek. Give me a break. This is short-term pain for long-term gain, and the Trump administration has been upfront about it from day one.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..eh7W2oGK4hhXpIqkWB8g7Pa9unLGrp_jr_pLCA5H-II?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160651441)
Let's get real here. Our economy's been bleeding for years--decades, even--because we've let our so-called "trade partners" screw us six ways to Sunday. China? They slap tariffs on us higher than the Empire State Building while we roll out the red carpet for their cheap junk. Europe? Same deal--they protect their farmers and manufacturers while we let our industries rot. President Trump's reciprocal tariffs are a wake-up call: if you're gonna hit us with 25%, 50%, or more, we're hitting you back. Fair's fair. That's not radical--it's common sense. And it's about time America stopped being the world's doormat and started standing up for itself.
The administration's been honest about this from the jump. Trump's not sugarcoating it--there's gonna be some bumps. Prices might tick up a bit, some companies might have to adjust. But this isn't some reckless gamble; it's a calculated move to fix chronic problems that've been festering since I was chasing down mobsters in the '80s. We've got a trade deficit that's a disgrace--nearly $800 billion last year alone! Our manufacturing's been gutted, our jobs shipped off to third-world sweatshops where workers get paid peanuts--or worse, nothing at all, in what's basically slave labor. And you know who's fine with that? The liberals--the same ones clutching their pearls over Trump's tariffs. They'll cry about "losing their rights" all day long, but when it comes to the cheap sneakers and iPhones they love, they're happy to look the other way. Hypocrites!
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Presented By Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/bfe31e6c-38c4-439b-8946-d3502096e20f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Nobel Prize discovery TERRIFIES oncologists
Everything in this video, while extremely controversial, is completely true.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bfe31e6c-38c4-439b-8946-d3502096e20f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A Nobel Prize-winning discovery has led to a treatment with zero side effects, NO CHEMO needed, and success stories with complete reversals.

**[WATCH THIS VIDEO before oncologists demand its removal.](https://substack.com/redirect/bfe31e6c-38c4-439b-8946-d3502096e20f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bfe31e6c-38c4-439b-8946-d3502096e20f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**Continued:**_
These tariffs are the medicine America needs. Yeah, it stings going down, but it's gonna make us stronger. You're already seeing American companies stepping up, getting competitive again. Steel's coming back, aluminum's coming back--made right here, by American hands earning a fair wage. That's what economic self-esteem looks like: knowing we can build our own stuff, grow our own food, and tell the globalists to take a hike. If we don't fix this now, we're toast--our kids and grandkids will be stuck in a second-rate country, begging for scraps from China and the EU. Trump's not letting that happen, and neither should we.
Now, here's the kicker: this isn't some wild-eyed, right-wing fever dream. Tariffs have been a bipartisan idea for years! Don't take my word for it--look at the Democrats' own heavy hitters. Nancy Pelosi? She's backed tariffs to protect American workers from unfair trade--said it herself in the '90s when she was railing against China. Chuck Schumer? He's been pounding the table for years about leveling the playing field--called for tariffs on steel way back when. Even Barack Obama--Mr. Hope and Change himself--**[slapped tariffs on Chinese tires](https://substack.com/redirect/06237969-6b2e-4acd-b6c1-1a3b5229f14c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and pipes to protect U.S. jobs. This isn't "fascism," folks, it's fairness. It's America First, and it's got a track record both sides of the aisle have cheered for--until Trump did it, of course.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..eh7W2oGK4hhXpIqkWB8g7Pa9unLGrp_jr_pLCA5H-II?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160651441)
That's the real story here: the Democrats just can't stand Trump winning. If he cured cancer tomorrow, they'd be out there picketing for cancer's right to exist. It's pathetic. They've spent eight years whining about everything he does--tax cuts, border security, peace deals in the Middle East--and now tariffs are their latest tantrum. They don't care about the facts; they just want to dunk on Trump. Meanwhile, the media's in lockstep, fearmongering like it's their job--which, let's be honest, it is. They're terrified of an America that doesn't need their permission to thrive.
Back when I was mayor, I didn't fix New York by playing nice with the bad guys--I cracked down, made tough calls, and turned a war zone into the safest big city in America. Trump's doing the same with our economy. These tariffs are a gut punch to the status quo, and yeah, it's gonna hurt a little. But the payoff? A country that makes its own goods, pays its own people, and doesn't bow to anybody. That's worth it. So let the media wail and the Democrats weep--America's coming back, and we're doing it on our terms.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: 𝙎𝙋𝘼𝙉𝘽𝙀𝙍𝙂𝙀𝙍 𝙄𝙎 𝙏𝙃𝙀 𝙊𝙉𝙀!!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
SPANBERGER IS THE ONE!!!
In odd-numbered years, the biggest political prize is Virginia, especially when the four-year Governorship term is up. Unlike elsewhere, Virginia’s sitting Governor can not succeed themselves and run for a consecutive term.
Thursday was the final filing day to run for Governor. Get Out the Vote PAC has long supported Abigail Spanberger, the only Democrat to file. Therefore, Abigail is the Democratic nominee, and there will be no distracting, expensive primary.
The daughter of a cop and a nurse, Abigail resigned in 2018 as a CIA Operations Officer focused on nuclear proliferation and terrorism. She left the CIA to run for Congress, where she flipped a seat that had been held by the Republicans since 1970.
GOTV is already helping Virginia state House candidates with early funding to build their teams in winnable competitive districts. The more these candidates can prepare early, the stronger they will be in November, which will be an important component in electing Abigail.
Peter, can you contribute $25 or more to help fund these down-ballot candidates through GOTV today? These kinds of early investments pay off the most on election day. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04052025&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04052025&amount=25]
—GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04052025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04052025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-UFTIeK5E0CCzhE2NytL8Q2?unsubscribedata=0fRGd4IlD70lU9mm11JpUjxd0iFO0%2BT9cEdTXGQszd5ZnW2es7zkDDs3ppaTKgu6ip0EyMkeIu735D%2FoBgEfAKdee%2BICT0O5hk451aMB6XYTE5Wcohh77TgZcolwqinOm8rCLcp4IHONj0fDFyZdv7nxCEdGx2K08oRI1mTlM9SbT5D7SniRZ3buq%2FZkJP%2BVsca0SgPBHIypsEk5JznX7DbE2pFkQqWSARp501PoOEqfUPNWZ1ObxzIShOk3XzPJieV8UJ6QzmP0D41zqRw7OZ5zOD%2Fy9Vfg1%2FTbOI9zR2fnU4gAoyYRE7afjFnpD8vBC8jiFLWKCpSFVwax5MsOsUDummkkk4ipwPUqA6AIRyuZF8FuxEMrS6anHgbaw8BsqRZYt1w29sSdmvY%2BjoyOK1V19bbYRuMHmi0XZrBoQfg%3D .
